releases.name: Winlator 7.1.3 with Native Glibc
releases.body:
## What's New
#### Added
- Added **MIDI** support, allowing some games to play MIDI audio. The software comes with an open-source soundfont by [default](https://musical-artifacts.com/artifacts/1517), and you can also install your preferred soundfont in the `Settings` (currently, only SF2 format is supported). Download Windows MIDI Soundfont [here](https://musical-artifacts.com/artifacts/713).
- Improved **OpenXR** suooport. Many thanks to **Luboš V.** , his work making OpenXR support possible and better.
- Improved Game Controller Support, you can now selectively use **XInput** or **DInput** mapping. Linear triggers now work with both mapping modes. For trigger button, if it’s not working correctly, try adjusting the trigger button mode in the `Settings` to match your controller.
- Added the feature to automatically set the container's **Locale**. You can now also adjust `LC_ALL` settings in the container editing interface.
- Added Landscape And **Portrait Mode** switching features. You can now switch to portrait mode using the container's resolution settings or `Toggle Orientation` button of the left-side navigation bar.
- Added the ability to reconfigure containers. You can now click `Reconfigure` in the container options to reconfigure the Wine prefix on the next startup.
  
#### Fixed
- Fixed the stuttering issue when exiting the container.
- Fixed the issue where shortcuts on the desktop remained available after deleting the container.
- Fixed the issue with binding gamepad analog sticks in InputControlEditor.
- Fixed the issue that shortcuts sometimes lost their settings.
- Fixed the issue where clicking on the screen and input controls simultaneously in touch screen simulation mode caused crashes.
- Fixed the missing End key issue in InputControlEditor.
- Fixed the issue when creating a new container would reset the version and preset of box64.
- Fixed the issue where groups in the box64 rc file could not be disabled.
- Fixed the issue where the mouse pointer was inaccurate when using simulated touch screen in full-screen mode.
- Fixed the issue where the file provider did not support moving files.
- Fixed the issue where reinstalling the file system sometimes skipped the opt folder.
- Fixed the issue where external storage could not be added as a Wine drive.
  
#### Changed
- Update Wine to 9.16.
- File provider enabled by default.
- Added gst-libav.
  
####  What's new about OpenXR Support?
- Fixed the issue causing crashes at startup.
- Fixed 3DoF support to ensure it functions correctly, rather than running in 2DoF mode.
- Fixed some graphical glitches on the Meta Quest 3.
- Added controller mapping functionality in the settings.
- Fixed the black screen issue on QuestOS V69.
  
#### FAQ
1. #### What is Winlator with Native Glibc?
   Many thanks to **BrunoSX** for developing [Winlator](https://github.com/brunodev85/winlator), a practical and popular PC simulation software. Winlator Glibc is not an upgrade but a mod to Winlator. It uses Glibc patches from Termux-pacman to build the necessary packages, achieving the same goals as the Proot-based solution but without the I/O performance loss associated with Proot. However, due to the exclusion of Arm32 and limitations in Wine's support for wow64, its compatibility with 32-bit applications is not as good as the vanilla Winlator.
1. #### Where to Get Latest Turnip Driver?
   Thanks to **K11MCH1** and **JeezDisReez**, the latest Mesa Turnip drivers are available for Winlator and can be found [K11MCH1/WinlatorTurnipDrivers](https://github.com/K11MCH1/WinlatorTurnipDrivers).
3. #### Why not Include the New Box64 and Drivers in App?
   Box64 and the Turnip Driver are updated frequently, so installing them externally ensures they are always up to date. Therefore, the app only includes their latest release versions.
4. #### Reinstall or Overwrite?
   You do not need to uninstall the old Winlator Glibc before installation. However, if you have installed a different version, you must uninstall it before installing the new one due to different signatures. Please make sure to **BACK UP** your data.
5. #### Game has Sound but Blank.
   Try using box64 version 0.3.0 or earlier and try using wine-9.2.
4. #### What is .wcp?
   **.wcp** is the file extension for add-ons. It is compressed using **XZ** or **Zstd** and includes a **profile.json** file as a manifest. You can create your own add-on files containing various contents. Since these files often include executable programs, **make sure** to verify that add-ons from other sources do not contain malicious software before installation.
6. #### What is .rcp?
   **.rcp** is the file extension for custom Box64 configuration files. It uses a JSON data structure and can be used to generate a box64rc file that Box64 can read. You can refer to [official box64rc](https://github.com/ptitSeb/box64/blob/main/system/box64.box64rc) to configure the rcp file, but you **cannot** import it directly.
  
**Additional Files**:
1. **box64-0.3.1-0450371.wcp**: contains `box64-0.3.1`, built from [ptitSeb/box64](https://github.com/ptitSeb/box64/commit/0450371e282bd5c4dbbceaeca590626304609036).
3. **box64-0.3.1-0450371-8g2.wcp**: contains `box64-0.3.1`, built from [ptitSeb/box64](https://github.com/ptitSeb/box64/commit/0450371e282bd5c4dbbceaeca590626304609036). Disabled BAD_SIGNAL for 8gen2 and enabled the 8G2 option, which **may** improve performance.
7. **box64-0.2.7.wcp**: contains `box64-0.2.7`, built from [ptitSeb/box64](https://github.com/ptitSeb/box64).
8. **wine-9.2-custom.wcp**: contains `wine-9.2`. Added MIDI support and improved controller support for Wine 9.2. Please avoid using the older version of Wine 9.2.

## What's Changed
* OpenXR - Fix crash on init by @lvonasek in https://github.com/longjunyu2/winlator/pull/36
* midi: Add midi support. by @longjunyu2 in https://github.com/longjunyu2/winlator/pull/38
* OpenXR - Fix 3DoF by @lvonasek in https://github.com/longjunyu2/winlator/pull/40
* controller: Try fix controller issues. by @longjunyu2 in https://github.com/longjunyu2/winlator/pull/44
* OpenXR - Reopening fixed by @lvonasek in https://github.com/longjunyu2/winlator/pull/46
* OpenXR - Fix 3DoF camera by @lvonasek in https://github.com/longjunyu2/winlator/pull/47
* OpenXR - Workaround for graphical glitches by @lvonasek in https://github.com/longjunyu2/winlator/pull/50
* OpenXR - Controller mapping in settings by @lvonasek in https://github.com/longjunyu2/winlator/pull/52
* OpenXR - Crash fix by @lvonasek in https://github.com/longjunyu2/winlator/pull/53
* Fixed cannot see changes of input controls until reset. by @longjunyu2 in https://github.com/longjunyu2/winlator/pull/56
* OpenXR - Fix for QuestOS V69 by @lvonasek in https://github.com/longjunyu2/winlator/pull/58

## New Contributors
* @lvonasek made their first contribution in https://github.com/longjunyu2/winlator/pull/36

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/longjunyu2/winlator/compare/v7.1.2...v7.1.3

releases.name: Winlator 7.1.2 with Native Glibc
releases.body:
#### Added
- Added support for `Box64rc`, allowing different Box64 parameters to be set for each process.
- Added `virtual touchscreen` support, also referred to as `direct cursor` support. True touchscreen support requires implementing the XInput2 extension.
- Added support for Chinese. And any corrections to the translation are welcome.
- Added an `content manager`, allowing you to install Wine, graphics drivers, or DX wrappers externally.
- Added the ability to reinstall system files, allowing recovery even if the system files are accidentally damaged.
- Added more VKD3D feature level options.
- Added android `file provider` feature, allowing access to the Winlator data directory through the file manager.
- Added the ability to add `shortcuts` to the home screen, allowing you to launch your programs directly from the desktop. Shortcut changes will be synced in real-time.

#### Fixed
- Fixed the crash issue that occurred when running programs with long Japanese or Chinese titles.
- Corrected the button styling in the DXVK configuration dialog.
- Fixed certain abnormal issues on some SoCs (such as 870), by compiling Box64 with the `BAD_SIGNAL` parameter enabled.
- Fixed an issue that caused Steam to crash by removing the patch for `iphalpapi` in Wine.
- Fixed the font configuration, you can now add custom fonts to `imagefs/usr/share/fonts`.

#### Changed
- Set DXVK parameters via environment variables instead of configuration files, allowing for custom DXVK configuration files.
- Hide the system pointer when using an external mouse. Thanks to **xoureldeen** for the method.
- Removed the built-in `DXVK-0.96`, `DXVK-1.10.3`, and `Box64-0.3.1-dev`. These components will now be provided through add-ons.
- Update Wine to 9.15.
  
**Note**
- **.wcp** is the file extension for add-ons. It is compressed using XZ or Zstd and includes a `profile.json` file as a manifest. You can create your own add-on files containing various contents. Since these files often include executable programs, **make sure** to verify that add-ons from other sources do not contain malicious software before installation.
- **.rcp** is the file extension for custom Box64 configuration files. It uses a JSON data structure and can be used to generate a box64rc file that Box64 can read. You can refer to the [official box64rc](https://github.com/ptitSeb/box64/blob/main/system/box64.box64rc) file to configure the .rcp file.
  
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/longjunyu2/winlator/compare/v7.1.1...v7.1.2
  
Thanks to **K11MCH1** and **JeezDisReez**, the latest Mesa Turnip drivers are available for Winlator and can be found [K11MCH1/WinlatorTurnipDrivers](https://github.com/K11MCH1/WinlatorTurnipDrivers).
  
**Additional Files**:
1. **box64-0.3.1-017d13a.wcp**: contains `box64-0.3.1`, built from [ptitSeb/box64](https://github.com/ptitSeb/box64/commit/017d13a7b0717c61fda67322051ae8a92ce3e035).
2. **dxvk-0.96.wcp**: contains `dxvk-0.96`, from [doitsujin/dxvk](https://github.com/doitsujin/dxvk/releases/tag/v0.96).
3. **dxvk-1.10.3.wcp**: contains `dxvk-1.10.3`, from [doitsujin/dxvk](https://github.com/doitsujin/dxvk/releases/tag/v1.10.3).
4. **turnip-23.3.0.wcp**: contains `turnip-23.3.0`, extract from [brunodev85/winlator (v6.1)](https://github.com/brunodev85/winlator/releases/tag/v6.1.0).
5. **turnip-24.3.0-d264c66f**: contains `turnip-24.3.0.2`, built from [Pipetto-crypto/mesa](https://gitlab.freedesktop.org/Pipetto-crypto/mesa/-/tree/3d0ee99f257492b67eb37f12a2798e8c718c5f4c).
6. **wine-9.2-custom.wcp**: contains `wine-9.2`, built from [brunodev85/wine-9.2-custom](https://github.com/brunodev85/wine-9.2-custom).

releases.name: Winlator 7.1.1 with Native Glibc
releases.body:
#### Added
- Added `dxvk-2.4` and `dxvk-gplasync-2.4`, and set dxvk-2.3.1 as the default dxvk. 
- Added version switching and configuration support for `vkd3d`.
- Added `vkd3d-2.13`.
- Added an older version of `box64` (`box64-2.8`).
- Added support for linear triggers. (currently only for Xinput)

#### Fixed
- Fixed the path for the dxvk configuration file.
- Fixed the path for the Virgl server; `VirGL` is now working.
- Fixed keyboard input issues for some games.

#### Changed
- The `AVX` extension for box64 is **disabled** by default. It needs to be manually enabled by creating a new `box64 preset` in the settings.
- Enabled all cores by default for experimental wow64.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/longjunyu2/winlator/compare/v7.1.0...v7.1.1

**Note**: Please uninstall previous versions before installation to avoid potential errors. Remember to **back up** your data.

releases.name: Winlator 7.1 with Native Glibc
releases.body:
- Update Wine to 9.13
- Update Box64 to 0.3.0
- Use native glibc instead of proot
- VirGL is **NOT** work current now !!!
- Support **Arm64** only !!!

This version is for testing purposes. `Native glibc` is NOT necessarily better than `Proot`, it just adds a possibility for winlator.  
  
**Notice**: Please backup the original Winlator's data before installation.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/longjunyu2/winlator/commits/v7.1.0

releases.name: Wine staging 10.15 (WOW64 with Vulkan & GStreamer for Termux)
releases.body:
# Wine staging 10.15 - WOW64 with Vulkan & GStreamer for Termux

## 版本信息
- **Wine 分支**: staging
- **Wine 版本**: 10.15
- **架构**: True WOW64 (同时支持 32 位和 64 位 Windows 应用程序)
- **平台**: Termux (Android)
- **图形 API**: Vulkan 支持已启用
- **多媒体**: 完整 GStreamer 支持

## 特性
✓ 真正的 WOW64 架构
✓ 同时支持 32 位和 64 位 Windows 应用程序
✓ Vulkan 图形 API 支持
✓ 完整的 GStreamer 支持
✓ 中文环境支持
✓ 应用了关键补丁提升兼容性

## 安装说明
解压后，将 `wine-wine-10.15-72dc2afb1a7-staging-wow64` 文件夹放置在 Termux 的合适位置，并设置环境变量。

## 构建信息
- 构建时间: 
- 提交: 47f15cb0b6754b22914cbd83fa504fd58c9a7f7f
- 工作流: Wine and Proton 无bootBuilder

releases.name: Proton proton_10.0 (WOW64 with Vulkan & GStreamer for Termux - xuser)
releases.body:
# Proton proton_10.0 - WOW64 with Vulkan & GStreamer for Termux (xuser)

## 版本信息
- **Proton 分支**: proton_10.0
- **架构**: True WOW64 (同时支持 32 位和 64 位 Windows 应用程序)
- **平台**: Termux (Android)
- **图形 API**: Vulkan 支持已启用
- **多媒体**: 完整 GStreamer 支持
- **用户名**: xuser (已移除 Steam 优化)

## 特性
✓ 真正的 WOW64 架构
✓ 同时支持 32 位和 64 位 Windows 应用程序
✓ Vulkan 图形 API 支持
✓ 完整的 GStreamer 支持
✓ 中文环境支持
✓ 基于 Valve Proton，但移除了 Steam 特定优化
✓ 默认用户名改为 xuser

## 重要变更
- 所有对 `steamuser` 的引用已改为 `xuser`
- 移除了 Steam 特定的优化和组件
- 更适合通用 Windows 应用程序运行

## 安装说明
解压后，将 `proton-proton-wine-10.0-4-b8fdff8e1f8-wow64-xuser` 文件夹放置在 Termux 的合适位置，并设置环境变量。

## 构建信息
- 构建时间: 
- 提交: c139ecff7e39b1a0e194826fccf83496e3dbbfa9
- 工作流: Wine and Proton 无bootBuilder

添加wine9.15wow64供8g3更正常的游玩一些32位游戏
还有需要更改忘记了！

releases.name: 7.1Amod11(proot)
releases.body:
测试新proot，
8g3用户可以试试，感谢补补大佬，
新增驱动24.3.0。仅有64位！起点处可以打！
增加新的变量。有提速！

releases.name: 7.1Amod10-A3
releases.body:
修复语言环境
添加屏幕旋转，屏幕点击，简易终端等
添加海豚测试(d3d8)
更新prootload，解决其他wine-wow64版本无法兼容32位的问题
更新proot用于更好的兼容8g3请选择8g3版本
添加dxvk2.4系列
添加box64 0.2.9，部分游戏比较快
添加box64 0.3.1，仍然有问题！仅供测试
修复变量导致的游戏进不去的问题

releases.name: 6.1Amod20-A3
releases.body:
6.1最后一版了！
缩短数据包，降低解压时间
添加海豚测试(d3d8)
更新prootload，解决其他wine-wow64版本无法兼容32位的问题
更新proot用于更好的兼容8g3请选择8g3版本
添加dxvk2.4系列
添加box64 0.3.1
修复变量导致的游戏进不去的问题
等等

releases.name: 7.1Amod9
releases.body:
修复部分卡死
尝试修复部分手机vgl渲染发黑
尝试添加所有文件访问权限（来自coffincolor）
添加box64-0.3.1开发版和box86-0.3.1
添加dxvk2.4
其他更改

releases.name: 7.1Amod10和6.1Amod20(end)
releases.body:
重整数据包
提高部分游戏兼容。解决卡死！
和之前版本配合使用！

releases.name: 7.1fix6和6.1fix16
releases.body:
同步7.1R最新内容
添加更多的预设
重整数据包，修复任务管理器
修复兼容性，减少卡死

releases.name: 7.1Amod8和6.1Amod18
releases.body:
修复7.1字体问题和6.1的任务管理器
修复部分变量导致的兼容问题
更改proot可以让8g3得到使用
提高游戏运行速度
box预设新建后使用比默认更快哦！
其他修复！

releases.name: 5.1.0Amod-all
releases.body:
部分游戏速度更快
更新驱动，
更新支持8g3
添加一些东西！

releases.name: 7.1fix5和6.1fix15
releases.body:
重新更改proot，大幅度提升运行速度
提升游戏加载速度
起点加入zink选项！
其他没了，6.1可能进程管理器不显示名称不影响使用

releases.name: 7.1fix3and6.1fix14-A6
releases.body:
更新内部环境，更改dy设置
添加更多变量可选
修复任务管理器进程问题
加入最新box64和box86，
重新整理变量，帧数更稳定(7.1不确定)，
替换作者的最新驱动，因为他的比较慢，放在了起点！
加入实验性BOX64_AVX，放在了预设，默认为1！

releases.name: 7.0fix1(测试test)
releases.body:
修复语言环境！感谢hostei！
数据包修复gst！
驱动添加在容器内部起点处！
变量添加自定义语言。自定义GL，以及其他自定义
额外功能暂时不加等源码放出后123大佬再弄
其他修复！

releases.name: 6.1fix14-A2
releases.body: 修复了gst！

releases.name: 6.1fix14
releases.body:
6.1fix14更新内容！

1-更新驱动和box！更新vgl！no8g3更新proot！来自7.0！

2-修复华为系列启动显示冲突(感谢补补大佬)！

3-根据7.0更新数据包以及apk内部环境，提速！

4-默认wine9.2wow64来自7.0，以及wine8.0.2！

5-加入7.0的魔方d3d测试软件！仅供娱乐！

releases.name: 6.1fix12-A2
releases.body:
6.1fix12-A2更新内容:
1-更换默认E盘为exagear(没有的需要自己创建)
2添加box64-0.2.8，box86-0.3.6
3-修复帧数限制无效的bug
4-添加wine9.9wow64默认(一共三个wine)
5-添加部分dxvk！默认2.3.1.1
6-修改中级模式的dy，提高一点速度
7-添加变量VKD3D_FEATURE_LEVEL=12_1用于dx12游戏，最好配合vkd3d12fix
8-修改控制器编辑大小范围，最大300
9-wfm改为exa的tfm，等待1.4版汉化完成再改回来，目前没有汉化好！技术有限！
10-其他修改和修复！

releases.name: 6.1fix12
releases.body:
更新内容：
dx12游戏尝试使用vkd3d12fix和变量VKD3D_FEATURE_LEVEL=12_1
1-加入123大佬的按键振动功能和滚动条功能！注意只有普通按钮支持振动！仅供测试！
2-加入gst开关(默认关)和三国志12注册表(可以配合显示window进游戏)！
3-加入24.0.1驱动，理论上可以解决部分游戏突然掉帧(可能会花哦)！等作者以后更新
4-删除wine9.1wow64，可以自己去装！
5-其他修复

releases.name: 6.1fix11
releases.body:
6.1fix11更新测试，
重制dex，优化各方面的调用
添加123大佬的画中画模式
去除多余的box
8g2以及以下的可以用no8g3，帧数略高于8g3版
8g3版因为proot问题茶壶会低许多，
但是性能应该差不多毕竟8g3那么牛批！

releases.name: 6.1fix9-A3-wow64-8g3
releases.body:
A3默认wine9.3wow64
修复大部分游戏的按键问题
修复proot终端闪退的问题
并提供wine9.1的wow64自行安装
彻底兼容wow64，
提供wine8.0.2和wine9.1wow64两个wine
使8g3能够正常玩游戏包括32位，都可以使用dxvk！
8g3要用里面的wine9.1wow64才可以玩32位哦！
64位游戏随便用

releases.name: 6.1fix4
releases.body:
！！更新修复输入中文后apk控制器按键丢失的问题！
！！A3修复回车键！！
-支持中文输入
-极致压缩数据包(暂时不加入win9.3请自行安装)
-不在支持起点处安装驱动和dxvk，一切在apk编辑
-添加dxvk2.3.1-8开发版
-下面提供mono和gecko的离线安装包
-6.1暂时到这里了！

releases.name: 6.1fix3
releases.body:
-添加创建安卓桌面快捷方式，请在容器内先创建游戏快捷方式，再去apk添加
-添加xp小游戏，在起点Programs处
-彻底清除7z感染，修复安装！
-精简数据包，添加字体！
-其他更新请自行体验
-感谢原作者BrunoSX和各位大佬的付出！

releases.name: 6.1fix10_A6
releases.body:
理论上会提速
修复快捷方式无法启动的问题
加入obw109的部分系统文件
加入部分变量
修改dy值

releases.name: Test-2
releases.body:
测试版，
box更换
数据包为termux-box
只能用pulse
否则会没有声音

releases.name: 6.1fix2
releases.body:
-重建apk提高稳定性
-修复7z的感染问题
-添加屏幕旋转
-添加屏幕点击
-修复竖屏任务管理器布局
-修复竖屏控制器布局
-竖屏可以编辑控制器
-修复安装tz和dxvk时窗口不关闭的问题
-不默认dxvk，请在起点处安装，避免每次都是1.10.3
-添加ib启动和教鞭启动
-添加部分box
-仅供测试娱乐，请支持原作者！

releases.name: 6.0fix4
releases.body:
感谢BrunoSX分享的t24.1.0起点命名为a7xxv6
精简数据包，体积更小！
修改变量！
修复一些卡死！
修复ib启动无效
修复教鞭文件丢失

releases.name: 6.0fix2
releases.body:
取消默认dxvk修复每次进都是1.10.3，需要自己安装dxvk
修复部分游戏无法使用mod的问题
重新整理变量

取消屏幕旋转，因为竖屏显示不全！等作者更新

releases.name: 6.0fix
releases.body:
添加不带点击功能的apk，修复外接鼠标和键盘闪退的问题
修复控制器图标闪退

pkg install icoutils imagemagick -y

releases.name: XoDos v6.0.0
releases.body:
## 🚀 Xodos v6.0 Update - "The All-in-One Powerhouse" 🚀

We're thrilled to announce a massive update for **Xodos**! This release is packed with fixes, optimizations, and incredible new features that transform your experience. Get ready for a smoother, more powerful, and feature-rich Xodos! ✨

### 🐛 What's New & Improved

* 🎮 `FIXED` Gamepad support and bindings for seamless gaming
* 🍷 `FIXED` Wine launching scripts for better compatibility
* 🎨 `FIXED & UPDATED` The user interface for a cleaner look and feel
* 🌙 `FIXED` Desktop dark & light theme bug
* 🧹 `REMOVED` Unnecessary packages and libraries for a leaner app
* 🗑️ `REMOVED` Unused start menu icons and shortcuts to reduce clutter

### 🆕 Brand New Features

#### ⚙️ . Advanced Shortcuts Manager
Create and manage custom shortcuts for each of your Wine games and apps with individual settings!

#### 📁 . Supercharged Files Manager
A powerful file manager with these features:
- ☑️ Multiple Selection Mode
- 📋 Copy & Paste
- 🔒 Change/Fix File Execute Permissions
- 📦 Extract Archives (7z, rar, zip, tar)
- 🔄 Extract/Install/Restore Xodos backups or .tar.xz archives
- ⚡ Run/Open .exe files from anywhere and create shortcuts
- 🎮 Run PlayStation 1 games from anywhere
- 🎯 Run Xbox Original (XEMU) games and manage ISO files
- 🐧 Install .deb Linux packages to native or proot distro

#### 🎮 . Steam Client on Wine (Optional)
Added support for running Steam client inside Wine desktop!
- Installation is optional
- Download Steam from releases and install from start menu

#### 🔄 . Native RetroArch Emulator
Integrated RetroArch directly into desktop with online multiplayer (Netplay) support!

**Supported Systems:**
2048, 3dengine, 81, atari800, bk, bluemsx, bsnes, bsnes2014_accuracy, bsnes2014_balanced, bsnes2014_performance, bsnes_cplusplus98, bsnes_hd_beta, bsnes_mercury_accuracy, bsnes_mercury_balanced, bsnes_mercury_performance, cannonball, cap32, chailove, craft, crocods, daphne, desmume, desmume2015, dinothawr, dolphin, dosbox_svn, duckstation, ecwolf, fbalpha2012, fbalpha2012_cps1, fbalpha2012_cps2, fbalpha2012_neogeo, fbneo, fceumm,

, flycast, fmsx, freechaf, freeintv, frodo, fuse, gambatte, gearboy, gearsystem, genesis_plus_gx, gme, gpsp, gw, handy, hatari, lutro, mame2000, mame2003, mame2003_plus, mednafen_gba, mednafen_lynx, mednafen_ngp, mednafen_pce, mednafen_pce_fast, mednafen_pcfx, mednafen_psx, mednafen_psx_hw, mednafen_saturn, mednafen_snes, mednafen_supafaust, mednafen_supergrafx, mednafen_vb, mednafen_wswan, melonds, mesen, mesen-s, mgba, mrboom, mu, mupen64plus_next, mupen64plus_next_gles2, mupen64plus_next_gles3, nekop2, neocd, nestopia, np2kai, nxengine, o2em, oberon, openlara, opera, parallel_n64, pcsx_rearmed, picodrive, play, pocketcdg, pokemini, prboom, prosystem, puae, px68k, quasi88, quicknes, race, reminiscence, sameboy, scummvm, smsplus, snes9x, snes9x2002, snes9x2005, snes9x2005_plus, snes9x2010, squirreljme, stella, stella2014, tgbdual, theodore, thepowdertoy, tic80, tyrquake, uzem, vba_next, vbam, vecx, vemulator, vice_x128, vice_x64, vice_x64sc, vice_xcbm2, vice_xcbm5x0, vice_xpet, vice_xplus4, vice_xscpu64, vice_xvic, virtualjaguar, vitaquake2, x1, xrick, yabause, yabasanshiro

**...and many more!**

Note: some other issues got fixed on the apk only test release 6.0.0-apks so try installing it over the full version as update to fix if there's issue
---

### 💾 How to Get This Update

Simply download the latest release from the assets below! If you love this update, please consider giving us a ⭐ on GitHub!

releases.name: XoDos 5.9.0
releases.body:
🚀 **XoDos** Emulator (arm64) - Major Update!

Welcome to a huge update for XoDos! This release packs a massive punch with refinements across the entire app, from a polished UI to powerful new under-the-hood features for both Wine and the Proot environment. Get ready for a smoother, more compatible, and more controllable experience.

✨** What's New in the App?**

· 🎨 Updated & Fixed App UI: A refreshed and more stable user interface for a better overall experience.
· ⚙️ New Quick-Settings Menu: Added new settings for instant access to install DXVK/D3D and drivers for Wine anywhere, anytime! No more complicated commands.
· 🚀 Termux-X11 Performance Boost: Updated to the latest official code! Now featuring hardware buffer support for significantly improved performance and smoothness.
· 📋 Restored Start Menu & Widgets: The convenient start menu is back! Plus, we've added handy Termux widgets for quicker access.
· 🍷 Wine Bionic Updated: Upgraded to Wine 10.0-rc3 x86_64 for much better application and game compatibility.
· 🔧 Fixed Desktop Scripts: Fixed scripts for both Wine Glibc and Bionic. You can now properly stop the desktop from the settings with the "Stop Desktop" button.
· 🖥️ Fixed Native Desktop Launcher: Resolved a bug in the hardware acceleration mode selector that was incorrectly choosing VIRGL mode for Linux apps.
· 🐛 Fixed Proot Desktop Script: The script for launching the Proot desktop has been fixed and stabilized.
· 🖱️ Fixed External Mouse Support: Improved the mouse capturing method for a more reliable external mouse experience.

---

🪄 What's New in the Proot System?

The integrated Proot environment has received a massive upgrade, turning it into a powerhouse for Windows applications.

· 🍷 Wine 9.17: Added the latest and greatest Wine version (9.17) for cutting-edge support.
· 🤖 New Box64 Integration: Added brand-new Box64 for vastly improved x86_64 Windows game and application support on ARM64 devices!
· 🎯 Experimental Turnip Drivers: Added new Turnip drivers (Mesa RadV). They can be installed via .bat files for now. Once stable, they will be integrated into the quick-settings menu just like Bionic and Glibc.
· ⚡ DXVK & Wined3D Installation: Added the ability to install DXVK and Wined3D directly from .bat files inside the Proot environment, same as the drivers.
· 📊 MS Office Installation Fixed: MS Office can now be installed and fixed anytime directly from the desktop.
· 🎮 Updated OpenGL/Zink: Updated and fixed OpenGL and Zink implementations for better graphics rendering.
· 🔬 Beta VIRGL Drivers: Added VIRGL drivers for both Wine and Linux applications (marked as beta for now).
· ...and more! Various under-the-hood tweaks and fixes for a rock-solid experience.

---

📥 Download now and experience the new level of emulation on ARM64!

Note: check the checksum after downloading to make sure files are successfully downloaded 👇

### **XoDos Emulator 5.8 Special Beta Gaming Edition** 🎮✨  
*Get ready for turbocharged emulation!*  

---

1. **New Native Emulators**: Added `PS1 Avocado` 🥑 + `PPSSPP Modified` 🔄 for next-gen PlayStation & PSP gaming!  
2. **Winlator Integration**: Supercharged `BIONIC CMOD Modified` 🧪 for optimized Windows app/game support!  
3. **Termux Widgets**: Built-in **Termux tools** 📱 directly in-app! No more switching — control everything from XoDos!  
4. **Wine Separation**: Split `Wine Bionic` & `Glibc` into **proot-based installable packages** 📦 (no more conflicts)!  
5. **Wine Bionic Upgrade**: Updated to **Wine 10 Stable** 🍷 (better compatibility + smoother performance)!  
6. **Fixes & Improvements**: Stability boosts 🛠️, speed optimizations ⚡, and under-the-hood magic!

releases.name: XoDos 5.4.0
releases.body:
**XoDos Emulator arm64**
Windows and Linux Emulator
 What's new?
# XoDos  v5.4.0 Release Notes 🚀  
**Performance boosts, critical fixes, and deeper compatibility!**  

---  

## 🛠️ **Fixed & Improved**  
1. **🎧 Fixed Bionic Audio & Scripts**  
   Resolved sound issues and streamlined script execution in Bionic environments.  

2. **🛠️ DXVK Installation Fix**  
   Fixed errors during DXVK setup for **Glibc/Bionic**. Now installs **Windows x64/x32 systems** for seamless x64/x32 game support!  

3. **💻 Proot User Login Fix**  
   No more forced root creation! Smoother terminal operations and reduced errors.  

4. **🖥️ Glibc Start Menu Overhaul**  
   Start menu now includes **all DXVk tools and drivers** for quick access.  

5. **🎮 Glibc DX12 x64 Support**  
   Added experimental **DirectX 12** compatibility for 64-bit systems.  

---  

## ⚙️ **Technical Enhancements**  
1. **🎮 VirGl Improvements for Glibc**  
   Auto-GPU detection and enhanced VirGl rendering support for better graphics performance.  

2. **🍷 Wine Glibc Updated to 9.9**  
   Boosted stability, performance, and compatibility with modern apps/games.  

3. **🔍 Hardware Validation Tweaks**  
   Refined diagnostics for troubleshooting GPU/driver issues.  

---  

## 🌟 **Other Highlights**  
- **📂 Storage Cleaner Optimizations**  
- **⚡ Bionic Driver Script Stability Fixes**  
- **🔄 Linux Subsystem Dependency Checks**  

**...and more!**  
UI polish, script optimizations, and behind-the-scenes magic for a smoother experience.  

---

releases.name: XoDos 5.3.0
releases.body:
New XoDos release for arm64

# XoDos Emulator v5.3.0 Release Notes 🚀
First for some Mali devices that don't support the New virtio drivers and getting black screen at the beginning use this command to fix it 👇
```
mv -f /data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/xodoso /data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/xodos
```

**Experience the next level of emulation with a host of new features, fixes, and optimizations!**  

---

## 🌟 **What's New 🎉**  
1. **🎨 Revamped UI/UX**  
   A sleek, modern interface with improved navigation and accessibility for all users!  

2. **🪟 Pre-Installed Themes**  
   Nostalgia meets modern! Choose from **Windows XP**, **7**, or **11** themes for your XoDos desktop.  

3. **📚 Beginner-Friendly Help Tutorial**  
   New interactive guide to help newcomers dive into XoDos with ease.  

4. **⚙️ Quick Settings for New Users**  
   Simplified settings panel to configure essentials in seconds.  

5. **👥 Dual User Mode for Proot/Kali**  
   Choose between **Root User** or **Normal User** for Kali Desktop and Proot environments.  

6. **🚀 Auto Hardware Acceleration**  
   XoDos Desktop now automatically optimizes performance based on your hardware.  

7. **🐧 Multi-Distro Support**  
   Install and boot **multiple Linux distros** in one environment. Freedom to choose!  

8. **📊 Progress Bar for Install/Restore**  
   Track real-time progress during installations or system restores.  

9. **🛠️ Enhanced Bionic Drivers**  
   Improved DX11 game compatibility (DX12 still experimental).  

10. **🔄 Legacy Glibc Support**  
    Added backward compatibility for devices requiring older drivers.  

11. **🌐 French Language Support**  
    Fully localized UI and documentation for French-speaking users!  

---

## 🛠️ **Fixed & Improved**  
1. **🐛 Installation/Restore Bug Fix**  
   Resolved issues causing failed installations or restores.  

2. **🧹 Storage Cleaner for Wine/Linux**  
   Free up space effortlessly with the new cleanup helper tool.  

3. **✅ Pre-Launch System Checks**  
   XoDos now verifies installed systems before launching Wine/Linux.  

---

## ⚙️ **Technical Enhancements**  
1. **⚡ Updated DXVK Files**  
   Latest DXVK versions for both **Bionic** and **Glibc** environments.  

2. **🎮 New 3D Performance Tests**  
   Replaced outdated Winlator tests with advanced DX11/DX12 diagnostics.  

3. **🔧 Script Optimizations**  
   Smoother execution and stability fixes across Wine/Linux subsystems.  

4. **🧪 Hardware Validation Tools**  
   Added diagnostics to troubleshoot compatibility issues.  

---

**...and more!**  
Smaller tweaks, UI polish, and under-the-hood optimizations for a seamless experience.  

---

We recommend disabling DXVK_HUD if you see artifacts; Switch emulators may also have some glitches fixed by increasing (or decreasing) the resolution, Please note that this all is still experimental

releases.name: Winlator Mali Bionic 1.1
releases.body:
Winlator Mali Bionic v1.1

🚀 New Features

- Added Fake HDR.
- Added a Universal FPS Limiter.
- Added a Sharpness option.
- Added GTA V Optimization toggle in Shortcut Settings.
- Added DXVK Config toggle with built-in pre-made configuration presets.
- Automatically generates a dxvk.conf file for each container based on the selected preset.
- Added new DXVK versions.
- Added the new GameNative Vulkan Wrapper.
- Added new Box64 and FEX presets.

---

🎮 Unreal Engine 3 Preset

- Added a dedicated Unreal Engine 3 preset.
- Tested with X-Men Origins: Wolverine for improved compatibility and performance.

---

⚙️ Hybrid x86 FEXCore

- Added a custom Hybrid x86 FEXCore.

What does it do?

- Improves compatibility while maintaining high performance.
- Fixes physics issues in supported games that normally require x86 Reduced Precision to be completely disabled.

Why is it better?

Normally, disabling x86 Reduced Precision forces software emulation for all x86 code, which can significantly reduce performance.

Hybrid x86 only uses software emulation where it is actually needed (such as physics calculations), while allowing the rest of the game to run natively for much better performance.

Tested Games

- ✅ Assassin's Creed Revelations – Physics issues fixed while using the Performance preset.
- ✅ Assassin's Creed Brotherhood – Physics issues fixed while using the Performance preset.
- ⚠️ Assassin's Creed III – Still requires x86 Reduced Precision to be fully disabled.

«Note: Hybrid x86 improves compatibility for many games but is not a universal solution.»

---

⚡ Improvements

- Improved ImageFS and Wine installation speeds by replacing TZST packages, resulting in significantly faster extraction and setup times.
- Updated various DXVK, Box64, FEX, Vulkan Wrappers, and compatibility presets.
- Improved overall compatibility, stability, and performance across supported games.

---

🛠️ Fixes

- Fixed an issue where Community Configs could fail to import correctly.
- Fixed an issue that could cause normal containers to become corrupted.
- Fixed a crash that occurred when selecting certain VKD3D versions.
- Fixed an issue where enabling APEX Frame Generation could randomly produce visual artifacts during gameplay.
- Fixed an issue where enabling Screen Effects could cause the image to become stretched.
- Fixed an issue where memory was not being released properly after closing the app, causing RAM usage to remain higher than expected.

---

⚠️ Important

- A clean reinstall is required for this release. Existing installations are not supported due to changes in the system files and package format.

---

📝 Additional Changes

- Added numerous other fixes, improvements, optimizations, and internal changes that are not individually listed in this changelog.
- Updated various internal components to improve the overall user experience.
- More game-specific presets, compatibility improvements, and optimizations will continue to be added in future releases.

---

❤️ Special Thanks

- Winlator Bionic — Pipetto-crypto
- Winlator Ludashi — StevenMxz
- Controller Fixes — Vivsi1
- leegao
- BannerHub — the412banner

---

📞 Contact / Support

If you need help, want to report bugs, or would like to support the project:

- Telegram Group: https://t.me/+RDjo9_ORqXgwODc1
- Ko-fi: https://ko-fi.com/gunacharanteja
- UPI (India): gunacharanteja@ybl

Note : Ludashi Apk Has Been Updated Again Solving Incorrect Package Name.

releases.name: Winlator Mali Bionic 1.0 ( Updated Again )
releases.body:
Winlator Mali Bionic v1.0

New Features

- Multiple Vulkan Wrapper Selection — Select between Wrapper, Wrapper-Leegao, and Wrapper V2 on a per-container basis.
- ASTC Transcoding — Native ASTC texture transcoding using a modified version of leegao's bcn_layer with improved performance, memory usage, and stability.
- ETC2 Transcoding — Native ETC2 texture transcoding using a modified version of leegao's bcn_layer with improved performance, memory usage, and stability.
- Apex Frame Generation — Based on Motion Compute Frame Interpolator (MCFI), with additional implementation and optimizations for improved performance, stability, and compatibility. Apex also utilizes GPU resources alongside the game and may impact performance depending on your device.
- Advanced HUD — Enhanced in-game overlay based on Winlator Ludashi's HUD with additional refinements.
- Unified Control System — XInput, DInput, and Exclusive input modes have been unified into a single control system.
- Graphics Driver Manager — Install and manage Vulkan Wrappers and bcn_layer directly from local storage. User-installed drivers automatically take priority over bundled versions.
- Gyro View — Control the in-game camera using your device's gyroscope.
- Revamped Controls UI — Redesigned control icons with a cleaner and more consistent interface.
- Integrated File Manager — File Manager integrated from Winlator Ludashi.
- Improved Shortcut Cards — Redesigned game shortcuts with cover art support.
- Cover Art Manager — Built-in cover art management for game shortcuts.
- Automatic Game Detection — Automatically detects game names from their default executables via Steam.
- Automatic Cover Art Fetching — Automatically downloads cover art from SteamGridDB.
- Community Configs — Native implementation inspired by the original concept by the412banner / Bannerhub.
- Proton 10 ARM64EC by Default — Proton 10 ARM64EC is now the default Wine runtime.
- Wine Component Overrides — Configure DirectInput ("dinput", "dinput8") and "bulletin" to Native directly from Container Settings.
- And More — Additional improvements and optimizations throughout the application.

Notes

- Tested on MediaTek Dimensity 7200.
- The built-in ASTC and ETC2 transcoding modes use a modified version of leegao's original implementation. If you prefer the original version, download it from this release page and import it using Manage Graphics Drivers from the main menu.
- Source Is Released And Updated .

Special Thanks

- Winlator Bionic — Pipetto-crypto
- Winlator Ludashi — StevenMxz
- Vivsi1-Controller Fixes
- leegao
- the412banner / Bannerhub

Contact / Support Me : 

Telegram Group : https://t.me/+RDjo9_ORqXgwODc1

Ko-fi : https://ko-fi.com/gunacharanteja

The Apks Are Updated Again With Minor Bug Fixes And Improvements Please Update ( Recommend Re-install ).

# Added

• Latest Box64 Is Added In Proot Version

• Added Cube D3D & SphereMap 3D Test 

• Added D3D9 Wrapper By ThirteenAG In Start Menu → Install →  WineD3D → Experimental 

• Added Core Fonts

• Added Additional x86 and X64 Visual C Packages

• Added Xna Framework 

• Added An Option To Backup And Import Registry And Saves Of Container 

• Many Other Things Are Also Added 

# New Game Presets 

• Fixed And Added Back Skyrim Game Preset 

• Added Virtua Tennis 3 & 4 Game Preset 

• Added Silent Hill Home Coming Game Preset 

# Changes

• Wine 9.2 Is Added And Made Default In Glibc 

• Game UX Is Disabled By Default ( This Fixes Virtua Tennis 4 And More ) 

• The Fixes Section Has Been Updated 

• Some Games Presets Are Updated 

• Many Other Things Are Changed And Updated 

# Note 

• I Decided To Only Upload Proot_Antutu And Glibc From Now

• Delete The Old Apk And Install The New One 

• Proot Is The Recommended Version 

• Glibc Apk Is Updated Again On Dec 1 2024 . Pls Update

Changes : 

•  Proot Builds Are Now Based On Winlator 8.0 Finally More Compatibility 

• 2.1 Is As Set As The Default GL VERSION

• Disable Vertex Array BGRA Is Disabled By Default 

• Default Gpu Model In Proot Builds Is Now Set To Nvdia GeForce 9800GT So Oblivion Launcher And More Can Detect And Give Settings 

• Box64 Version 0.2.8 From Winlator 7.1 Is Now The Default Version

Added :

• WineD3D 9.20 Added 

• BOX64_MMAP32 Environment Variable Added For Proot Builds

• More Things Are Added Which I Can't Remember Now Sorry 

Updated : 

• Updated The 3D Test ( Use This Instead Cube D3D Test It Is Removed Now )

• Updated VC Redist ( Improves Stability If Installed )

• Prince Of Persia 2008 And Prince Of Persia The Forgotten Sands Game Presets Are Added 

Removed : 

• Lot Of Unnecessary Things Are Removed 

Note : 

• To Fix Audio Issue On PES Games Just Turn Off Wine Esync In Container Settings 

• Skyrim Preset Is Now Removed From Proot Build Because Winlator 8.0 Doesn't Support To Disable Wow64 ( You Can Still Play Skyrim In WinlatorMali 1.8 And 1.7 )

• Delete The Old Apk And Install New One

• Overall Balanced Performance And Improved Compatibility On Proot Builds .

• Proot Is The Recommended Version 

• Glibc Version is Removed On 15 Nov 2024 Will Be Updated Later

releases.name: Horizon V4 - Not Connected fix
releases.body: After minor changes like Box64, Wine (all have almost the same performance), DXVK and Turnip and me not having time to do anything with this project, it's finally getting a "Not Connected" fix related to the usage of /tmp directory on some devices by the termux-x11 library in the app. Should work on Android 15 with this fix as well, people already reported it working

releases.name: Winlator 10.2 (Revision 2 Beta) Glibc unstable - Early Access
releases.body:
[![logo](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/bd81f1a1-2391-4c39-abbd-a42b1f5ef65f)](https://github.com/winebox64/winlator/releases)

# Released for personal use ### Winlator 10.2 (beta) - Now smaller, lighter, and faster! Save storage with optimized app packaged in 130MB and installed in just 1.3GB. - Updated latest DXVK Async (v2.6.1), and **DXVK-II ULL (v2.5.3.94)** focus on ultra low latency ~8ms at 60 FPS, ~4ms at 120 FPS, with slightly lower fps (small performance impact), Improves input responsiveness on NFS: Most Wanted 2012. ![lv_0_20250323083625](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/a0aab4ec-0637-4cd2-a171-8ad5a76d91cb) **Definition:** *What is ULL? Ultra-low latency refers to an extremely short delay or lag between a user's input and the system's response. It's measured in milliseconds (ms) or even nanoseconds (ns).* | *Input Latency* | *Gaming Experience* | *Suitability* | | --- | --- | --- | | 0-30 ms | Excellent | Competitive Gaming | | 30-50 ms | Good | Casual Gaming | | 50-100 ms | Fair | Non-Competitive Play | | 100-200 ms | Poor | Not Recommended | | 200+ ms | Unacceptable | Unplayable | - Updated DXVK HUD scale and opacity options have been added. - Updated 2 new configuration presets are available: `optmx11` for improved graphics and `perfx11` for better performance, the choice is yours. - ZINK_DEBUG has been updated with additional options - Zink Descriptors has been updated with additional options. - Updated components now fixed. - The loading is now way smoother and loads faster! - Updated Screen size resolutions and wider aspect ratio. - Updated FrameRate options - Updated environment variables are now activated by default. ### Winlator 10.0 (beta) - Added missing MPEG-1 gstreamer plugin [#269](https://github.com/brunodev85/winlator/issues/269) - Added workaround for Dino Crisis 1/2 video issues - Updated Box64 (v0.3.4 release).~ - Added native GLIBC for better I/O performance - Minor improvements to Vortek - Improved internal Registry Editor (Speeds up container startup) - Added option to open Android browser from Wine - Added option to use Android clipboard on Wine - Added option to capture pointer on external mouse - Added some network stuff on [Wine](https://github.com/brunodev85/wine-9.2-custom/commit/3437f8ee1617ba97550c96fb2dc4e210420aae93) (Fixes some games startup) - Implemented direct rendering on XServer and [Vulkan WSI X11](https://github.com/brunodev85/mesa3d-custom/blob/main/turnip-25.0.0/src/vulkan/wsi/wsi_common_x11.c) (Turnip). ![animation](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/937e1f8a-2b21-4e26-95a7-37020400bc60) ---- ### ⚠️ **Results can vary based on the device used, environmental conditions, and other factors, such as simultaneous processing, and different processor capabilities.** **If you experience errors or crashes, try changing DXVK, Graphics driver or Box64.*

releases.name: Wrapper + compat + bcn — Mali DX12 + BCn (test build)
releases.body:
# Wrapper + compat + bcn — Mali DX12 + BCn (test build) ⚗️ **Experimental community-test build. This is NOT a stable release and is deliberately not offered by the in-app updater** (no `update.json` asset) — it won't appear as an update for anyone, on the stable or prerelease channel. Sideload it manually. A new **opt-in** graphics driver for **Mali** GPUs that aims to bring **DirectX 12** games *and* keep the BCn texture support you already have — in one dropdown choice. The existing **"Wrapper + bcn_layer"** driver is unchanged and stays selectable. > 💬 **Questions or general feedback?** [**Join the discussion for this build →**](https://github.com/The412Banner/Bannerlator/discussions/145) · Specific bugs still go to a [new issue](https://github.com/The412Banner/Bannerlator/issues/new) **with a `wine_debug.log`**. --- ## 🔄 UPDATE — 2026-07-19 (build `6018c3c8`) Your logs cracked the DX12 problem — **thank you** (kylinzang #136/#137, Noysz #133, OmarGuerguab #143/#144). You correctly pinned it: the first engine reported **Vulkan 1.1** and didn't provide the 1.3 functions games need, so DXVK/VKD3D rejected the GPU before anything else. This build adds a **second engine** you can switch to, which reports **Vulkan 1.3** *and* provides those functions (it also has its own BCn): ### 🎮 To try DX12 games — do this: 1. **Graphics Driver → select "Wrapper + compat + bcn"** (as before). 2. Open its settings and turn **ON** the new switch: **"Use GameNative engine (DX12)"**. 3. Launch a DX12 game. - **Switch OFF** = exactly the old behaviour (BCn textures, no DX12) — nothing changed, so this is safe to leave off. - **Switch ON** = the DX12 engine. Also handles BCn itself, so you don't lose textures. - Still limited to **Valhall Mali (r32p1+)** — on other GPUs the switch does nothing and warns. ### 🪵 The log we need from this test The DX12 engine **prints exactly what it advertised** into the Wine debug log. That single log line tells us whether it worked, so **please send it**: 1. **Settings → Logs →** turn **ON** "**Enable Wine Debug**". 2. Turn the **"Use GameNative engine (DX12)"** switch ON, launch a DX12 game, let it fail or succeed, close it. 3. Attach **`wine_debug.log`** to your report — the lines we need start with **`[WRAPPER_DIAG]`** (they show the Vulkan version and driver it reported). Also attach the game's `_dxgi.log` / `_d3d11.log` if present. ### 📝 What changed since the last build (`2c20cfa` → `6018c3c8`) - **NEW: "Use GameNative engine (DX12)" toggle** on the "Wrapper + compat + bcn" driver — the actual DX12 path. Off = the previous behaviour (leegao layers, BCn only), unchanged. On = the GameNative engine (Vulkan 1.3 + provides the missing functions + its own BCn). Valhall Mali (r32p1+) only; warns and does nothing elsewhere. - **NEW: `[WRAPPER_DIAG]` diagnostic logging** is auto-enabled when that toggle is on, so your `wine_debug.log` shows exactly what the engine advertised (the line we need to confirm it worked). - **FIX: DXVK version picker** now lists **all** DXVK versions (incl. 1.10.3) even when a VKD3D version is selected — but **only** for this Mali driver, so the DXVK-1.x workaround is reachable (#137). Other drivers keep the previous filter. - Everything from the first `mali-compat-test1` build (the leegao BCn + compat driver) is still here — this build is a superset. --- ## 🐛 Found a bug? Please report it — **WITH A LOG** ### ➡️ [**Report a bug for this build**](https://github.com/The412Banner/Bannerlator/issues/new?title=%5Bmali-compat-test1%5D%20Bug%3A%20&body=%2A%2ADevice%2A%2A%3A%20%0A%2A%2AMali%20GPU%20%2B%20driver%2A%2A%20(e.g.%20Mali-G57%2C%20r32p1)%3A%20%0A%2A%2AGameNative%20engine%20switch%20ON%3F%2A%2A%3A%20%0A%2A%2AGame%2A%2A%3A%20%0A%2A%2AWhat%20happened%2A%2A%3A%20%0A%2A%2ALog%20attached%20(wine_debug.log%20with%20%5BWRAPPER_DIAG%5D)%2A%2A%3A%20) · [browse existing reports](https://github.com/The412Banner/Bannerlator/issues) Your reports are the only way this gets proven on real hardware. **Please include `wine_debug.log`** — a report without one is very hard to act on. ## 📥 Downloads (pick your flavor) | Flavor | File | |---|---| | Standard | `Bannerlator-mali-gamenative-toggle-standard.apk` | | Ludashi | `Bannerlator-mali-gamenative-toggle-ludashi.apk` | | PUBG | `Bannerlator-mali-gamenative-toggle-pubg.apk` | Version `2.6.2` (vc45) — same code signature as stable, so it installs over 2.6.2 in place. To go back, reinstall the stable 2.6.2 APK. ## ✔ Which devices - **DX12 (either engine):** Valhall Mali on driver r32p1+ — G57, G68, G77, G78, G310, G610, G710, G615, G715, G720, G925 (and Immortalis-G715/G720/G925). On other GPUs the DX12 path stays off and warns; **BCn texture support still works** on any non-Qualcomm Mali. - **Adreno / Qualcomm: unaffected.** The driver is opt-in and hard-gated off on Qualcomm. Every existing driver is untouched.
🆕 A preview of what's coming in the next stable — new since 2.6.2 (aside from the Mali driver) — click to expand **A sample — not the full list —** of the work already lined up for the **upcoming stable release**. These landed on the main line after 2.6.2 and are unrelated to the Mali driver; this test build is simply based on that work: - **Polished launch & shutdown experience** — a cold-start splash and a game-hero loading overlay (with a Cancel-launch button), plus a proper neon shutdown screen. - **Per-game Vulkan settings** — **Native Rendering**, **Colors (RGBA/BGRA)**, and **present mode** can now be set per game (shortcut), overriding the container default. - **Community-config sharing for those Vulkan settings** — native / Colors / present mode now travel with shared and imported game configs. - **Native Rendering (direct-scanout) hardening** — a file-descriptor leak fixed, a single-window guard, and the inert present-mode dropdown is greyed while Native is on. GL (OpenGL) Native Rendering is disabled for now (Vulkan-only) as it was unstable. - **Perf HUD fix** — the in-game performance HUD no longer disappears when a game swaps render windows. - **Cleanup** — removed the vestigial "Renderer Driver" dropdown from Vulkan Settings.
## 🙏 Credits - **GameNative** — the DX12-on-Mali wrapper engine this build switches to. - **leegao** — `bcn_layer`, `compat_layer`, and the `bionic-vulkan-wrapper` base. - **Mali testers** (kylinzang, Noysz, OmarGuerguab, and everyone reporting) — you diagnosed the DX12 wall and are the only way this gets proven on real hardware. _Nothing here is merged to the stable line; results from this test decide whether it ships._

releases.name: Bannerlator 2.6.2
releases.body:
# Bannerlator 2.6.2 Run Windows apps and games on Android — no PC and no root required. **2.6.2 is a fixes-and-hardening update.** No new headline system — this one sharpens what's already here. The **in-game performance HUD** got a ground-up hardening pass (one shared FPS source, device-complete metric readers, and a new overlay style), **component downloads** now keep going when you leave the app, and a batch of reported bugs are fixed. Like the last several releases it's **entirely app-side** — **no ImageFS reinstall** — your containers, themes, custom accent and per-game settings all carry over untouched. Just install over 2.6.
✨ Full feature list — click to expand everything Bannerlator offers Everything the app offers, at a glance. **🍷 Windows compatibility** - **Wine** — run native Win32/Win64 apps & games. - **Box64 / Box86** x86(-64)→ARM translation with performance presets. - **WOWBox64** for arm64ec containers. - **FEXCore** alt x86/x64 backend, with automatic unixlib (`.so`) matching per version. - **arm64ec** and **x64** container support. **🎨 Graphics & translation layers** - **DXVK** (DX8/9/10/11→Vulkan; GPLAsync & Sarek variants). - **VKD3D-Proton** (DX12→Vulkan). - **WineD3D / DirectDraw** OpenGL fallback for older titles. - **Proton bionic** layers (via GameNative) — **Proton 11.0-1** & **Proton 10.0-4** (arm64ec; FEX-unixlib + fast-yield), per-SDK (28 / 35). - **VEGAS** — Adreno-optimized DXVK (less stutter, real-time upscaling). - **Turnip / Mesa** Adreno drivers (+timeline-semaphore patches; `turnip-26.1.0` as a direct ICD for Android 10 / pre-11). - **BCn transcoding for Mali / Xclipse** — "Wrapper + bcn_layer" driver + BCn settings panel (plus experimental "Wrapper-gamenative"). **🖥️ Renderers** - **Vulkan / OpenGL / SurfaceFlinger / VirGL** host renderers. - **SurfaceFlinger colour fix** — R/B-swap + crash fix, per-container/game toggle. - **Native Rendering (Low-Latency Mode)** — direct-scanout, cuts input lag (Vulkan & OpenGL). - **Spatial upscalers** — SGSR, FSR / FSR-Fit, NIS, Sharpen (RCAS), Linear / Nearest; live in-game, saved per game. - **Fullscreen aspect modes** — Off / Fit / Stretch / Fill / Integer, live switch, per game. - **Supersampling** — 1.25× / 1.5× / 2× render scale, Lanczos-2 downsample. - **Screen effects** (Vulkan & OpenGL) — FXAA, Toon, CRT, NTSC, colour grading, CAS, fake-HDR. - **Debanding (Vulkan)** — adjustable dither pass for smooth gradients. - **ReShade** — real `.fx` effects on DXVK / VKD3D, on-device compile, ~100-effect catalog + your own, live in-game tab, per game, solo or stacked. - **VRR** — match refresh to FPS (Auto or 60 / 90 / 120 / 144 Hz), all three renderers. - Adjustable resolution & frame-rate limit. **🎞️ Frame generation & pacing** - **Two engines** — Off / **bionic-fg** (bundled) / **lsfg-vk** (bring your own `Lossless.dll`), shown as a badge in-game. - **Live controls** — Off / 2× / 3× / 4× + flow-scale slider, hot-reloaded. - **Standalone FPS limiter** — engine-independent present-pacing cap with quick 30 / 60 / 90 / 120 presets; steps aside when lsfg multiplies; both renderers. **📦 Containers** - Multiple isolated Wine containers with redesigned spec-chip cards. - **Run as administrator** (per-container toggle) for installers/games needing elevation. - **Auto-close on game exit** (per-container toggle). - **Import / export** containers. - Per-container Wine / driver / DXVK / VKD3D / Box64 / drives / Z-drive / env-vars, with env-var **presets**. - **Desktop wallpaper picker** (per-container or global). - **Compatibility Layers download menu** — browse / install / remove every component with progress bars, now continuing in the background. **🕹️ Games, shortcuts & input** - Game library (grid / list, sort, filters) with redesigned cards. - Add shortcuts from storage; **back up / restore saves** (GameHub-compatible zips). - **SteamGridDB** cover scraping; per-game language / locale. - **On-screen touch controls** (theme-follow or per-game colour) + virtual gamepads. - **Physical controllers** (SDL2) + touchpad / mouse emulation; rebuilt binding screen. **🌐 Community Configs** - **Catalog browser** (globe) with search, filters, sort, and "Matches my device". - **One-tap Apply** — surgically merges just that config's settings, preserving the rest. - **Smart install** of a config's missing DXVK / VKD3D / FEXCore / Turnip, then auto-applies. - **Config detail** — provenance, what-it-sets, before-apply diff, upvotes / downloads / comments. - **Share your own** — export the full recipe (never your files, logins or tuning), anonymous by default; **My uploads** to edit / delete. - **Optional account** (username + password, recovery-key, no email) so uploads follow you and carry your name — everything works anonymously without it. - **Read-only for your setup** — nothing changes unless you tap Apply. **🛒 Built-in stores & cross-store Download Manager** - **Steam** — user/pass or QR, owned library, built-in depot engine (JavaSteam), 4-tier speed, session hardening, DLC picker, true-size fix, optional **Goldberg** patch. - **Epic / Amazon** — sign in, browse, download / install / launch (incl. Epic free games). - **GOG** — DRM-free library with cloud-save sync. - **⬇ Cross-store Download Manager** — one view of all downloads + installed library, live progress, background + shade notifications, launch / verified uninstall. **🔒 Security & your store accounts** - Third-party sign-ins (not affiliated with the stores) — **use at your own risk**. - **Credentials redacted from logs** — signed URLs, OAuth codes, GOG secret / refresh-token, account IDs — in logcat and shareable files. **🧰 Bundled Start-menu utilities** - **WFM**, **AIO Graphics Test**, **Game Controller Test**; `.lnk` "Start in" working-directory support. **🎛️ Interface & in-game overlay** - **Jetpack Compose** UI with an icon-led drawer; your theme recolours the whole app *and* the in-game drawer. - **16 themes** + HSV custom-accent picker. - In-game overlay drawer + Task Manager (works on any renderer). - **File Manager with Favorites** — storage-badged, real thumbnails, doubles as the universal import picker. - **Performance HUD — three overlay styles** (Classic / GameHub / GameNative-style with live graphs), one shared FPS source + device-complete metrics (FPS / frame time / CPU-GPU load & temp / RAM / battery / power), accent outline, position saved per game. - **FEX runtime indicator** — live arm64ec vs x86-64, translator, and unixlib vs DLL. **📥 Builds & distribution** - Three flavors (standard / PuBG / Ludashi), optimized release builds, AOSP-testkey signed, GitHub Actions CI + tagged releases.
## ✨ What's New ### 🎛️ In-game HUD — hardened + a new overlay style The performance HUD got a ground-up pass: - **One shared FPS source** — every overlay style now reads the *same* number (they could drift before). - **Device-complete metric readers** — GPU load, CPU / GPU temperatures, RAM, battery / power were rewritten with proper vendor discovery, so values that used to read **0% on many non-Adreno GPUs** now populate correctly. - **A new third overlay** — a **GameNative-style HUD** with live graphs (compact pill or stacked list), alongside the Classic and GameHub styles, switchable **live in-game**. - **Polish** — the config UI moved to compact chips in an aligned grid; the outline is now a **slider-controlled accent border** matching your theme; the FPS limiter gained quick **30 / 60 / 90 / 120** presets; and the GPU-model row shows a clean chip name (e.g. `Adreno 750`) instead of the raw driver string. ### ⬇️ Component downloads keep going in the background Downloading a large compatibility layer (Proton, DXVK, box64, FEXCore, rootfs) no longer stops when you **minimize or lock** the phone — it continues via a foreground service with a **shade notification**, and **resumes** if interrupted. *(Thanks [@kylinzang](https://github.com/kylinzang) — [#122](https://github.com/The412Banner/Bannerlator/issues/122).)* ### 🔧 Fixes - **DXVK + VKD3D** — the container editor no longer lets you pair a **DXVK 1.x** build with VKD3D. They're binary-incompatible (DXVK 1.x's `dxgi` can't back VKD3D-Proton), which used to fail the DX12 path silently. *(Thanks [@GmoLargey](https://github.com/GmoLargey) — [#113](https://github.com/The412Banner/Bannerlator/issues/113).)* - **WOWBox64 label** — on **arm64ec** containers the per-game editor now correctly labels the x86 backend **"WOWBox64"** instead of "Box64". *(Thanks [@railexcatapangdiaz-ux](https://github.com/railexcatapangdiaz-ux) — [#111](https://github.com/The412Banner/Bannerlator/issues/111).)* - **HUD** — the Classic overlay no longer shows both orientations when you toggle a metric, and no longer resizes on toggle; **power draw** now reads correctly on devices (Xiaomi / Poco) whose battery-current sign is inverted. *(Thanks to Discord user **devaspe** for the reports.)* - Guarded a **failed component install** from reporting success. ### 🔐 Run games as administrator New per-container **"Run as administrator"** toggle (on by default) for installers and games that need elevation. ## 🌐 Community — thank you 🙏 Everything you've shared **directly to Bannerlator's own Community Config repo** now adds up to:

   

And because the in-app browser **also merges the BannerHub catalog**, the full set you can browse and one-tap-apply *inside the app* is bigger still:

 

**166 games** and **184 configs** shared straight to Bannerlator by **252** of you — and **2,257 games / 1,548 configs** usable in-app once the BannerHub catalog is merged in. All of it growing. Every config you share, every game you add, every account that joins makes this better for the next person. **This project grows *only* because of the community's support and participation — thank you.** - 📦 **Bannerlator config repo** — [github.com/The412Banner/bannerlator-game-configs](https://github.com/The412Banner/bannerlator-game-configs) - 📦 **BannerHub catalog** (also browsable in-app) — [github.com/The412Banner/bannerhub-game-configs](https://github.com/The412Banner/bannerhub-game-configs) - 🌐 **Browse online** — [the412banner.github.io/bannerlator-game-configs](https://the412banner.github.io/bannerlator-game-configs/) ## 📥 Downloads | Variant | File | |---|---| | **Standard** | `Bannerlator-2.6.2-standard.apk` | | **PUBG** | `Bannerlator-2.6.2-pubg.apk` | | **Ludashi** | `Bannerlator-2.6.2-ludashi.apk` | > ℹ️ **Updating in-app?** 2.6.2 is **entirely app-side** — the standard APK covers everything. There's **no ImageFS reinstall**: your containers, themes, custom accent, per-game settings and control colours all carry over. Just install over 2.6. ## 🙏 Credits - **[GameNative](https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative)** — the new **GameNative-style HUD overlay** in this release is adapted from their `PerformanceHudView`, and the hardened, device-complete metric readers build directly on their GPU/thermal/battery coverage work. *(Bannerlator's Vulkan `AHardwareBuffer` present path, the standalone FPS-limiter mechanism, and the SurfaceFlinger colour fix also come from / were cross-examined against GameNative.)* Huge thanks to the GameNative team. - **Reports & requests this cycle** — [@kylinzang](https://github.com/kylinzang) ([#122](https://github.com/The412Banner/Bannerlator/issues/122)), [@GmoLargey](https://github.com/GmoLargey) ([#113](https://github.com/The412Banner/Bannerlator/issues/113)), [@railexcatapangdiaz-ux](https://github.com/railexcatapangdiaz-ux) ([#111](https://github.com/The412Banner/Bannerlator/issues/111)), and Discord user **devaspe** (HUD dual-orientation & power-reading reports). - **The wider stack** — built on the Winlator → cmod → Star Bionic lineage ([brunodev85](https://github.com/brunodev85/winlator), [coffincolors](https://github.com/coffincolors/winlator), [Pipetto-crypto](https://github.com/Pipetto-crypto/winlator), [star-emu](https://github.com/star-emu/star)) with DXVK, VKD3D-Proton, Box64, FEXCore, [JavaSteam](https://github.com/Longi94/JavaSteam) and [leegao](https://github.com/leegao)'s bcn_layer. Full attribution in the [repo README](https://github.com/The412Banner/Bannerlator#-credits). ## 🔗 Notes - Fixes-and-hardening release — no new subsystem, and nothing about your existing containers or settings changes on update.

releases.name: Bannerlator 2.6.1
releases.body:
# Bannerlator 2.6.1 Run Windows apps and games on Android — no PC and no root required. **2.6.1 is a small hotfix-and-tweak release on top of 2.6.** The headline is an **Adreno graphics fix**: on 2.5 and later, some **Adreno (Qualcomm)** devices saw everything run slower and heavy titles like **Skyrim AE stop launching entirely** — a BC-texture (BCn) transcode meant only for **Mali / Xclipse** GPUs was being forced on Adreno too, where BCn is already handled in hardware, so it was pure wasted work. It's now switched **off on Adreno** (Mali / Xclipse behaviour is completely unchanged). Two small tweaks round it out. Like the last few releases this is an **entirely app-side** update — **no ImageFS reinstall** — your containers, themes, custom accent and per-game settings all carry over untouched. Just install over 2.6.
✨ Full feature list — click to expand everything Bannerlator offers Everything the app offers, at a glance. **🍷 Windows compatibility** - **Wine** — run native Win32/Win64 apps & games. - **Box64 / Box86** x86(-64)→ARM translation with performance presets. - **WOWBox64** for arm64ec containers. - **FEXCore** alt x86/x64 backend, with automatic unixlib (`.so`) matching per version. - **arm64ec** and **x64** container support. **🎨 Graphics & translation layers** - **DXVK** (DX8/9/10/11→Vulkan; GPLAsync & Sarek variants). - **VKD3D-Proton** (DX12→Vulkan). - **WineD3D / DirectDraw** OpenGL fallback for older titles. - **Proton bionic** layers (via GameNative) — **Proton 11.0-1** & **new Proton 10.0-4** (arm64ec; FEX-unixlib + fast-yield), per-SDK (28 / 35). - **VEGAS** — Adreno-optimized DXVK (less stutter, real-time upscaling). - **Turnip / Mesa** Adreno drivers (+timeline-semaphore patches; `turnip-26.1.0` as a direct ICD for Android 10 / pre-11). - **BCn transcoding for Mali / Xclipse** — "Wrapper + bcn_layer" driver + BCn settings panel (plus experimental "Wrapper-gamenative"). **🖥️ Renderers** - **Vulkan / OpenGL / SurfaceFlinger / VirGL** host renderers. - **SurfaceFlinger colour fix** — R/B-swap + crash fix, per-container/game toggle. - **Native Rendering (Low-Latency Mode)** — direct-scanout, cuts input lag (Vulkan & OpenGL). - **Spatial upscalers** — SGSR, FSR / FSR-Fit, NIS, Sharpen (RCAS), Linear / Nearest; live in-game, saved per game. - **Fullscreen aspect modes** — Off / Fit / Stretch / Fill / Integer, live switch, per game. - **Supersampling** — 1.25× / 1.5× / 2× render scale, Lanczos-2 downsample. - **Screen effects** (Vulkan & OpenGL) — FXAA, Toon, CRT, NTSC, colour grading, CAS, fake-HDR. - **Debanding (Vulkan)** — adjustable dither pass for smooth gradients. - **ReShade** — real `.fx` effects on DXVK / VKD3D, on-device compile, ~100-effect catalog + your own, live in-game tab, per game, solo or stacked. - **VRR** — match refresh to FPS (Auto or 60 / 90 / 120 / 144 Hz), all three renderers. - Adjustable resolution & frame-rate limit. **🎞️ Frame generation & pacing** - **Two engines** — Off / **bionic-fg** (bundled) / **lsfg-vk** (bring your own `Lossless.dll`), shown as a badge in-game. - **Live controls** — Off / 2× / 3× / 4× + flow-scale slider, hot-reloaded. - **Standalone FPS limiter** — engine-independent present-pacing cap; steps aside when lsfg multiplies; both renderers. **📦 Containers** - Multiple isolated Wine containers with redesigned spec-chip cards. - **Auto-close on game exit** (per-container toggle). - **Import / export** containers. - Per-container Wine / driver / DXVK / VKD3D / Box64 / drives / Z-drive / env-vars, with env-var **presets**. - **Desktop wallpaper picker** (per-container or global). - **Compatibility Layers download menu** — browse / install / remove every component with progress bars. **🕹️ Games, shortcuts & input** - Game library (grid / list, sort, filters) with redesigned cards. - Add shortcuts from storage; **back up / restore saves** (GameHub-compatible zips). - **SteamGridDB** cover scraping; per-game language / locale. - **On-screen touch controls** (theme-follow or per-game colour) + virtual gamepads. - **Physical controllers** (SDL2) + touchpad / mouse emulation; rebuilt binding screen. **🌐 Community Configs** - **Catalog browser** (globe) with search, filters, sort, and "Matches my device". - **One-tap Apply** — surgically merges just that config's settings, preserving the rest. - **Smart install** of a config's missing DXVK / VKD3D / FEXCore / Turnip, then auto-applies. - **Config detail** — provenance, what-it-sets, before-apply diff, upvotes / downloads / comments. - **Share your own** — export the full recipe (never your files, logins or tuning), anonymous by default; **My uploads** to edit / delete. - **Optional account** (username + password, recovery-key, no email) so uploads follow you and carry your name — everything works anonymously without it. - **Read-only for your setup** — nothing changes unless you tap Apply. **🛒 Built-in stores & cross-store Download Manager** - **Steam** — user/pass or QR, owned library, built-in depot engine (JavaSteam), 4-tier speed, session hardening, DLC picker, true-size fix, optional **Goldberg** patch. - **Epic / Amazon** — sign in, browse, download / install / launch (incl. Epic free games). - **GOG** — DRM-free library with cloud-save sync. - **⬇ Cross-store Download Manager** — one view of all downloads + installed library, live progress, background + shade notifications, launch / verified uninstall. **🔒 Security & your store accounts** - Third-party sign-ins (not affiliated with the stores) — **use at your own risk**. - **Credentials redacted from logs** — signed URLs, OAuth codes, GOG secret / refresh-token, account IDs — in logcat and shareable files. **🧰 Bundled Start-menu utilities** - **WFM**, **AIO Graphics Test**, **Game Controller Test**; `.lnk` "Start in" working-directory support. **🎛️ Interface & in-game overlay** - **Jetpack Compose** UI with an icon-led drawer; your theme recolours the whole app *and* the in-game drawer. - **16 themes** + HSV custom-accent picker. - In-game overlay drawer + Task Manager (works on any renderer). - **File Manager with Favorites** — storage-badged, real thumbnails, doubles as the universal import picker. - **Performance HUD** — FPS / frame time / CPU-GPU temp / RAM, position saved per game. - **FEX runtime indicator** — live arm64ec vs x86-64, translator, and unixlib vs DLL. **📥 Builds & distribution** - Three flavors (standard / PuBG / Ludashi), optimized release builds, AOSP-testkey signed, GitHub Actions CI + tagged releases.
## ✨ What's New ### 🟣 Adreno: BCn transcode no longer forced — fix The integrated-wrapper BCn emulation (`WRAPPER_EMULATE_BCN`) was being emitted for **every** GPU vendor, but the BCn-aware wrapper builds shipped since 2.5 (**Wrapper-leegao** / **Wrapper-gamenative**) act on it — so on **Adreno 7xx** it forced a pointless per-texture transcode of formats the GPU already reads natively. The result on Adreno since 2.5: **global slowdown** and **BC-heavy DX11 games (e.g. Skyrim AE) failing to launch**. - It's now gated **off on Qualcomm (`0x5143`)** across the auto / full / default paths, mirroring the existing `bcn_layer` and compute-decode vendor guards. - **Mali / Xclipse / PowerVR behaviour is untouched** — the entire point of the 2.5 Mali hardening work still stands; only Adreno stops doing the redundant transcode. - Diagnosed from an **Adreno-750 / Snapdragon 8 Gen 3** report. If you're on Adreno and rolled back to 2.4 because 2.5+ was slow or wouldn't launch your games, **this is your fix.** ### 🔗 "Add to Shortcuts" for `.exe` files — new The built-in **File Manager** gains an **Add to Shortcuts** action on any `.exe`, so you can turn an executable straight into a game shortcut without going through the container editor. ### 🎮 Community-config XInput round-trips correctly — fix A shared config's **XInput** setting is a bitmask, not a plain on/off flag — it was being written back as `1/0`, so applying certain shared configs could land the wrong controller mode. It now round-trips faithfully. ### 🍷 New Proton 10.0-4 layer — available in-app A new **Proton 10.0-4** bionic compatibility layer is now downloadable from the in-app component list — **arm64ec**, with FEX-unixlib support and fast-yield, freshly rebuilt to be **~3× smaller and faster to install** (stripped + zstd, ~88 MB). Grab it under **Container → Wine/Proton**, pick **SDK 28** (Android 9) or **SDK 35** (Android 15), and run it on FEXCore. No app update or ImageFS reinstall needed. Prefer a manual install? Download the `.wcp` directly from the [**build-p10-20260713**](https://github.com/The412Banner/proton-wine/releases/tag/build-p10-20260713) release.
Previously in 2.6 — Community Config Sharing + optional accounts 2.6 completed **Community Configs**: 2.5.2 gave you the browse-and-apply half, and 2.6 added the other half — **share your own working setups**, locally or online, straight from the same Community Configs menu. Sharing captures your **entire per-game setup** (38 of 39 shortcut settings — the full DXVK/VKD3D config, graphics, emulator, wrapper incl. **VEGAS**, Turnip driver and input), and a brand-new **optional account system** (username + password, one-time recovery key, **no email**) lets your uploads follow you across devices and carry your name — everything still works anonymously without one. Also entirely app-side, **no ImageFS reinstall**. *(Includes a community VEGAS-dialog improvement from [isygold](https://github.com/isygold) — [#84](https://github.com/The412Banner/Bannerlator/pull/84).)*
## 📥 Downloads | Variant | File | |---|---| | **Standard** | `Bannerlator-2.6.1-standard.apk` | | **PUBG** | `Bannerlator-2.6.1-pubg.apk` | | **Ludashi** | `Bannerlator-2.6.1-ludashi.apk` | > ℹ️ **Updating in-app?** 2.6.1 is **entirely app-side** — the standard APK covers everything. There's **no ImageFS reinstall**: your containers, themes, custom accent, per-game settings and control colours all carry over. Just install over 2.6. ## 🔗 Notes - Small hotfix-and-tweak release. The Adreno BCn change only affects **Qualcomm** GPUs; Mali / Xclipse / PowerVR paths are byte-for-byte unchanged. Nothing about your existing containers or settings changes on update.

releases.name: Bannerlator 2.6
releases.body:
# Bannerlator 2.6 Run Windows apps and games on Android — no PC and no root required. **2.6 completes Community Configs.** 2.5.2 gave you the browse-and-apply half; 2.6 adds the other half — **share your own working setups**, both **locally and online**, right from the same Community Configs menu. Sharing now captures **your entire per-game setup** (not just the core versions), and there's a brand-new **optional account system** so your uploads can follow you across devices and carry your name. Like the last few releases this is an **entirely app-side** update — **no ImageFS reinstall** — your containers, themes, custom accent and per-game settings all carry over untouched. Just install over 2.5.2.

> 🌐 **Browse the community config library on the web:** [**the412banner.github.io/bannerlator-game-configs**](https://the412banner.github.io/bannerlator-game-configs/) — search everything shared from Bannerlator by game and device, compare side by side, and (signed in with your app account) manage your own uploads.
✨ Full feature list — click to expand everything Bannerlator offers Everything the app offers, at a glance. **🍷 Windows compatibility** - **Wine** — run native Win32/Win64 apps & games. - **Box64 / Box86** x86(-64)→ARM translation with performance presets. - **WOWBox64** for arm64ec containers. - **FEXCore** alt x86/x64 backend, with automatic unixlib (`.so`) matching per version. - **arm64ec** and **x64** container support. **🎨 Graphics & translation layers** - **DXVK** (DX8/9/10/11→Vulkan; GPLAsync & Sarek variants). - **VKD3D-Proton** (DX12→Vulkan). - **WineD3D / DirectDraw** OpenGL fallback for older titles. - **Proton bionic** layers (via GameNative) — incl. **Proton 11.0-1** arm64ec & x86-64, per-SDK (28 / 35). - **VEGAS** — Adreno-optimized DXVK (less stutter, real-time upscaling). - **Turnip / Mesa** Adreno drivers (+timeline-semaphore patches; `turnip-26.1.0` as a direct ICD for Android 10 / pre-11). - **BCn transcoding for Mali / Xclipse** — "Wrapper + bcn_layer" driver + BCn settings panel (plus experimental "Wrapper-gamenative"). **🖥️ Renderers** - **Vulkan / OpenGL / SurfaceFlinger / VirGL** host renderers. - **SurfaceFlinger colour fix** — R/B-swap + crash fix, per-container/game toggle. - **Native Rendering (Low-Latency Mode)** — direct-scanout, cuts input lag (Vulkan & OpenGL). - **Spatial upscalers** — SGSR, FSR / FSR-Fit, NIS, Sharpen (RCAS), Linear / Nearest; live in-game, saved per game. - **Fullscreen aspect modes** — Off / Fit / Stretch / Fill / Integer, live switch, per game. - **Supersampling** — 1.25× / 1.5× / 2× render scale, Lanczos-2 downsample. - **Screen effects** (Vulkan & OpenGL) — FXAA, Toon, CRT, NTSC, colour grading, CAS, fake-HDR. - **Debanding (Vulkan)** — adjustable dither pass for smooth gradients. - **ReShade** — real `.fx` effects on DXVK / VKD3D, on-device compile, ~100-effect catalog + your own, live in-game tab, per game, solo or stacked. - **VRR** — match refresh to FPS (Auto or 60 / 90 / 120 / 144 Hz), all three renderers. - Adjustable resolution & frame-rate limit. **🎞️ Frame generation & pacing** - **Two engines** — Off / **bionic-fg** (bundled) / **lsfg-vk** (bring your own `Lossless.dll`), shown as a badge in-game. - **Live controls** — Off / 2× / 3× / 4× + flow-scale slider, hot-reloaded. - **Standalone FPS limiter** — engine-independent present-pacing cap; steps aside when lsfg multiplies; both renderers. **📦 Containers** - Multiple isolated Wine containers with redesigned spec-chip cards. - **Auto-close on game exit** (per-container toggle). - **Import / export** containers. - Per-container Wine / driver / DXVK / VKD3D / Box64 / drives / Z-drive / env-vars, with env-var **presets**. - **Desktop wallpaper picker** (per-container or global). - **Compatibility Layers download menu** — browse / install / remove every component with progress bars. **🕹️ Games, shortcuts & input** - Game library (grid / list, sort, filters) with redesigned cards. - Add shortcuts from storage; **back up / restore saves** (GameHub-compatible zips). - **SteamGridDB** cover scraping; per-game language / locale. - **On-screen touch controls** (theme-follow or per-game colour) + virtual gamepads. - **Physical controllers** (SDL2) + touchpad / mouse emulation; rebuilt binding screen. **🌐 Community Configs** - **Catalog browser** (globe) with search, filters, sort, and "Matches my device". - **One-tap Apply** — surgically merges just that config's settings, preserving the rest. - **Smart install** of a config's missing DXVK / VKD3D / FEXCore / Turnip, then auto-applies. - **Config detail** — provenance, what-it-sets, before-apply diff, upvotes / downloads / comments. - **Share your own** — export the full recipe (never your files, logins or tuning), anonymous by default; **My uploads** to edit / delete. - **Optional account** (username + password, recovery-key, no email) so uploads follow you and carry your name — everything works anonymously without it. - **Read-only for your setup** — nothing changes unless you tap Apply. **🛒 Built-in stores & cross-store Download Manager** - **Steam** — user/pass or QR, owned library, built-in depot engine (JavaSteam), 4-tier speed, session hardening, DLC picker, true-size fix, optional **Goldberg** patch. - **Epic / Amazon** — sign in, browse, download / install / launch (incl. Epic free games). - **GOG** — DRM-free library with cloud-save sync. - **⬇ Cross-store Download Manager** — one view of all downloads + installed library, live progress, background + shade notifications, launch / verified uninstall. **🔒 Security & your store accounts** - Third-party sign-ins (not affiliated with the stores) — **use at your own risk**. - **Credentials redacted from logs** — signed URLs, OAuth codes, GOG secret / refresh-token, account IDs — in logcat and shareable files. **🧰 Bundled Start-menu utilities** - **WFM**, **AIO Graphics Test**, **Game Controller Test**; `.lnk` "Start in" working-directory support. **🎛️ Interface & in-game overlay** - **Jetpack Compose** UI with an icon-led drawer; your theme recolours the whole app *and* the in-game drawer. - **16 themes** + HSV custom-accent picker. - In-game overlay drawer + Task Manager (works on any renderer). - **File Manager with Favorites** — storage-badged, real thumbnails, doubles as the universal import picker. - **Performance HUD** — FPS / frame time / CPU-GPU temp / RAM, position saved per game. - **FEX runtime indicator** — live arm64ec vs x86-64, translator, and unixlib vs DLL. **📥 Builds & distribution** - Three flavors (standard / PuBG / Ludashi), optimized release builds, AOSP-testkey signed, GitHub Actions CI + tagged releases.
## ✨ What's New ### 🌐 Community Config Sharing — new You can now **share your own configs** straight from the Community Configs browser. Export a game's working settings and either keep them locally or **upload them for the community** in a couple of taps — anonymously by default.
