Fixes "unsupported video card" refusals (e.g. CryEngine — Crysis 2). | | **Legacy renderer (GLES2) toggle** | Per-game opt-in to the proven 6.0.2 GLES2-era `libxserver.so`/`libwinemu.so` pair for games that regressed under 6.0.4's Vulkan X-server rewrite. Default New = stock, zero patch effect. | | **Strict per-game settings store** | GPU Spoof / Legacy renderer / PC Vibration each save strictly per-game in BannerHub's own store with explicit Save/Cancel — no host clobber, no app-wide leak; resolved across the `:wine` process boundary. | | **Show PC Game Settings row** | Keeps the per-game **PC game settings** row visible in Explorer view (XiaoJi's UX hid it for Steam-linked games). | | **Privacy hardening** | Upstream telemetry/analytics channels stripped at the bytecode level (Firebase Analytics/Crashlytics, GMS Measurement, Mob Push, heartbeat, OTA, Ad-ID, cert-pinning override, etc.). Full list + honest leftovers in `PRIVACY.md`. | | **Change app icon** | BannerHub v6 branding — adaptive icon, Wine container header, auth/splash assets. | | **Change package & app name** *(per variant)* | Per-variant package + launcher label so all 9 variants install side-by-side (`Original` keeps `com.xiaoji.egggame`). | | **Lite size-reduction strips** *(Lite only)* | Strips the dead 20 MB font, Aliyun carrier-login lib, Haima cloud-gaming stack, and AVIF/HEIC codecs. ~34.5 MB smaller; no effect on full variants. | *Per-patch mechanics, smali anchors, and version-by-version letter maps are in the [README's Patches applied section](https://github.com/The412Banner/bannerhub-revanced/blob/gamehub-604-build/README.md#patches-applied) and the [patch sources](https://github.com/The412Banner/bannerhub-revanced/tree/gamehub-604-build/patches/src/main/kotlin/app/revanced/patches/gamehub).*
### Credits PC-accurate controller vibration (including the preload-free rework) is built on **[TideGear](https://github.com/TideGear)**'s [GameHub-Vibration-Fix](https://github.com/TideGear/GameHub-Vibration-Fix) (PR #80 + PR #91), adapted with explicit permission, deriving from [GameNative](https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative) (PR #1214). Full project credits (DXVK, VKD3D-Proton, Box64, FEX, Mesa Turnip, ReVanced, etc.) are in the [README Credits section](https://github.com/The412Banner/bannerhub-revanced/blob/gamehub-604-build/README.md#credits).

releases.name: BannerHub v6 1.3.0-604
releases.body:
## BannerHub v6 1.3.0-604 A patched build of **XiaoJi GameHub 6.0.4** that removes the login requirement (import and play games with no account) and redirects the catalog to the BannerHub Cloudflare Worker. Ships **9 variants that install side-by-side**, each with an optional **Lite** build (~34.5 MB / ≈32% smaller). **18 APKs attached** — 9 full + 9 Lite. Steam game launches work end-to-end. 🔒 **Privacy-hardened** — upstream telemetry/analytics channels stripped at the bytecode level. Full list of killed channels (and the honest leftovers) in [`PRIVACY.md`](https://github.com/The412Banner/bannerhub-revanced/blob/gamehub-604-build/PRIVACY.md).
✨ Everything BannerHub v6 offers (click to expand) - **No login required** — launch straight to the home screen and import/play games without a XiaoJi account. - **Custom catalog API** — the catalog is redirected to the BannerHub Cloudflare Worker for **curated component delivery** (hand-picked DXVK, VKD3D-Proton, Box64, FEX, Mesa Turnip driver builds, etc.) instead of the stock upstream set. - **Privacy-hardened** — upstream telemetry/analytics channels stripped at the bytecode level (see the `PRIVACY.md` link above for the full list). - **PC-accurate controller vibration** — real XInput rumble routed into Android's VibratorManager with independent dual-motor support, configurable **per-game** (mode + intensity) via the **PC Vibration Settings** menu row. Preload-free — no `libevshim` / `LD_PRELOAD`. - **9 side-by-side variants** — different package names + launcher labels so multiple builds coexist on one device (`Original` replaces stock GameHub; the rest install alongside it). - **Optional Lite builds** — a ~34.5 MB-smaller counterpart of every variant. - **Muted UI sounds** — menu/button click sounds silenced; in-game audio untouched. - **Root-free file manager access** — a content provider lets MT Manager and similar apps browse GameHub's data dir without root. - **Portrait PC-settings** — per-game PC settings render in both landscape and portrait (side benefit of the API redirect). - **Installs in place** — stable signing keystore; future BannerHub v6 stables upgrade without uninstalling. - **BannerHub v6 branding** — custom app icon, Wine container header, and auth/splash artwork. - **Triage-friendly** — debuggable build with logcat markers along the import path.
### What's new in 1.3.0-604 On top of `v1.2.0-604` (same keystore — installs in place): - **🎮 Preload-free vibration — fixes the x86_64 / Box64 launch crash.** PC-accurate XInput rumble no longer ships `libevshim.so` or touches `LD_PRELOAD`; SDL2's ~1 s auto-stop is now defeated by an on-disk `winebus.so` patch instead. This resolves the `c000007b` crash that blocked x86_64 / Box64 game launches on older builds. Rumble behaviour is unchanged (per-game via **PC Vibration Settings**). Device-confirmed. - **🪶 Lite builds for every variant.** Each Lite APK is ~34.5 MB smaller (≈114.5 → ≈78.3 MB) — it strips a dead duplicate font, the Aliyun carrier-login lib, the Haima cloud-gaming stack, and the bundled AVIF/HEIC codecs. Removed: cloud gaming (non-functional under the catalog redirect anyway) and the bundled AVIF/HEIC decoder (Android still renders these via the platform decoder; JPEG/PNG/WebP unaffected). Otherwise byte-identical to the full build. Strip-by-strip breakdown in [`bannerhub-v6-lite.md`](https://github.com/The412Banner/bannerhub-revanced/blob/gamehub-604-build/bannerhub-v6-lite.md). ### Variants Each variant has its own package name + launcher label, so the variants install **side-by-side** with each other. `Original` replaces an installed GameHub; the rest install alongside it. **Full vs Lite:** a Lite APK shares its full counterpart's package name and cert — installing Lite **replaces** the matching full build (and vice versa). They do **not** coexist; pick one per row. | Variant | Package | Full APK / Lite APK | | --- | --- | --- | | Normal | `banner.hub` | `…-Normal.apk` / `…-Normal-Lite.apk` | | Normal-GHL | `gamehub.lite` | `…-Normal-GHL.apk` / `…-Normal-GHL-Lite.apk` | | PuBG | `com.tencent.ig` | `…-PuBG.apk` / `…-PuBG-Lite.apk` | | AnTuTu | `com.antutu.ABenchMark` | `…-AnTuTu.apk` / `…-AnTuTu-Lite.apk` | | alt-AnTuTu | `com.antutu.benchmark.full` | `…-alt-AnTuTu.apk` / `…-alt-AnTuTu-Lite.apk` | | PuBG-CrossFire | `com.tencent.tmgp.cf` | `…-PuBG-CrossFire.apk` / `…-PuBG-CrossFire-Lite.apk` | | Ludashi | `com.ludashi.aibench` | `…-Ludashi.apk` / `…-Ludashi-Lite.apk` | | Genshin | `com.miHoYo.GenshinImpact` | `…-Genshin.apk` / `…-Genshin-Lite.apk` | | Original | `com.xiaoji.egggame` | `…-Original.apk` / `…-Original-Lite.apk` | Filenames follow `BannerHub-V6-1.3.0-604-Patched-{variant}[-Lite].apk`. The version string is `BannerHub v6` (product) + `1.3.0` (our semver) + `-604` (the GameHub base, `6.0.4`). ### Install notes - **Signing**: stable BannerHub test keystore. A one-time uninstall is only needed if upgrading from `v1.0.0-604` or older (cert changed then); every release since installs in place. Fingerprints in [`keystore/README.md`](https://github.com/The412Banner/bannerhub-revanced/blob/gamehub-604-build/keystore/README.md). - Base APK is unmodified XiaoJi GameHub 6.0.4 (versionCode 114) — only the bytecode/resources the patches need are touched. - The `.rvp` / `.rve` bundles are attached for use with `revanced-cli` directly. Built with ReVanced CLI 6.0.0; full APKs from `gamehub-604-build`, Lite from `feature/lite-variant-tier1`.
📦 Patches applied (click to expand) | Patch | What it does | | --- | --- | | **Bypass login** | Launch straight to the home screen; import and play games with no account. | | **Disable Firebase Crashlytics** | Prevents a launch-time `VerifyError` crash. | | **Debug logging** | Debuggable APK + logcat markers along the import path for triage. | | **File manager access** | Content provider so external file managers (MT Manager etc.) can browse the data dir without root. | | **Rewrite custom permissions per variant** | Stops two installed variants colliding on Android 7+. | | **Mute UI sounds** | Silences menu/button clicks; game audio untouched. | | **Redirect catalog API** | Points the catalog at the BannerHub Worker; also fixes PC-settings rendering in portrait. | | **Prefix API path with /v6** | Lets the Worker serve 6.0-only responses without affecting 5.x clients. | | **Offline component cache fallback** ⚠ *broken on 6.0.4* | Online behaviour unaffected; offline pickers just fall back to built-in versions. Safe to ignore unless you rely on offline picker contents. | | **PC-accurate vibration** | Routes XInput rumble into Android's VibratorManager (independent dual-motor). Preload-free: an on-disk `winebus.so` patch defeats SDL2's ~1 s auto-stop with no `libevshim.so` / `LD_PRELOAD` (fixes the x86_64/box64 launch-death). Default on at 100%. | | **PC Vibration Settings (activity + menu row)** | Per-game mode (off / device / controller / both) and intensity (0–100%), plus a **PC Vibration Settings** row in both per-game popups. | | **Change app icon** | BannerHub v6 branding — adaptive icon, Wine container header, auth/splash assets. | | **Change package & app name** *(per variant)* | Per-variant package + launcher label so all 9 variants install side-by-side (`Original` keeps `com.xiaoji.egggame`). | | **Lite size-reduction strips** *(Lite only)* | Strips the dead 20 MB font, Aliyun carrier-login lib, Haima cloud-gaming stack, and AVIF/HEIC codecs. ~34.5 MB smaller; no effect on full variants. | *Per-patch mechanics, smali anchors, and version-by-version letter maps are in the [README's Patches applied section](https://github.com/The412Banner/bannerhub-revanced/blob/gamehub-604-build/README.md#patches-applied) and the [patch sources](https://github.com/The412Banner/bannerhub-revanced/tree/gamehub-604-build/patches/src/main/kotlin/app/revanced/patches/gamehub).*
### Credits PC-accurate controller vibration (including the preload-free rework) is built on **[TideGear](https://github.com/TideGear)**'s [GameHub-Vibration-Fix](https://github.com/TideGear/GameHub-Vibration-Fix) (PR #80 + PR #91), adapted with explicit permission, deriving from [GameNative](https://github.com/utkarshdalal/GameNative) (PR #1214). Full project credits (DXVK, VKD3D-Proton, Box64, FEX, Mesa Turnip, ReVanced, etc.) are in the [README Credits section](https://github.com/The412Banner/bannerhub-revanced/blob/gamehub-604-build/README.md#credits).

releases.name: BannerHub v6 1.2.0-604
releases.body:
## BannerHub v6 1.2.0-604 A patched build of XiaoJi GameHub 6.0.4 (`com.xiaoji.egggame`, versionCode 114) that removes the login requirement so games can be imported and used without an account, redirects the catalog API to the BannerHub Cloudflare Worker, and ships **9 variants that install side-by-side on the same device**. ### ✨ What's new in 1.2.0-604 A full **privacy hardening stack** plus a small **UX fix** for the Explorer-view More Menu. Drop-in update on top of `v1.1.0-604` — cert unchanged, installs in place. #### 🔐 Privacy hardening — 7 functional patches + a public doc Every telemetry channel listed below is now **silent on the device**. The complete data-flow write-up — including what we deliberately did NOT touch and why — lives in [`PRIVACY.md`](https://github.com/The412Banner/bannerhub-revanced/blob/gamehub-604-build/PRIVACY.md) at the repo root. | Telemetry channel | What it leaked | Mechanism | | --- | --- | --- | | **Firebase Analytics** | screen views, session starts, in-app purchases, custom events → `app-measurement.com` | Manifest `` kill switch (`firebase_analytics_collection_deactivated=true` + AD-ID/SSAID disables); the SDK never initializes | | **Mob Push SDK** | device identifiers, push tokens, lifecycle events → Mob | Bytecode removes 3 SDK init call sites + manifest disables every `com.mob.*` / `cn.fly.*` component (ContentProvider auto-init can't fire either) | | **AD-ID / ADSERVICES permissions** | advertising-ID exposure to any caller that queries Play Services | 3 `` declarations stripped | | **XiaoJi OTA update phone-home** | firmware-update check → `xiaoji.com/firmware/update/x1` | URL register rewritten to `127.0.0.1`; per-arch OTA native libs stripped | | **Heartbeat / playtime tracker** | per-game playtime sessions → XiaoJi via `heartbeat/game/{start,update,end}` | Suspend lambda bodies replaced with `return Unit.INSTANCE`; `getUserPlayTimeList` returns an empty wrapped list | | **GMS Measurement** | persistent `app_instance_id`, active `session_id`, lifecycle pauses → Google | Three GMS manifest components (`AppMeasurementReceiver` / `AppMeasurementService` / `AppMeasurementJobService`) flipped to `android:enabled="false"` | | **`statistic-gamehub-api.vgabc.com/events`** + **`/events/device-performance-config`** | general analytics events + device-perf telemetry → XiaoJi | Pure client-side stub: `Lcx5;->a` and `Loh4;->b` early-return fake success instances before any URL string is allocated | Empirically verified on a real device during dev: a full 6.5-minute session (install → open → game launch → in-game session → quit) produced **zero DNS queries** for `statistic-gamehub-api.vgabc.com` and **zero advancement** of GMS Measurement's `last_pause_time` field. > ⚠ **We're not pretending nothing leaves the device.** [`PRIVACY.md`](https://github.com/The412Banner/bannerhub-revanced/blob/gamehub-604-build/PRIVACY.md) honestly enumerates what's still visible: image CDNs (`bigeyes.com`, `shared.akamai.steamstatic.com`), Firebase's vestigial settings-config GET, GOG Galaxy telemetry, and the BannerHub Cloudflare Worker that serves the catalog API. Read it. #### 🎛 PC Game Settings — now always visible in Explorer view Vanilla GameHub hides the "PC Game Settings" row in the game-detail More Menu for Steam-linked games (Steam manages its own settings; the raw Wine/DXVK/Box64/VKD3D dialog wouldn't apply). This release **forces that row to always appear** regardless of game type or launch method. Single-instruction bytecode patch: removes the `if-eqz` gate immediately before the row's construction in `Lx57;->a()`. Other More Menu rows (PC Uninstall, Online Update, Instant Settings, Version Switch, etc.) keep their native gating — only PC Game Settings is forced visible. Caveat: tapping PC Game Settings for a Steam-launched game opens the Wine settings dialog, but Steam wraps the executable so the settings won't reach the actual Steam process. Useful for direct-launch PC games regardless of backing source. #### Carryover from `v1.1.0-604` Stable keystore, PC-accurate XInput rumble (`MODE_CONTROLLER` 100% by default), PC Vibration Settings menu row in both per-game popups, BannerHub v6 visual rebrand, and the in-place-update behaviour all carry forward unchanged. ### 🔐 Signing — in-place updates from `v1.1.0-604` onward This release is signed with the **same stable test keystore** ([`keystore/bannerhub.keystore`](https://github.com/The412Banner/bannerhub-revanced/blob/gamehub-604-build/keystore/README.md)) introduced in `v1.1.0-604` — cert SHA-256 `10:89:5A:31:1F:E0:4F:95:F8:2E:4D:A5:C9:A6:C0:41:BA:92:82:BF:21:1F:1B:57:8F:E1:CB:EB:89:4C:E0:BA`. Cross-check against `apksigner verify --print-certs` output in any of this release's CI logs. - **Upgrading from `v1.1.0-604`**: install the matching variant on top — Android accepts the update. - **Upgrading from `v1.0.0-604` or older**: those used per-run ephemeral keys, so the cert differs. **Uninstall once**, then install the new variant. From there on out updates flow normally. ### ✅ Steam game launches work end-to-end Standard Steam client and Lightweight Steam client both launch games successfully — the BannerHub Cloudflare Worker serves a Steam-launch-compatible payload for both. Pick whichever Steam client suits your title. > ⚠ **If your first Steam launch errors with `xtask install components failed`:** open that game's **PC game settings** (now always available — see the new section above), set the components manually (Wine prefix, DXVK, VKD3D, container, etc.) and make sure the **correct Steam client** is selected, then try to launch again. One-time setup; subsequent launches succeed. ### 🪶 Bonus: BannerHub V6 Lite (Beta) — a much smaller build Attached to this release is an extra **`BannerHub-V6-1.2.1-604-Lite-Beta1.apk`** (~78 MB vs the regular ~114 MB — about **31% smaller**). It's the **same app** with three chunks of dead weight or rarely-used code trimmed out — **Steam, Epic, AI Frame Generation, vibration and every game-launching feature are fully kept**. It uses its own package name (`banner.hub.lite`) so it **installs side-by-side** with any other variant for easy testing. This is a **Beta** test build (not one of the 9 standard signed variants). For exactly what was removed, what you keep, and the current testing status, read the full plain-language write-up: **[`bannerhub-v6-lite.md`](https://github.com/The412Banner/bannerhub-revanced/blob/gamehub-604-build/bannerhub-v6-lite.md)**. ### Source - **Base APK**: `GameHub_6.0.4.apk` — the official 6.0.4 global build (versionCode 114), attached unmodified to [`base-apk-604`](https://github.com/The412Banner/bannerhub-revanced/releases/tag/base-apk-604). - **Patcher**: ReVanced CLI 6.0.0 + this repo's patch bundle, branch `gamehub-604-build`. - **Catalog backend**: [`The412Banner/bannerhub-api`](https://github.com/The412Banner/bannerhub-api) Cloudflare Worker at `bannerhub-api.the412banner.workers.dev`. ### Variants Nine APKs are produced from the same patch bundle, each with a different package name + launcher label so they install side-by-side. The `Original` variant **replaces** an installed GameHub; the rest install **alongside** the original. | Variant | APK | Package | Launcher label | | --- | --- | --- | --- | | Normal | `BannerHub-V6-1.2.0-604-Patched-Normal.apk` | `banner.hub` | BannerHub v6 | | Normal-GHL | `BannerHub-V6-1.2.0-604-Patched-Normal-GHL.apk` | `gamehub.lite` | BannerHub v6 | | PuBG | `BannerHub-V6-1.2.0-604-Patched-PuBG.apk` | `com.tencent.ig` | BannerHub v6 PuBG | | AnTuTu | `BannerHub-V6-1.2.0-604-Patched-AnTuTu.apk` | `com.antutu.ABenchMark` | BannerHub v6 AnTuTu | | alt-AnTuTu | `BannerHub-V6-1.2.0-604-Patched-alt-AnTuTu.apk` | `com.antutu.benchmark.full` | BannerHub v6 AnTuTu | | PuBG-CrossFire | `BannerHub-V6-1.2.0-604-Patched-PuBG-CrossFire.apk` | `com.tencent.tmgp.cf` | BannerHub v6 PuBG CrossFire | | Ludashi | `BannerHub-V6-1.2.0-604-Patched-Ludashi.apk` | `com.ludashi.aibench` | BannerHub v6 Ludashi | | Genshin | `BannerHub-V6-1.2.0-604-Patched-Genshin.apk` | `com.miHoYo.GenshinImpact` | BannerHub v6 Genshin | | Original | `BannerHub-V6-1.2.0-604-Patched-Original.apk` | `com.xiaoji.egggame` | BannerHub v6 |
📦 Patches applied (click to expand) | Patch | What it does | | --- | --- | | **Bypass login** | Lets you launch straight into the home screen and import games without an account. | | **Disable Firebase Crashlytics** | Removes the Crashlytics init block so the patched build doesn't crash on launch with `VerifyError`. | | **Debug logging** | Marks the APK debuggable and adds logcat markers along the import code path for triage. | | **File manager access** | Exposes a content provider so external file managers (MT Manager etc.) can browse GameHub's data dir without root. | | **Rewrite custom permissions per variant** | Per-variant `com.xiaoji.egggame.permission.*` rewrite so two installed variants don't collide on Android 7+. | | **Mute UI sounds** | Replaces the bundled menu/button click sounds with silent PCM. Game audio is untouched. | | **Redirect catalog API** | Points the catalog API at the BannerHub Cloudflare Worker (`bannerhub-api.the412banner.workers.dev`) for curated component delivery. Side benefit: per-game PC settings now render in both landscape and portrait. | | **Prefix API path with /v6** | Prepends `v6/` to every relative API call so the Worker can serve 6.0-only response variants without affecting 5.x clients. | | **Offline component cache fallback** ⚠ *currently broken on 6.0.4* | *Intended to let per-game pickers show your cached components when the device is offline.* Online behavior is unchanged, so this caveat only matters when you're offline. Investigation pending; safe to ignore unless you specifically rely on offline picker contents. | | **PC-accurate vibration** | 4 bytecode hooks routing XInput rumble into Android's VibratorManager with dual-motor independent dispatch on multi-motor pads. SDL2's 1 s auto-stop defeated by a guest-side `libevshim.so` shim that re-issues `SDL_JoystickRumble` every 500 ms. Defaults to `MODE_CONTROLLER` at 100%. | | **Vibration native shim** | Ships an arm64-v8a `libevshim.so` (~41 KB) into the APK; loaded into Wine via LD_PRELOAD. Patches `winebus.so`'s `pSDL_JoystickRumble` / `pSDL_JoystickClose` pointers at runtime. | | **Vibration settings activity** | Registers `com.xj.winemu.vibration.BhVibrationSettingsActivity` (internal, exported=false). Per-game dialog: mode (off / device / controller / both) + intensity (0-100%). | | **PC Vibration Settings menu row** | Injects a 5th menu row labelled **PC Vibration Settings** into both per-game popups. Launches the vibration settings dialog scoped to the active game. | | **PC Vibration Settings label resource** | Appends a `bh_pc_vibration_label` entry to `features.home`'s Compose Multiplatform `.cvr` bundle (with a bytecode-patched runtime resolver short-circuit). | | **Change app icon** | Replaces 5 in-APK drawables with BannerHub v6 branding (adaptive-icon foreground, `wine_logo`, auth/splash banners). | | **Disable Firebase Analytics** ⭐ *new in 1.2.0-604* | Manifest kill switch: `firebase_analytics_collection_deactivated=true` + AD-ID/SSAID disables. Firebase Analytics SDK never initializes; no events sent to `app-measurement.com`. | | **Disable Mob Push tracking** ⭐ *new in 1.2.0-604* | Removes 3 Mob SDK init invocations in XiaoJi bootstrap (`BaseAndroidApp` + helper) plus manifest `android:enabled="false"` on every `com.mob.*` / `cn.fly.*` ``/``/``/``. ContentProvider auto-init can't fire either. | | **Strip Ad-ID permissions** ⭐ *new in 1.2.0-604* | Removes `AD_ID`, `ACCESS_ADSERVICES_ATTRIBUTION`, `ACCESS_ADSERVICES_AD_ID` from `` declarations. Strengthens the Firebase Analytics disable above. | | **Disable OTA updates** ⭐ *new in 1.2.0-604* | Overwrites the OTA URL register with `http://127.0.0.1` after the const-string load in `ki4.smali`, so `xiaoji.com/firmware/update/x1` is unreachable. Per-arch `libJieLiUsbOta.so` + `libjl_ota_auth.so` natives are stripped from the APK. | | **Disable heartbeat** ⭐ *new in 1.2.0-604* | Disables XiaoJi's server-side playtime tracker (`heartbeat/game/{start,update,end}` + `getUserPlayTimeList`). All four methods return early so no network call fires and no per-tick work runs. Trade-off: in-app playtime UI will be empty. | | **Disable GMS Measurement** ⭐ *new in 1.2.0-604* | Flips `android:enabled` to `false` on the three `com.google.android.gms.measurement.*` manifest components. Complementary to Disable Firebase Analytics — GMS Measurement runs as a separate Play Services component and would otherwise keep writing `app_instance_id` + `session_id` to shared_prefs. | | **Stub analytics events** ⭐ *new in 1.2.0-604* | Pure-stub neutralization of XiaoJi's two analytics-event reporters (`Lcx5;->a` general `/events` POST batches + `Loh4;->b` `/events/device-performance-config`). Both early-return fake success instances before any URL is built. Zero outbound traffic to `statistic-gamehub-api.vgabc.com`. | | **Show PC Game Settings row** ⭐ *new in 1.2.0-604* | Removes the `if-eqz` gate in front of the PC Game Settings row in the Explorer-view More Menu so the option appears for every game type, including Steam-linked games. | | **Change package name** *(per variant)* | Renames the APK package per variant so all 9 variants install side-by-side. The `Original` variant keeps `com.xiaoji.egggame`. | | **Change app name** *(per variant)* | Renames the launcher label per variant. | *Per-patch mechanics, smali edits, structural anchors, and version-by-version letter maps live in the [README's Patches applied section](https://github.com/The412Banner/bannerhub-revanced/blob/gamehub-604-build/README.md#patches-applied) and the patch source comments under [`patches/src/main/kotlin/app/revanced/patches/gamehub/`](https://github.com/The412Banner/bannerhub-revanced/tree/gamehub-604-build/patches/src/main/kotlin/app/revanced/patches/gamehub).*
### Notes - The base APK is unmodified XiaoJi GameHub 6.0.4; only the bytecode/resources required by the patches above are touched. - **Signing**: signed with the stable BannerHub test keystore (cert SHA-256 `10895a311fe04f95f82e4da5c9a6c041ba9282bf211f1b578fe1cbeb894ce0ba`). One-time uninstall required if upgrading from `v1.0.0-604` or older (different cert). From this release onward, all future BannerHub v6 stables install in place. Cert fingerprints: see [`keystore/README.md`](https://github.com/The412Banner/bannerhub-revanced/blob/gamehub-604-build/keystore/README.md). - The `.rvp` patch bundle and `.rve` extension files are also attached for use with `revanced-cli` directly.

releases.name: BannerHub v6 1.1.0-604
releases.body:
## BannerHub v6 1.1.0-604 A patched build of XiaoJi GameHub 6.0.4 (`com.xiaoji.egggame`, versionCode 114) that removes the login requirement so games can be imported and used without an account, redirects the catalog API to the BannerHub Cloudflare Worker, and ships **9 variants that install side-by-side on the same device**. ### ✨ What's new in 1.1.0-604 This is the **first BannerHub v6 stable** on the new build pipeline. Compared to `v1.0.0-604`, this release ships four major changes: - **🎮 PC-accurate XInput rumble for Wine games.** Ported from [TideGear/GameHub-Vibration-Fix](https://github.com/TideGear/GameHub-Vibration-Fix) (which itself ports BannerHub PR #80 from 5.3.5). Dual-motor independent dispatch on multi-motor controllers, sustained rumble that persists past SDL2's 1 s auto-stop (via a guest-side `libevshim.so` LD_PRELOAD shim that re-issues `SDL_JoystickRumble` every 500 ms), and instant release on let-go. Confirmed working on GTA 5 Enhanced with a physical controller. **On by default** — `MODE_CONTROLLER` at 100% intensity. Adjust per-game via the new **PC Vibration Settings** menu entry (see below). - **🎛 PC Vibration Settings menu row in both per-game popups.** A new 5th row labelled **PC Vibration Settings** now appears in (1) the game-details "More Menu" (3-dot from inside a game's detail screen) and (2) the library-tile 3-dot popup. Tapping it opens a per-game mode/intensity dialog (off / device / controller / both). Per-game settings persist; global defaults apply to games without per-game overrides. - **🎨 BannerHub v6 visual rebrand.** New launcher icon (adaptive-icon foreground, masked-shape friendly on every launcher), refreshed in-app `wine_logo`, and rebranded auth-screen + splash-screen banners. Five drawables touched; per-variant package names + side-by-side install behaviour unchanged. - **🔐 Stable signing — in-place updates from now on.** This release is the first one signed with a stable test keystore (cert SHA-256 `10:89:5A:31:1F:E0:4F:95:F8:2E:4D:A5:C9:A6:C0:41:BA:92:82:BF:21:1F:1B:57:8F:E1:CB:EB:89:4C:E0:BA`). Future BannerHub v6 stables update in-place — no more uninstall-between-versions. **One-time migration required** if you're on `v1.0.0-604` or older (different cert) — see the migration note below. ### 🔐 Stable signing — in-place updates from this release onward BannerHub releases are now signed with a **stable test keystore** ([`keystore/bannerhub.keystore`](https://github.com/The412Banner/bannerhub-revanced/blob/gamehub-604-build/keystore/README.md)) instead of a fresh per-run ephemeral key. From this release forward, every future BannerHub v6 stable installs **on top of the previous one** with no uninstall — Android sees them as the same app. **One-time migration from any earlier `v1.0.0-604`-or-older release:** the old builds were signed with revanced-cli's per-run ephemeral key, so the cert differs. Uninstall your current BannerHub-ReVanced variant once, then install the matching variant from this release. From here on out you can update in place. Cert fingerprints (SHA-256 / SHA-1) are documented in [`keystore/README.md`](https://github.com/The412Banner/bannerhub-revanced/blob/gamehub-604-build/keystore/README.md) and printed in every CI run's `apksigner verify --print-certs` log lines so you can cross-check. ### ✅ Steam game launches work end-to-end v1.0.0-602's release notes carried a warning that the **standard Steam client** wouldn't launch games under the BannerHub catalog redirect — the workaround was to switch to the **Lightweight Steam client** in the per-game settings. **That warning no longer applies.** The BannerHub API Worker has been fixed server-side to serve a Steam-launch-compatible payload for both client variants, so the standard Steam client launches games successfully on this build (and on existing patched builds — the fix is server-side and retroactive). Pick whichever Steam client suits your title; both work. > ⚠ **If your first Steam launch errors with `xtask install components failed`:** open that game's **PC game settings**, set the components manually (Wine prefix, DXVK, VKD3D, container, etc.) and — most importantly — make sure the **correct Steam client** is selected, then try to launch again. The error is a one-time setup hiccup on the first launch when components haven't been pinned per-game yet; once the per-game settings are filled in the launch succeeds. ### Source - **Base APK**: `GameHub_6.0.4.apk` — the official 6.0.4 global build (versionCode 114), attached unmodified to [`base-apk-604`](https://github.com/The412Banner/bannerhub-revanced/releases/tag/base-apk-604). - **Patcher**: ReVanced CLI 6.0.0 + this repo's patch bundle, branch `gamehub-604-build`. - **Catalog backend**: [`The412Banner/bannerhub-api`](https://github.com/The412Banner/bannerhub-api) — Cloudflare Worker, deployed at `bannerhub-api.the412banner.workers.dev`. - **Repo**: https://github.com/The412Banner/bannerhub-revanced #### Naming & versioning scheme APK files follow the pattern **`BannerHub-V6-{version}-Patched-{variant}.apk`** — e.g. `BannerHub-V6-1.1.0-604-Patched-Normal.apk`. The version string itself has three parts: - **BannerHub v6** — product name. The `v6` is fixed; it's our branch family aligned with GameHub's 6.x series and stays put across upstream patch-version bumps. - **`1.1.0`** — BannerHub-side semver (`major.minor.patch`). Tracks our own changes: new patches, infrastructure work, bug fixes. Bumps on every release. - **`-604`** — GameHub base version with the dots stripped (`6.0.4` → `604`). Tells you which upstream GameHub APK was patched. When GameHub upstream releases `6.0.5`, the suffix becomes `-605` and the same patch set can be retargeted (e.g. `v1.1.0-605`) without otherwise changing. The release tag (`v1.1.0-604`) is just the version string with a leading `v`. The `{variant}` slot in the filename identifies which of the 9 side-by-side packagings you grabbed. ### Variants Nine APKs are produced from the same patch bundle, each with a different package name + launcher label so they install side-by-side. The `Original` variant **replaces** an installed GameHub; the rest install **alongside** the original. | Variant | APK | Package | Launcher label | | --- | --- | --- | --- | | Normal | `BannerHub-V6-1.1.0-604-Patched-Normal.apk` | `banner.hub` | BannerHub v6 | | Normal-GHL | `BannerHub-V6-1.1.0-604-Patched-Normal-GHL.apk` | `gamehub.lite` | BannerHub v6 | | PuBG | `BannerHub-V6-1.1.0-604-Patched-PuBG.apk` | `com.tencent.ig` | BannerHub v6 PuBG | | AnTuTu | `BannerHub-V6-1.1.0-604-Patched-AnTuTu.apk` | `com.antutu.ABenchMark` | BannerHub v6 AnTuTu | | alt-AnTuTu | `BannerHub-V6-1.1.0-604-Patched-alt-AnTuTu.apk` | `com.antutu.benchmark.full` | BannerHub v6 AnTuTu | | PuBG-CrossFire | `BannerHub-V6-1.1.0-604-Patched-PuBG-CrossFire.apk` | `com.tencent.tmgp.cf` | BannerHub v6 PuBG CrossFire | | Ludashi | `BannerHub-V6-1.1.0-604-Patched-Ludashi.apk` | `com.ludashi.aibench` | BannerHub v6 Ludashi | | Genshin | `BannerHub-V6-1.1.0-604-Patched-Genshin.apk` | `com.miHoYo.GenshinImpact` | BannerHub v6 Genshin | | Original | `BannerHub-V6-1.1.0-604-Patched-Original.apk` | `com.xiaoji.egggame` | BannerHub v6 |
📦 Patches applied (click to expand) | Patch | What it does | | --- | --- | | **Bypass login** | Lets you launch straight into the home screen and import games without an account. | | **Disable Firebase Crashlytics** | Removes the Crashlytics init block so the patched build doesn't crash on launch with `VerifyError`. | | **Debug logging** | Marks the APK debuggable and adds logcat markers along the import code path for triage. | | **File manager access** | Exposes a content provider so external file managers (MT Manager etc.) can browse GameHub's data dir without root. | | **Rewrite custom permissions per variant** | Per-variant `com.xiaoji.egggame.permission.*` rewrite so two installed variants don't collide on Android 7+. | | **Mute UI sounds** | Replaces the bundled menu/button click sounds with silent PCM. Game audio is untouched. | | **Redirect catalog API** | Points the catalog API at the BannerHub Cloudflare Worker (`bannerhub-api.the412banner.workers.dev`) for curated component delivery. Side benefit: per-game PC settings now render in both landscape and portrait. | | **Prefix API path with /v6** | Prepends `v6/` to every relative API call so the Worker can serve 6.0-only response variants without affecting 5.x clients. | | **Offline component cache fallback** ⚠ *currently broken on 6.0.4* | *Intended to let per-game pickers show your cached components when the device is offline.* Online behavior is unchanged, so this caveat only matters when you're offline — pickers will still show only the embedded built-in versions instead of the cached entries the patch was meant to surface. Investigation pending; safe to ignore unless you specifically rely on offline picker contents. | | **PC-accurate vibration** ⭐ *new in 1.1.0-604* | 4 bytecode hooks (GamepadServerManager.onRumble entry + per-controller dispatch + stop + Wine env-builder LD_PRELOAD) route XInput rumble into Android's VibratorManager with dual-motor independent dispatch on multi-motor pads. SDL2's 1 s auto-stop is defeated by a guest-side `libevshim.so` shim that re-issues `SDL_JoystickRumble` every 500 ms with a 2 s duration. Defaults to `MODE_CONTROLLER` at 100% intensity — works out of the box, no UI tweaking required. | | **Vibration native shim** ⭐ *new in 1.1.0-604* | Ships an arm64-v8a `libevshim.so` (~41 KB) into the APK's native lib dir; loaded into Wine via the LD_PRELOAD inject above. Patches `winebus.so`'s `pSDL_JoystickRumble` / `pSDL_JoystickClose` pointers at runtime so SDL2's internal rumble timer can't expire during sustained holds. | | **Vibration settings activity** ⭐ *new in 1.1.0-604* | Registers `com.xj.winemu.vibration.BhVibrationSettingsActivity` in the manifest. Internal-only (exported=false); launched by the menu rows below via explicit Intent. Dialog lets you pick mode (off / device / controller / both) and intensity (0–100%) per-game, with global defaults. | | **PC Vibration Settings menu row** ⭐ *new in 1.1.0-604* | Injects a 5th menu row labelled **PC Vibration Settings** into both per-game popups (game-details "More Menu" + library-tile 3-dot popup). Tapping launches the vibration settings dialog scoped to the active game. Survives Compose Multiplatform's R8-renamed `Function0/Function1` interfaces (proxied at runtime) and the empty-Kotlin-subclass `Lell` resource descriptor (allocated via `Unsafe`). | | **PC Vibration Settings label resource** ⭐ *new in 1.1.0-604* | Appends a `bh_pc_vibration_label = "PC Vibration Settings"` entry to `features.home`'s Compose Multiplatform resource bundle (`.cvr` file). Used as documentation; the actual runtime resolution goes via a bytecode-patched short-circuit in `Lxd3.l1` because Compose's resource manifest needs entries the bare `.cvr` doesn't register. | | **Change app icon** ⭐ *new in 1.1.0-604* | Replaces 5 in-APK drawables with BannerHub v6 branding: adaptive-icon foreground (deletes the stock GameHub vector so the new raster wins on every device density), in-app `wine_logo` (Wine container header), and three Compose Multiplatform auth/splash assets (auth-screen landscape + overseas logos + splash banner). Launcher background drawable left as-is so launcher masking applies cleanly. | | **Change package name** *(per variant)* | Renames the APK package per variant so all 9 variants install side-by-side. The `Original` variant keeps `com.xiaoji.egggame`. | | **Change app name** *(per variant)* | Renames the launcher label per variant. | *Per-patch mechanics, smali edits, structural anchors, and version-by-version letter maps live in the [README's Patches applied section](https://github.com/The412Banner/bannerhub-revanced/blob/gamehub-604-build/README.md#patches-applied) and the patch source comments under [`patches/src/main/kotlin/app/revanced/patches/gamehub/`](https://github.com/The412Banner/bannerhub-revanced/tree/gamehub-604-build/patches/src/main/kotlin/app/revanced/patches/gamehub).*
### Notes - The base APK is unmodified XiaoJi GameHub 6.0.4; only the bytecode/resources required by the patches above are touched. - **Signing**: signed with the stable BannerHub test keystore (`keystore/bannerhub.keystore`). One-time uninstall required if upgrading from `v1.0.0-604` or older (different cert). From this release onward, all future BannerHub v6 stables install in place. Cert fingerprints: see [`keystore/README.md`](https://github.com/The412Banner/bannerhub-revanced/blob/gamehub-604-build/keystore/README.md). - Cover-art-on-import was fixed server-side in the BannerHub Worker on 2026-05-11 (worker deploy `5fd6c6a7…`) and applies retroactively to every existing patched build — no APK rebuild needed. - The `.rvp` patch bundle and `.rve` extension files are also attached for use with `revanced-cli` directly.

releases.name: Gamehub 6.0.4 - BannerHub API - Patched
releases.body:
## Gamehub 6.0.4 - BannerHub API - Patched

A patched build of XiaoJi GameHub 6.0.4 (`com.xiaoji.egggame`, versionCode 114) that removes the login requirement so games can be imported and used without an account, redirects the catalog API to the BannerHub Cloudflare Worker, and ships **9 variants that install side-by-side on the same device**.

### 🔄 Base APK refresh from 6.0.2 → 6.0.4

Bumps the base APK from 6.0.2 (versionCode 112) to 6.0.4 (versionCode 114) and re-anchors every bytecode-keyed patch against the new build's R8-renamed class names. New on this base: the **`Offline component cache fallback`** patch ships in a stable for the first time (⚠ currently broken at runtime on 6.0.4 — see the Patches applied table below for what that means; online behavior unaffected). All 9 variants patched cleanly on the first run — no .0 → .1 hotfix needed.

*Curious about the patcher-side details?* The full 6.0.2 → 6.0.4 R8 letter delta + the NAV_INTERCEPTOR coroutine-continuation note live in [`gamehub_reports/GH604_LETTER_MAP.md`](https://github.com/The412Banner/bannerhub-revanced/blob/gamehub-604-build/gamehub_reports/GH604_LETTER_MAP.md) and in the patch source comments under [`patches/src/main/kotlin/app/revanced/patches/gamehub/`](https://github.com/The412Banner/bannerhub-revanced/tree/gamehub-604-build/patches/src/main/kotlin/app/revanced/patches/gamehub).

**Migrating from any earlier release:** uninstall the previously-installed BannerHub-ReVanced variant of the same name first — release-to-release the signing keystore changes (CI generates a fresh debug keystore each run), so Android refuses cross-release upgrades with `INSTALL_FAILED_UPDATE_INCOMPATIBLE`. Within v1.0.0-604 itself, all 9 variants share signing and install side-by-side.

### ✅ Steam game launches now work end-to-end

v1.0.0-602's release notes carried a warning that the **standard Steam client** wouldn't launch games under the BannerHub catalog redirect — the workaround was to switch to the **Lightweight Steam client** in the per-game settings. **That warning no longer applies.** The BannerHub API Worker has been fixed server-side to serve a Steam-launch-compatible payload for both client variants, so the standard Steam client launches games successfully on this build (and on existing patched builds — the fix is server-side and retroactive). Pick whichever Steam client suits your title; both work.

> ⚠ **If your first Steam launch errors with `xtask install components failed`:** open that game's **PC game settings**, set the components manually (Wine prefix, DXVK, VKD3D, container, etc.) and — most importantly — make sure the **correct Steam client** is selected, then try to launch again. The error is a one-time setup hiccup on the first launch when components haven't been pinned per-game yet; once the per-game settings are filled in the launch succeeds.

### Source
- **Base APK**: `GameHub_6.0.4.apk` — the official 6.0.4 global build (versionCode 114), attached unmodified to [`base-apk-604`](https://github.com/The412Banner/bannerhub-revanced/releases/tag/base-apk-604).
- **Patcher**: ReVanced CLI 6.0.0 + this repo's patch bundle, branch `gamehub-604-build`.
- **Catalog backend**: [`The412Banner/bannerhub-api`](https://github.com/The412Banner/bannerhub-api) — Cloudflare Worker, deployed at `bannerhub-api.the412banner.workers.dev`.
- **Repo**: https://github.com/The412Banner/bannerhub-revanced

### Variants

Nine APKs are produced from the same patch bundle, each with a different package name + launcher label so they install side-by-side. The `Original` variant **replaces** an installed GameHub; the rest install **alongside** the original.

| Variant | APK | Package | Launcher label |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Normal | `GameHub-6.0.4-Patched-Normal.apk` | `banner.hub` | GameHub |
| Normal (GHL) | `GameHub-6.0.4-Patched-Normal(GHL).apk` | `gamehub.lite` | GameHub |
| PuBG | `GameHub-6.0.4-Patched-PuBG.apk` | `com.tencent.ig` | GameHub PuBG |
| AnTuTu | `GameHub-6.0.4-Patched-AnTuTu.apk` | `com.antutu.ABenchMark` | GameHub AnTuTu |
| alt-AnTuTu | `GameHub-6.0.4-Patched-alt-AnTuTu.apk` | `com.antutu.benchmark.full` | GameHub AnTuTu |
| PuBG-CrossFire | `GameHub-6.0.4-Patched-PuBG-CrossFire.apk` | `com.tencent.tmgp.cf` | GameHub PuBG CrossFire |
| Ludashi | `GameHub-6.0.4-Patched-Ludashi.apk` | `com.ludashi.aibench` | GameHub Ludashi |
| Genshin | `GameHub-6.0.4-Patched-Genshin.apk` | `com.miHoYo.GenshinImpact` | GameHub Genshin |
| Original | `GameHub-6.0.4-Patched-Original.apk` | `com.xiaoji.egggame` | GameHub |

### Patches applied

| Patch | What it does |
| --- | --- |
| **Bypass login** | Lets you launch straight into the home screen and import games without an account. |
| **Disable Firebase Crashlytics** | Removes the Crashlytics init block so the patched build doesn't crash on launch with `VerifyError`. |
| **Debug logging** | Marks the APK debuggable and adds logcat markers along the import code path for triage. |
| **File manager access** | Exposes a content provider so external file managers (MT Manager etc.) can browse GameHub's data dir without root. |
| **Rewrite custom permissions per variant** | Per-variant `com.xiaoji.egggame.permission.*` rewrite so two installed variants don't collide on Android 7+. |
| **Mute UI sounds** | Replaces the bundled menu/button click sounds with silent PCM. Game audio is untouched. |
| **Redirect catalog API** | Points the catalog API at the BannerHub Cloudflare Worker (`bannerhub-api.the412banner.workers.dev`) for curated component delivery. Side benefit: per-game PC settings now render in both landscape and portrait. |
| **Prefix API path with /v6** | Prepends `v6/` to every relative API call so the Worker can serve 6.0-only response variants without affecting 5.x clients. |
| **Offline component cache fallback** ⚠ *currently broken on 6.0.4* | *Intended to let per-game pickers show your cached components when the device is offline.* Online behavior is unchanged, so this caveat only matters when you're offline — pickers will still show only the embedded built-in versions instead of the cached entries the patch was meant to surface. Investigation pending; safe to ignore unless you specifically rely on offline picker contents. |
| **Change package name** *(per variant)* | Renames the APK package per variant so all 9 variants install side-by-side. The `Original` variant keeps `com.xiaoji.egggame`. |
| **Change app name** *(per variant)* | Renames the launcher label per variant. |

*Per-patch mechanics, smali edits, structural anchors, and version-by-version letter maps live in the [README's Patches applied section](https://github.com/The412Banner/bannerhub-revanced/blob/gamehub-604-build/README.md#patches-applied) and the patch source comments under [`patches/src/main/kotlin/app/revanced/patches/gamehub/`](https://github.com/The412Banner/bannerhub-revanced/tree/gamehub-604-build/patches/src/main/kotlin/app/revanced/patches/gamehub).*

### Notes

- The base APK is unmodified XiaoJi GameHub 6.0.4; only the bytecode/resources required by the patches above are touched.
- **A fresh install is required if a previous release is still installed.** Each release run generates a new debug keystore, so the signing certificate differs between releases and Android refuses the upgrade with `INSTALL_FAILED_UPDATE_INCOMPATIBLE` (signature mismatch). Uninstall the previous version of the same variant first, then install the new one. Within a single release, all 9 variants are signed with the same cert.
- Cover-art-on-import was fixed server-side in the BannerHub Worker on 2026-05-11 (worker deploy `5fd6c6a7…`) and applies retroactively to every existing patched build — no APK rebuild needed.
- The `.rvp` patch bundle and `.rve` extension files are also attached for use with `revanced-cli` directly.

releases.name: GameHub 6.0.2 base APK
releases.body:
Stock XiaoJi GameHub 6.0.2 (`com.xiaoji.egggame`, versionCode 112) global build. Asset is the unmodified APK; the patcher CI downloads it as the patch base.

**Source**: official 6.0.2 release. Hosted here as a release asset so the patcher CI workflow has a stable URL to fetch from.

Used by the `gamehub-602-build` branch's release workflow.

releases.name: Gamehub 6.0.1 - BannerHub API - Patched
releases.body:
## Gamehub 6.0.1 - BannerHub API - Patched

A patched build of XiaoJi GameHub 6.0.1 (`com.xiaoji.egggame`, versionCode 111) that removes the login requirement so games can be imported and used without an account, redirects the catalog API to the BannerHub Cloudflare Worker, and ships **9 variants that install side-by-side on the same device**.

### 🛠️ Hotfix vs v1.0.0-601

**v1.0.0-601 shipped with three patches silently broken** because R8 in the 6.0.1 base APK reshuffled class letters between 6.0.0 and 6.0.1, and the patcher's class-letter-keyed fingerprints matched unrelated classes instead of the intended auth/API targets — the patcher reported success but the methods were never actually rewritten. This hotfix re-anchors all three patches against the new 6.0.1 letters and adds structural-anchor comments in the patch sources so future minor-version bumps are easy to track down.

- **Bypass login** — was no-op on v1.0.0-601 (login wall on library tap). Now patches `Lrs0;` (was `Los0;`), `Lls0;` (was `Lis0;`), `Lhp7;` (was `Lxm7;`), `Lade;` (was `Lg8e;`), and the new 6.0.1-only `Lar0;` NavigationInterceptor. Login is bypassed end-to-end; library opens straight to home.
- **Redirect catalog API** — was no-op on v1.0.0-601 (catalog requests went to upstream `landscape-api.vgabc.com` instead of the BannerHub Worker). Now patches `Lzhj;` (was `Lmcj;`); both Online enum hosts redirect to `bannerhub-api.the412banner.workers.dev`.
- **Prefix API path with /v6** — was no-op on v1.0.0-601 (the Worker received unprefixed requests and served the 5.x response shapes, not the 6.0-specific reshapes). Now patches `Lohb;->b(Lj1a;String)V` (was `Lzdb;->b(Lqx9;String)V`); every relative path from the patched 6.0.1 client carries the `v6/` tag.

### ✅ Same as v1.0.0-601 (base APK refresh from 6.0.0 → 6.0.1)

Same 9 patches on top of the GameHub 6.0.1 base (versionCode 111). Same multi-install fix from v1.0.1-600: side-by-side variants install cleanly on the same device with all three install-blockers from v1.0.0-600 (MT provider authority collision, signature-protected DYNAMIC_RECEIVER_NOT_EXPORTED_PERMISSION, Mob Push SDK C2D_MESSAGE permission) addressed.

**Migrating from v1.0.0-601 or earlier:** uninstall any previously-installed BannerHub-ReVanced variant of the same name first — release-to-release the signing keystore changes (CI generates a fresh debug keystore each run), so Android refuses cross-release upgrades with `INSTALL_FAILED_UPDATE_INCOMPATIBLE`. Within v1.0.1-601 itself, all 9 variants share signing and install side-by-side.

### 🆕 New in GameHub 6.0.1 (upstream)

These are XiaoJi-side improvements that came with the 6.0.1 base APK; you get them automatically by using this build:

1. **Improved Steam login and game download stability**
2. **Faster Steam game launch speeds**
3. **Virtual button layouts can now be switched dynamically via keypress**
4. **Multiple new touchscreen input methods**
5. **Gyroscope support for camera control**
6. **AI frame generation now supported across all games**
7. **Numerous bug fixes**

### Source
- **Base APK**: `GameHub_6.0.1.apk` — the official 6.0.1 global build (versionCode 111), attached to [`base-apk-601`](https://github.com/The412Banner/bannerhub-revanced/releases/tag/base-apk-601)
- **Patcher**: ReVanced CLI 6.0.0 + this repo's patch bundle, branch `gamehub-601-build`
- **Repo**: https://github.com/The412Banner/bannerhub-revanced

### Variants

Nine APKs are produced from the same patch bundle, each with a different package name + launcher label so they install side-by-side. The `Original` variant **replaces** an installed GameHub; the rest install **alongside** the original.

| Variant | APK | Package | Launcher label |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Normal | `GameHub-6.0.1-Patched-Normal.apk` | `banner.hub` | GameHub |
| Normal (GHL) | `GameHub-6.0.1-Patched-Normal(GHL).apk` | `gamehub.lite` | GameHub |
| PuBG | `GameHub-6.0.1-Patched-PuBG.apk` | `com.tencent.ig` | GameHub PuBG |
| AnTuTu | `GameHub-6.0.1-Patched-AnTuTu.apk` | `com.antutu.ABenchMark` | GameHub AnTuTu |
| alt-AnTuTu | `GameHub-6.0.1-Patched-alt-AnTuTu.apk` | `com.antutu.benchmark.full` | GameHub AnTuTu |
| PuBG-CrossFire | `GameHub-6.0.1-Patched-PuBG-CrossFire.apk` | `com.tencent.tmgp.cf` | GameHub PuBG CrossFire |
| Ludashi | `GameHub-6.0.1-Patched-Ludashi.apk` | `com.ludashi.aibench` | GameHub Ludashi |
| Genshin | `GameHub-6.0.1-Patched-Genshin.apk` | `com.miHoYo.GenshinImpact` | GameHub Genshin |
| Original | `GameHub-6.0.1-Patched-Original.apk` | `com.xiaoji.egggame` | GameHub |

### Patches applied

| Patch | What it does |
| --- | --- |
| **Bypass login** | Skips the login screen entirely. Replaces `rs0.h()`'s isLoggedIn StateFlow to emit `TRUE`, replaces `rs0.e()`'s user-account StateFlow to emit a synthetic `adm{user_id="99999"}` so library queries return rows, replaces `hp7.f()` and `ls0.f()` to keep the user-id consistent across read/write paths, and short-circuits the `ade.i/r` Login navigator gates plus the new `ar0.a` NavigationInterceptor that 6.0.1 added. Result: launches straight into the home screen; game-import saves persist to `db_game_library.db`; imported games appear in the library list. |
| **Disable Firebase Crashlytics** | Removes the Crashlytics initialisation block in reverse instruction order so the ART verifier accepts the resulting bytecode. Without this, GameHub 6.0.1 crashes on launch with `VerifyError`. |
| **Debug logging** | Sets `android:debuggable="true"` and inserts `Log.i("GH600-DEBUG", ...)` markers along the import code path (Save → Room DAO inserts) plus a `Throwable` hook on the global exception swallower. Used to triage the import flow during development; will be removed in a follow-up build once the import flow is confirmed stable. |
| **File manager access** | Adds an exposed `MTDataFiles` content provider so external file managers can browse GameHub's data directory. The provider authority and wake-up activity `taskAffinity` are derived per-variant from `packageNameOption.value` so two variants don't collide on `INSTALL_FAILED_CONFLICTING_PROVIDER`. |
| **Rewrite custom permissions per variant** | Iterates the manifest's `<permission>` and `<uses-permission>` elements; any whose name starts `com.xiaoji.egggame.permission.` (notably the Mob Push SDK's `C2D_MESSAGE`) gets the prefix rewritten to the variant package. Without this, Android 7+ rejects the second-installed variant with `INSTALL_FAILED_DUPLICATE_PERMISSION`. |
| **Mute UI sounds** | Replaces the bundled UI feedback sounds (`assets/.../sound/*.wav`) with silent PCM, so menu navigation and button taps no longer click. The patch substitutes the resource at packaging time — no runtime audio routing is changed. |
| **Redirect catalog API** | Patches the `zhj` environment enum's `Online` value so the catalog API's `cnHost` and `overseaHost` both point at the BannerHub Cloudflare Worker (`bannerhub-api.the412banner.workers.dev`) instead of `landscape-api-{cn,oversea}.vgabc.com`. The Worker serves a curated component catalog from GitHub Pages and forwards unallowlisted paths back to the original upstream with the original signed-request behavior preserved. Beta + Test enum values, the analytics hosts, and the bigeyes CDN are intentionally untouched. **Side benefit:** the per-game **PC game settings** screen now renders correctly in both landscape *and* portrait orientation. Upstream's response constrained the screen to landscape only; the BannerHub Worker's payload doesn't carry that constraint, so the picker is usable from a portrait-held phone for the first time. |
| **Prefix API path with /v6** | Hooks `ohb.b(j1a, String)` — the single Ktor URL-builder chokepoint every relative API call funnels through — and prepends `v6/` to the path. Together with **Redirect catalog API**, this lets the Worker serve 6.0-only response variants (firmware 1.3.5 vs 1.3.3, `base.fileType=0`, the `EnvListData` wrapper required by 6.0's kotlinx-strict deserializer) without affecting 5.x clients, which never carry the prefix. Full URLs (`http://`, `https://`) are passed through untouched so direct downloads still work. |
| **Change package name** *(per variant)* | Rewrites the APK's package name to the variant's value listed above. The `Original` variant keeps `com.xiaoji.egggame`. |
| **Change app name** *(per variant)* | Rewrites the launcher label to the variant's value listed above. |

### ⚠ Known limitations — please read

- **Steam game launches via the standard Steam client are likely broken.** Redirecting the catalog API to the BannerHub Worker changes which Steam client component the host resolves at launch. If your Steam games stop launching after upgrading, switch to the **Lightweight Steam client** in the picker — it's the variant that pairs cleanly with the BannerHub catalog. The standard Steam client may still work for some titles, but Lightweight should be your default on this build.
- **Imported games have no cover art by default.** When you add a game via Import, no banner / cover / hero artwork is fetched automatically. Open the imported game's edit screen and set the artwork manually (cover, banner, hero, logo as applicable). The game itself is fully importable and launchable without artwork — this is purely cosmetic.

### Notes

- The base APK is unmodified XiaoJi GameHub 6.0.1; only the bytecode/resources required by the patches above are touched.
- **A fresh install is required if a previous release is still installed.** Each release run generates a new debug keystore, so the signing certificate differs between releases and Android refuses the upgrade with `INSTALL_FAILED_UPDATE_INCOMPATIBLE` (signature mismatch). Uninstall the previous version of the same variant first, then install the new one. Within a single release, all 9 variants are signed with the same cert.
- The `.rvp` patch bundle and `.rve` extension files are also attached for use with `revanced-cli` directly.

releases.name: Gamehub 6.0 - BannerHub API - Multi-Install
releases.body:
## Gamehub 6.0 - BannerHub API - Multi-Install

A patched build of XiaoJi GameHub 6.0.0 (`com.xiaoji.egggame`) that removes the login requirement so games can be imported and used without an account, redirects the catalog API to the BannerHub Cloudflare Worker, and ships **9 variants that install side-by-side on the same device**.

### ✅ What's new vs v1.0.0-600

v1.0.0-600 looked like it supported side-by-side install (each variant had its own package name and launcher label) but in practice every fresh-install of a second variant was rejected by Android with the unhelpful **"package conflicts with a current package"** dialog. Three independent install-blockers were stacked behind that one error:

1. **MTDataFiles `<provider android:authorities>` was the same for every variant** (`com.xiaoji.egggame.app.revanced.extension.gamehub.filemanager.MTDataFilesProvider`). On Android, two installed apps cannot register the same `authorities` string → `INSTALL_FAILED_CONFLICTING_PROVIDER`. The wake-up activity's `taskAffinity` had the same problem. Fixed by reading `packageNameOption.value` directly inside `FileManagerAccessPatch` so the values follow the variant package.
2. **The `signature`-protected `DYNAMIC_RECEIVER_NOT_EXPORTED_PERMISSION` was still namespaced to `com.xiaoji.egggame.*`** in every variant. Two apps signed with different certs cannot both declare the same `signature` permission → install fails. Fixed by passing `-O 'updatePermissions=true'` to the upstream `Change package name` patch in `release.yml`.
3. **The Mob Push SDK's `com.xiaoji.egggame.permission.C2D_MESSAGE` `<permission>` declaration survived the rename** in every variant. Android 7+ rejects multi-declaration of any custom permission name regardless of `protectionLevel`, regardless of cert match → second-variant install fails. Fixed by a new `Rewrite custom permissions per variant` patch that reads `packageNameOption.value` directly.

Also, the workflow now passes `-O 'updateProviders=true'` so the 10 upstream provider authorities baked into the base APK (Mob, file, Fly, utilcode, Firebase, AndroidContext, androidx-startup, filekit, fileprovider, wbsdk) are renamed per-variant as well — those weren't blocking install in v1.0.0-600 (the MT one shadowed them) but they were the next set of blockers after the MT fix landed.

**Migrating from v1.0.0-600:** uninstall every previously-installed BannerHub-ReVanced variant — not just the one you're replacing. Older variants still declare the legacy `com.xiaoji.egggame.permission.C2D_MESSAGE`, so even one of them on-device blocks fresh installs from this release. After the device is clean, install one variant from v1.0.1-600, then install any others alongside it without uninstalling.

### Source
- **Base APK**: `GameHub_beta_6.0.0_global.apk` — the official 6.0.0 global build
- **Patcher**: ReVanced CLI 6.0.0 + this repo's patch bundle, branch `gamehub-600-build`
- **Repo**: https://github.com/The412Banner/bannerhub-revanced

### Variants

Nine APKs are produced from the same patch bundle, each with a different package name + launcher label so they install side-by-side. The `Original` variant **replaces** an installed GameHub; the rest install **alongside** the original.

| Variant | APK | Package | Launcher label |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Normal | `GameHub-6.0-Patched-Normal.apk` | `banner.hub` | GameHub |
| Normal (GHL) | `GameHub-6.0-Patched-Normal(GHL).apk` | `gamehub.lite` | GameHub |
| PuBG | `GameHub-6.0-Patched-PuBG.apk` | `com.tencent.ig` | GameHub PuBG |
| AnTuTu | `GameHub-6.0-Patched-AnTuTu.apk` | `com.antutu.ABenchMark` | GameHub AnTuTu |
| alt-AnTuTu | `GameHub-6.0-Patched-alt-AnTuTu.apk` | `com.antutu.benchmark.full` | GameHub AnTuTu |
| PuBG-CrossFire | `GameHub-6.0-Patched-PuBG-CrossFire.apk` | `com.tencent.tmgp.cf` | GameHub PuBG CrossFire |
| Ludashi | `GameHub-6.0-Patched-Ludashi.apk` | `com.ludashi.aibench` | GameHub Ludashi |
| Genshin | `GameHub-6.0-Patched-Genshin.apk` | `com.miHoYo.GenshinImpact` | GameHub Genshin |
| Original | `GameHub-6.0-Patched-Original.apk` | `com.xiaoji.egggame` | GameHub |

### Patches applied

| Patch | What it does |
| --- | --- |
| **Bypass login** | Skips the login screen entirely. Patches the `g8e` navigator so the Login route is never selected, replaces `os0.h()`'s isLoggedIn StateFlow to emit `TRUE`, replaces `os0.e()`'s user-account StateFlow to emit a synthetic `f4m{user_id="99999"}` so library queries return rows, and replaces `xm7.f()` and `is0.f()` to keep the user-id consistent across the read and write code paths. Result: launches straight into the home screen; game-import saves persist to `db_game_library.db`; imported games appear in the library list. |
| **Disable Firebase Crashlytics** | Removes the Crashlytics initialisation block in reverse instruction order so the ART verifier accepts the resulting bytecode. Without this, GameHub 6.0 crashes on launch with `VerifyError`. |
| **Debug logging** | Sets `android:debuggable="true"` and inserts `Log.i("GH600-DEBUG", ...)` markers along the import code path (`xm7.u`, `el7.invokeSuspend`, both Room DAO inserts) plus a `Throwable` hook on the `odb.e()` global swallower. Used to triage the import flow during development; will be removed in a follow-up build once the import flow is confirmed stable. |
| **File manager access** | Adds an exposed `MTDataFiles` content provider so external file managers can browse GameHub's data directory. The provider authority and wake-up activity `taskAffinity` are derived per-variant from `packageNameOption.value` so two variants don't collide on `INSTALL_FAILED_CONFLICTING_PROVIDER`. |
| **Rewrite custom permissions per variant** | Iterates the manifest's `<permission>` and `<uses-permission>` elements; any whose name starts `com.xiaoji.egggame.permission.` (notably the Mob Push SDK's `C2D_MESSAGE`) gets the prefix rewritten to the variant package. Without this, Android 7+ rejects the second-installed variant with `INSTALL_FAILED_DUPLICATE_PERMISSION`. |
| **Mute UI sounds** | Replaces the bundled UI feedback sounds (`assets/.../sound/*.wav`) with silent PCM, so menu navigation and button taps no longer click. The patch substitutes the resource at packaging time — no runtime audio routing is changed. |
| **Redirect catalog API** | Patches the `mcj` environment enum's `Online` value so the catalog API's `cnHost` and `overseaHost` both point at the BannerHub Cloudflare Worker (`bannerhub-api.the412banner.workers.dev`) instead of `landscape-api-{cn,oversea}.vgabc.com`. The Worker serves a curated component catalog from GitHub Pages and forwards unallowlisted paths back to the original upstream with the original signed-request behavior preserved. Beta + Test enum values, the analytics hosts, and the bigeyes CDN are intentionally untouched. **Side benefit:** the per-game **PC game settings** screen now renders correctly in both landscape *and* portrait orientation. Upstream's response constrained the screen to landscape only; the BannerHub Worker's payload doesn't carry that constraint, so the picker is usable from a portrait-held phone for the first time. |
| **Prefix API path with /v6** | Hooks `zdb.b(qx9, String)` — the single chokepoint every relative API call funnels through — and prepends `v6/` to the path. Together with **Redirect catalog API**, this lets the Worker serve 6.0-only response variants (firmware 1.3.4 vs 1.3.3, `base.fileType=0`, the `EnvListData` wrapper required by 6.0's kotlinx-strict deserializer) without affecting 5.x clients, which never carry the prefix. Full URLs (`http://`, `https://`) are passed through untouched so direct downloads still work. |
| **Change package name** *(per variant)* | Rewrites the APK's package name to the variant's value listed above. The `Original` variant keeps `com.xiaoji.egggame`. |
| **Change app name** *(per variant)* | Rewrites the launcher label to the variant's value listed above. |

### ⚠ Known limitations — please read

- **Steam game launches via the standard Steam client are likely broken.** Redirecting the catalog API to the BannerHub Worker changes which Steam client component the host resolves at launch. If your Steam games stop launching after upgrading, switch to the **Lightweight Steam client** in the picker — it's the variant that pairs cleanly with the BannerHub catalog. The standard Steam client may still work for some titles, but Lightweight should be your default on this build.
- **Imported games have no cover art by default.** When you add a game via Import, no banner / cover / hero artwork is fetched automatically. Open the imported game's edit screen and set the artwork manually (cover, banner, hero, logo as applicable). The game itself is fully importable and launchable without artwork — this is purely cosmetic.

### Notes

- The base APK is unmodified XiaoJi GameHub 6.0.0; only the bytecode/resources required by the patches above are touched.
- **A fresh install is required if a previous release is still installed.** Each release run generates a new debug keystore, so the signing certificate differs between releases and Android refuses the upgrade with `INSTALL_FAILED_UPDATE_INCOMPATIBLE` (signature mismatch). Uninstall the previous version of the same variant first, then install the new one. Within a single release, all 9 variants are signed with the same cert.
- The `.rvp` patch bundle and `.rve` extension files are also attached for use with `revanced-cli` directly.

releases.name: Gamehub 6.0.2 - BannerHub API - Patched
releases.body:
## Gamehub 6.0.2 - BannerHub API - Patched

A patched build of XiaoJi GameHub 6.0.2 (`com.xiaoji.egggame`, versionCode 112) that removes the login requirement so games can be imported and used without an account, redirects the catalog API to the BannerHub Cloudflare Worker, and ships **9 variants that install side-by-side on the same device**.

### 🔄 Base APK refresh from 6.0.1 → 6.0.2

The 6.0.1 → 6.0.2 minor bump triggered another sweeping R8 letter reshuffle (every single class letter the patches keyed on was reassigned). All bytecode-keyed patches were re-anchored against 6.0.2 via their structural-anchor recipes recorded in the patch sources, so each one continues to apply on the new base:

- **Bypass login** — `AUTH_IMPL` `Lrs0;` → `Lit0;`, `AUTH_INTERFACE` `Lls0;` → `Lct0;`, `AUTH_TOKEN` `Lfdm;` → `Lkpm;`, `GAME_LIB_REPO` `Lhp7;` → `Luu7;` (and its userId-getter renamed `f()` → `e()`), `NAVIGATOR` `Lade;` → `Lxle;`, `NAV_INTERCEPTOR` `Lar0;` → `Lrr0;`. The `MutableStateFlow(value)` factory the patch used to call inline (`Lumn;->h(Object)Lt8k;`) no longer has a return type assignable to the auth interface's StateFlow getters, so we now route through a small `FakeStateFlow` Java helper that wraps the new 6.0.2 holder (`Ltjk;`) in the host's StateFlow adapter (`Lhzh;`) via reflection — keeps the smali edit a single `invoke-static` and avoids growing patched-method `.locals`.
- **Redirect catalog API** — `ENV_ENUM_CLASS` `Lzhj;` → `Lxrj;`. Both Online enum hosts (`landscape-api-cn.vgabc.com`, `landscape-api-oversea.vgabc.com`) still redirect to `bannerhub-api.the412banner.workers.dev`.
- **Prefix API path with /v6** — `Lohb;->b(Lj1a;String)V` → `Lvob;->b(Lm7a;String)V`. The static URL helper still has the same anchor shape (body starts with iget on the builder's URL field then a `Lpll;->s1` string-trim) so the rewrite point is identical.
- **Disable Firebase Crashlytics** / **Mute UI sounds** / **File manager access** / **Rewrite custom permissions** — anchored on full Android / firebase / asset-path / manifest names that R8 doesn't touch, so they continue to apply byte-for-byte without any code change.
- **Debug logging** — re-anchored to 6.0.2's renamed targets: `Lodb;` → `Li86;` (y2d-impl), `Lxm7;->u` → `Luu7;->v` (game-import save), `Ly4i;` → `Lyji;` (RetroGameDao.upsert wrapper), `Ly2d;` → `Lpgd;` (y2d-interface), `Lel7;` → `Lvs7;` (inner Room transaction). Probe semantics unchanged — same logcat tag, same trace markers.

**Migrating from any earlier release:** uninstall the previously-installed BannerHub-ReVanced variant of the same name first — release-to-release the signing keystore changes (CI generates a fresh debug keystore each run), so Android refuses cross-release upgrades with `INSTALL_FAILED_UPDATE_INCOMPATIBLE`. Within v1.0.0-602 itself, all 9 variants share signing and install side-by-side.

### 🆕 New in GameHub 6.0.2 (upstream)

XiaoJi marks 6.0.2 as the official worldwide launch of GameHub. Three headline upgrades bundled with the 6.0.2 base APK that you get automatically by using this build:

1. **Landscape / portrait auto-rotation across the UI** — first-ever rotation support in GameHub; one-tap seamless layout switching optimized for both PC widescreen and mobile / portable form factors.
2. **Epic Games Store integration + Retro module** — full Epic Games support (sync your Epic library, launch from inside GameHub) and a dedicated retro section for arcade and classic-console titles.
3. **AI Super Frame Interpolation in the PC emulator** — runtime frame-interpolation pipeline that lifts effective framerate above native with low added latency for smoother PC-game playback on Android.

(Source: XiaoJi's official 6.0.2 announcement.)

### Source
- **Base APK**: `GameHub_6.0.2.apk` — the official 6.0.2 global build (versionCode 112), attached to [`base-apk-602`](https://github.com/The412Banner/bannerhub-revanced/releases/tag/base-apk-602)
- **Patcher**: ReVanced CLI 6.0.0 + this repo's patch bundle, branch `gamehub-602-build`
- **Repo**: https://github.com/The412Banner/bannerhub-revanced

### Variants

Nine APKs are produced from the same patch bundle, each with a different package name + launcher label so they install side-by-side. The `Original` variant **replaces** an installed GameHub; the rest install **alongside** the original.

| Variant | APK | Package | Launcher label |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Normal | `GameHub-6.0.2-Patched-Normal.apk` | `banner.hub` | GameHub |
| Normal (GHL) | `GameHub-6.0.2-Patched-Normal(GHL).apk` | `gamehub.lite` | GameHub |
| PuBG | `GameHub-6.0.2-Patched-PuBG.apk` | `com.tencent.ig` | GameHub PuBG |
| AnTuTu | `GameHub-6.0.2-Patched-AnTuTu.apk` | `com.antutu.ABenchMark` | GameHub AnTuTu |
| alt-AnTuTu | `GameHub-6.0.2-Patched-alt-AnTuTu.apk` | `com.antutu.benchmark.full` | GameHub AnTuTu |
| PuBG-CrossFire | `GameHub-6.0.2-Patched-PuBG-CrossFire.apk` | `com.tencent.tmgp.cf` | GameHub PuBG CrossFire |
| Ludashi | `GameHub-6.0.2-Patched-Ludashi.apk` | `com.ludashi.aibench` | GameHub Ludashi |
| Genshin | `GameHub-6.0.2-Patched-Genshin.apk` | `com.miHoYo.GenshinImpact` | GameHub Genshin |
| Original | `GameHub-6.0.2-Patched-Original.apk` | `com.xiaoji.egggame` | GameHub |

### Patches applied

| --- | --- |
| **Bypass login** | Skips the login screen entirely. Replaces `it0.h()`'s isLoggedIn StateFlow to emit `TRUE`, replaces `it0.e()`'s user-account StateFlow to emit a synthetic `fpm{user_id="99999"}` so library queries return rows, replaces `uu7.e()` and `ct0.f()` to keep the user-id consistent across read/write paths, and short-circuits the `xle.i/r` Login navigator gates plus the `rr0.a` NavigationInterceptor. | **Disable Firebase Crashlytics** | Removes the Crashlytics initialisation block in reverse instruction order so the ART verifier accepts the resulting bytecode. Without this, GameHub 6.0.2 crashes on launch with `VerifyError`. |
| **Debug logging** | Sets `android:debuggable="true"` and inserts `Log.i("GH600-DEBUG", ...)` markers along the import code path (Save → Room DAO inserts) plus a `Throwable` hook on the global exception swallower. | **File manager access** | Adds an exposed `MTDataFiles` content provider so external file managers can browse GameHub's data directory. The provider authority and wake-up activity `taskAffinity` are derived per-variant from `packageNameOption.value` so two variants don't collide on `INSTALL_FAILED_CONFLICTING_PROVIDER`. |
| **Rewrite custom permissions per variant** | Iterates the manifest's `<permission>` and `<uses-permission>` elements; any whose name starts `com.xiaoji.egggame.permission.` (notably the Mob Push SDK's `C2D_MESSAGE`) gets the prefix rewritten to the variant package. Without this, Android 7+ rejects the second-installed variant with `INSTALL_FAILED_DUPLICATE_PERMISSION`. |
| **Mute UI sounds** | Replaces the bundled UI feedback sounds (`assets/.../sound/*.wav`) with silent PCM, so menu navigation and button taps no longer click. The patch substitutes the resource at packaging time — no runtime audio routing is changed. |
| **Redirect catalog API** | Patches the `zhj` environment enum's `Online` value so the catalog API's `cnHost` and `overseaHost` both point at the BannerHub Cloudflare Worker (`bannerhub-api.the412banner.workers.dev`) instead of `landscape-api-{cn,oversea}.vgabc.com`. The Worker serves a curated component catalog from GitHub Pages and forwards unallowlisted paths back to the original upstream with the original signed-request behavior preserved. Beta + Test enum values, the analytics hosts, and the bigeyes CDN are intentionally untouched. **Side benefit:** the per-game **PC game settings** screen now renders correctly in both landscape *and* portrait orientation. Upstream's response constrained the screen to landscape only; the BannerHub Worker's payload doesn't carry that constraint, so the picker is usable from a portrait-held phone for the first time. |
| **Prefix API path with /v6** | Hooks `ohb.b(j1a, String)` — the single Ktor URL-builder chokepoint every relative API call funnels through — and prepends `v6/` to the path. Together with **Redirect catalog API**, this lets the Worker serve 6.0-only response variants (firmware 1.3.5 vs 1.3.3, `base.fileType=0`, the `EnvListData` wrapper required by 6.0's kotlinx-strict deserializer) without affecting 5.x clients, which never carry the prefix. Full URLs (`http://`, `https://`) are passed through untouched so direct downloads still work. |
| **Change package name** *(per variant)* | Rewrites the APK's package name to the variant's value listed above. The `Original` variant keeps `com.xiaoji.egggame`. |
| **Change app name** *(per variant)* | Rewrites the launcher label to the variant's value listed above. |

### ⚠ Known limitations — please read

- **Steam game launches via the standard Steam client are likely broken.** Redirecting the catalog API to the BannerHub Worker changes which Steam client component the host resolves at launch. If your Steam games stop launching after upgrading, switch to the **Lightweight Steam client** in the picker — it's the variant that pairs cleanly with the BannerHub catalog. The standard Steam client may still work for some titles, but Lightweight should be your default on this build.
- ~~**Imported games have no cover art by default.**~~ **Fixed 2026-05-11 in the BannerHub Worker** (deploy `5fd6c6a7…`). The PC-EXE import recognition call (`/simulator/getLocalGameDetail`) was falling through to the worker's anonymous-passthrough path, so upstream returned an empty `LocalGameInfoSvrEntity` and imported games landed with no artwork. The endpoint is now on the same authenticated-proxy branch as the vjoy/Scheme endpoints — client headers are forwarded and the shared `bannerhub_token` is injected, so upstream returns populated `logo`/`cover_image`/`back_image`/`hero_capsule`/`square_image` fields. **No APK rebuild required** — the fix is server-side and applies retroactively to this build.

### Notes

- The base APK is unmodified XiaoJi GameHub 6.0.2; only the bytecode/resources required by the patches above are touched.

Uninstall the previous version of the same variant first, then install the new one. Within a single release, all 9 variants are signed with the same cert.
