| Patch | What it does |
| --- | --- |
| **Bypass login** | Skips the login screen entirely. Patches the `g8e` navigator so the Login route is never selected, replaces `os0.h()`'s isLoggedIn StateFlow to emit `TRUE`, replaces `os0.e()`'s user-account StateFlow to emit a synthetic `f4m{user_id="99999"}` so library queries return rows, and replaces `xm7.f()` and `is0.f()` to keep the user-id consistent across the read and write code paths. Result: launches straight into the home screen; game-import saves persist to `db_game_library.db`; imported games appear in the library list. |
| **Disable Firebase Crashlytics** | Removes the Crashlytics initialisation block in reverse instruction order so the ART verifier accepts the resulting bytecode. Without this, GameHub 6.0 crashes on launch with `VerifyError`. |
| **Debug logging** | Sets `android:debuggable="true"` and inserts `Log.i("GH600-DEBUG", ...)` markers along the import code path (`xm7.u`, `el7.invokeSuspend`, both Room DAO inserts) plus a `Throwable` hook on the `odb.e()` global swallower. Used to triage the import flow during development; will be removed in a follow-up build once the import flow is confirmed stable. |
| **File manager access** | Adds an exposed `MTDataFiles` content provider so external file managers can browse GameHub's data directory. |
| **Mute UI sounds** | Replaces the bundled UI feedback sounds (`assets/.../sound/*.wav`) with silent PCM, so menu navigation and button taps no longer click. The patch substitutes the resource at packaging time — no runtime audio routing is changed. |
| **Redirect catalog API** | Patches the `mcj` environment enum's `Online` value so the catalog API's `cnHost` and `overseaHost` both point at the BannerHub Cloudflare Worker (`bannerhub-api.the412banner.workers.dev`) instead of `landscape-api-{cn,oversea}.vgabc.com`. The Worker serves a curated component catalog from GitHub Pages and forwards unallowlisted paths back to the original upstream with the original signed-request behavior preserved. Beta + Test enum values, the analytics hosts, and the bigeyes CDN are intentionally untouched. **Side benefit:** the per-game **PC game settings** screen now renders correctly in both landscape *and* portrait orientation. Upstream's response constrained the screen to landscape only; the BannerHub Worker's payload doesn't carry that constraint, so the picker is usable from a portrait-held phone for the first time. |
| **Prefix API path with /v6** | Hooks `zdb.b(qx9, String)` — the single chokepoint every relative API call funnels through — and prepends `v6/` to the path. Together with **Redirect catalog API**, this lets the Worker serve 6.0-only response variants (firmware 1.3.4 vs 1.3.3, `base.fileType=0`, the `EnvListData` wrapper required by 6.0's kotlinx-strict deserializer) without affecting 5.x clients, which never carry the prefix. Full URLs (`http://`, `https://`) are passed through untouched so direct downloads still work. |
| **Change package name** *(per variant)* | Rewrites the APK's package name to the variant's value listed above. The `Original` variant keeps `com.xiaoji.egggame`. |
| **Change app name** *(per variant)* | Rewrites the launcher label to the variant's value listed above. |

### ⚠ Known limitations — please read

- **Steam game launches via the standard Steam client are likely broken.** Redirecting the catalog API to the BannerHub Worker changes which Steam client component the host resolves at launch. If your Steam games stop launching after upgrading, switch to the **Lightweight Steam client** in the picker — it's the variant that pairs cleanly with the BannerHub catalog. The standard Steam client may still work for some titles, but Lightweight should be your default on this build.
- **Imported games have no cover art by default.** When you add a game via Import, no banner / cover / hero artwork is fetched automatically. Open the imported game's edit screen and set the artwork manually (cover, banner, hero, logo as applicable). The game itself is fully importable and launchable without artwork — this is purely cosmetic.

### Notes

- The base APK is unmodified XiaoJi GameHub 6.0.0; only the bytecode/resources required by the patches above are touched.
- **A fresh install is required if a previous release is still installed.** Each release run generates a new debug keystore, so the signing certificate differs between releases and Android refuses the upgrade with `INSTALL_FAILED_UPDATE_INCOMPATIBLE` (signature mismatch). Uninstall the previous version of the same variant first, then install the new one. Within a single release, all 9 variants are signed with the same cert.
- The `.rvp` patch bundle and `.rve` extension files are also attached for use with `revanced-cli` directly.

releases.name: GameHub 6.0 No Login
releases.body:
## GameHub 6.0 No Login

A patched build of XiaoJi GameHub 6.0.0 (`com.xiaoji.egggame`) that removes the login requirement so games can be imported and used without an account.

### Source
- **Base APK**: `GameHub_beta_6.0.0_global.apk` — the official 6.0.0 global build
- **Patcher**: ReVanced CLI 6.0.0 + this repo's patch bundle, branch `gamehub-600-build`
- **Repo**: https://github.com/The412Banner/bannerhub-revanced

### Variants

Nine APKs are produced from the same patch bundle, each with a different package name + launcher label so they install side-by-side. The `Original` variant **replaces** an installed GameHub; the rest install **alongside** the original.

| Variant | APK | Package | Launcher label |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Normal | `GameHub-6.0-Patched-Normal.apk` | `banner.hub` | GameHub |
| Normal (GHL) | `GameHub-6.0-Patched-Normal(GHL).apk` | `gamehub.lite` | GameHub |
| PuBG | `GameHub-6.0-Patched-PuBG.apk` | `com.tencent.ig` | GameHub PuBG |
| AnTuTu | `GameHub-6.0-Patched-AnTuTu.apk` | `com.antutu.ABenchMark` | GameHub AnTuTu |
| alt-AnTuTu | `GameHub-6.0-Patched-alt-AnTuTu.apk` | `com.antutu.benchmark.full` | GameHub AnTuTu |
| PuBG-CrossFire | `GameHub-6.0-Patched-PuBG-CrossFire.apk` | `com.tencent.tmgp.cf` | GameHub PuBG CrossFire |
| Ludashi | `GameHub-6.0-Patched-Ludashi.apk` | `com.ludashi.aibench` | GameHub Ludashi |
| Genshin | `GameHub-6.0-Patched-Genshin.apk` | `com.miHoYo.GenshinImpact` | GameHub Genshin |
| Original | `GameHub-6.0-Patched-Original.apk` | `com.xiaoji.egggame` | GameHub |

### Patches applied

| Patch | What it does |
| --- | --- |
| **Bypass login** | Skips the login screen entirely. Patches the `g8e` navigator so the Login route is never selected, replaces `os0.h()`'s isLoggedIn StateFlow to emit `TRUE`, replaces `os0.e()`'s user-account StateFlow to emit a synthetic `f4m{user_id="99999"}` so library queries return rows, and replaces `xm7.f()` and `is0.f()` to keep the user-id consistent across the read and write code paths. Result: launches straight into the home screen; game-import saves persist to `db_game_library.db`; imported games appear in the library list. |
| **Disable Firebase Crashlytics** | Removes the Crashlytics initialisation block in reverse instruction order so the ART verifier accepts the resulting bytecode. Without this, GameHub 6.0 crashes on launch with `VerifyError`. |
| **Debug logging** | Sets `android:debuggable="true"` and inserts `Log.i("GH600-DEBUG", ...)` markers along the import code path (`xm7.u`, `el7.invokeSuspend`, both Room DAO inserts) plus a `Throwable` hook on the `odb.e()` global swallower. Used to triage the import flow during development; will be removed in a follow-up build once the import flow is confirmed stable. |
| **File manager access** | Adds an exposed `MTDataFiles` content provider so external file managers can browse GameHub's data directory. |
| **Change package name** *(per variant)* | Rewrites the APK's package name to the variant's value listed above. The `Original` variant keeps `com.xiaoji.egggame`. |
| **Change app name** *(per variant)* | Rewrites the launcher label to the variant's value listed above. |

### Notes

- The base APK is unmodified XiaoJi GameHub 6.0.0; only the bytecode/resources required by the patches above are touched.
- All APKs are signed with the ReVanced default debug keystore. To upgrade in place between releases, install the same variant.
- The `.rvp` patch bundle and `.rve` extension files are also attached for use with `revanced-cli` directly.

releases.name: v1.3.2
releases.body:
Fixes:
- Notification action "Exit" not terminating service when not in focus. - @LossyDragon @oxters168
- Proper fix for library padding crash from 1.3.1 hotfix. - @LossyDragon
- Left pane in a 2-Pane layout should fill the width properly (Library and Friends list) - @LossyDragon
- Hide keyboard when pressing search/enter button. - @LossyDragon
- Fix family shared games missing from library list @LossyDragon @oxters168

Additions:
- New app icon/logo by @Prowi3 Huge THANK YOU for this awesome icon!
- Apply new icons for Pluvia. - @LossyDragon @oxters168
- Expose some debug options in Settings. - @LossyDragon
- Friends list now shows game names. - @LossyDragon
- "Family" filter item for library list - @LossyDragon

Dependency Updates: 
- JavaSteam 1.6.1 with Family Sharing support and misc fixes.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/oxters168/Pluvia/compare/v1.3.1...v1.3.2

releases.name: v1.3.1
releases.body:
# Hotfix
Fix of crash for top padding must be non-negative

releases.name: v1.3.0
releases.body:
Additions: 
- [Preference] Day, Night, Auto theme.
- [Preference] Theme color palette.
- [Preference] Which screen to launch on. (Library, Downloads, or Friends).
- Chatting with friends, with message history, emoticon and sticker support. 
- Friend profiles, with basic friend management.
- Option to view external web links in app or externally with a browser of choice.
- Game app screen shows basic information.
- More library filer options, which are retained. 

Fixes: 
- Profile dialog works better for long names now.
- Crash when null messages are logged. 
- Crashes when a failed sign in occurred, such as invalid credentials. 
- Correct display of install/run button and download progress for apps. Thanks @Producdevity
- Add smooth transitions for download state. Thanks @Producdevity
- Friends list groups able to be collapsible now.
- Library scroll position should remember when navigating away.
- Library list optimization.
- Soft resize issue with on-screen keyboard is opened/closed.
- Rotating the screen closes some dialogs.
- Dialog list scrolling on small screen height. Thanks @Producdevity
- Themed app icon being oversized.
- Game app screen image loading shifting.

Changes: 
- Connection to steam now uses the Web Socket protocol.
- Login errors are shown in a snackbar.
- Various theme unification for light and dark mode.
- Various Compose tweaks.
- Access tokens now encrypted.
- Removed automatic app backup.
- Actively filter out Spacewar (game).
- Library filter options now is a bottom sheet modal.

Misc: 
- Add Github Actions for snapshot and validation builds.
- Update readme.
- Dependency updates. Now using JavaSteam 1.6.0.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/oxters168/Pluvia/compare/v1.2.0...v1.3.0

releases.name: v1.2.0
releases.body:
## What's Changed

- Readme updates.
- Add library search functionality.
- Add container settings
    - Add per app container settings.
    - Add default app container settings (Settings).
    - Add Box64 presets (Settings). 
- Change how the crash log report is organized.
- Allow the login screen to scroll when keyboard takes up too much of the screen when in landscape
- Fix the service from being stopped and started in login screen when device is rotated.
- Fix retry button in login screen when QR login times out.
- Fix infinite loading when signing out of Pluvia.
- Show which Fab filter is applied in Library list.
- JavaSteam snapshot updates.
- Various internal refactoring.


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/oxters168/Pluvia/compare/v1.1.0...v1.2.0

releases.name: GameHub Brasil v2.0
releases.body:
# 🎮 GameHub Brasil v2.0 🇧🇷

## 🌟 Destaques desta Versão O GameHub Brasil v2.0 chega para revolucionar como você gerencia seus jogos e drivers. Focamos totalmente na flexibilidade e compatibilidade, permitindo que você importe seus próprios arquivos, gerencie perfis de controle com facilidade e leve a experiência de jogos para dispositivos de qualquer gama de desempenho. --- 🚀 Novidades e Recursos Implementados --- ## 📥AdrenoHub Drivers (Adrenotools). ✅ Integração Adrenotools: Sistema robusto para gerenciamento de drivers Vulkan. 📂 Importação Flexível: Suporte para importação de drivers Turnip no formato .zip. 💾 Fontes Variadas: Carregue drivers de fontes externas ou diretamente do armazenamento local do seu dispositivo. ## 📂 Contents Hub Centralize seus conteúdos de forma prática e rápida. 🎮 Formato .wcp: Importação completa de Contents no formato proprietário. 🔄 Compatibilidade Híbrida: Suporte a arquivos externos e locais. ⚠️ Nota Técnica: O importador de conteúdo está funcional, porém, a importação do **Wine** ainda enfrenta limitações devido a diferenças de arquitetura, estando em aperfeiçoamento. ## 🕹️ Personalização de Controle Jogue do seu jeito, sem precisar configurar tudo do zero. 📥 Importação de Perfis: Adicione perfis de controle personalizados para jogos específicos. 🌐 Fontes Externas: Compatibilidade com perfis baixados da comunidade. 🎯 Praticidade: Aplicação rápida para agilizar o setup dos seus jogos favoritos. ## 💾 Suporte a Armazenamento Externo (OTG) Mais espaço e liberdade para sua biblioteca de jogos. 🔌 Reconhecimento OTG: O app agora detecta e gerencia perfeitamente pen drives e HDs externos conectados via OTG. 📂 Jogar Externo: Instale e rode seus jogos diretamente do armazenamento removível. ## ⚡ LowSpecsExperienceV13 Leve jogos pesados para hardwares mais modestos. 📉 Otimização Gráfica: Programa dedicado a reduzir e otimizar jogos. 🎮 Foco em Jogabilidade: Prioriza FPS e estabilidade em detrimento de efeitos pesados. 📱 Inclusão Total: Já incluído nativamente nesta versão em Componentes. ## ✅ Wrappers e Vortek A ponte entre o sistema Android e seus jogos. 🛠️ Gerenciamento Avançado: Inclusão do sistema de Wrappers e Vortek, similar ao encontrado no Winlator. 🔁 Seleção de Drivers: Permite escolher a camada de compatibilidade ideal para cada título. ## 🔧 Melhorias Técnicas Esta versão focou na arquitetura interna do aplicativo para suportar as novas funções de importação: 🔨 Refatoração do Gerenciador de Arquivos: Melhorias na leitura de caminhos locais e externos. 🛡️ Estabilidade em Importações: Tratamento de erros aprimorado ao ler arquivos .zip e .wcp ## 📥 Informações de Download Nome do Arquivo: GameHub-Brasil-v2.0.apk Requisitos Mínimos: Android 8.0 (Oreo) ou superior 4GB de RAM (Recomendado 6GB+ para uso do LowSpecsExperience) 3GB de espaço livre (Para instalação e drivers) GPU com suporte a Vulkan 1.1+ Dispositivo com suporte a OTG (Opcional, para armazenamento externo) ## 🙏 Agradecimentos Essa versão é um grande passo em direção à personalização. Agradecemos a todos os testadores que validaram as novas funções e algumas que foram importadas do Winlator Ludashi [StevenMXZ](https://github.com/StevenMXZ/Winlator-Ludashi) E para você ficar por dentro do houve no app, segue o vídeo do nosso parceiro [BrunoAndroid](https://www.youtube.com/@BrunoAndroid) explicando sobre o funcionamento do app:

## 📞 Suporte e Feedback Encontrou algum bug na importação de drivers ou no Contents Hub? 🐛 Reporte problemas na aba [Issues](../../issues) 💡 Compartilhe seus perfis de controle e wrappers na comunidade 💡 Compartilhe ideias em [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@winlatorbrasil) ⭐ Se gostou da atualização, deixe uma estrela no repositório! --- ## 📥 Sobre os pacotes que você deve baixar | Posição (prioridade) | Nome / Categoria | Package name | Motivo de uso (performance / detecção) | |---------------------|--------------------------------------------------|--------------------------------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------| | 1 | Futuremark | com.futuremark.dmandroid.application | Benchmark GPU moderno (Wild Life / Solar Bay), referência para modo gamer em vários aparelhos atuais, excelente para GPUs Mali/Adreno. | | 2 | GFXBench | com.gfxbench.glbenchmark | Benchmark gráfico com cenários antigos e atuais (T-Rex, Manhattan, etc.), excelente para GPUs Mali/Adreno. | | 3 | AnTuTu | com.antutu.ABenchMark | Benchmark geral muito popular (CPU + GPU + RAM + UX), frequentemente usado para liberar modo turbo em ROMs chinesas. | | 4 | Ludashi | com.ludashi.benchmark | Benchmark chinês focado em score geral e otimização, conhecido por acionar perfis especiais em alguns devices e ROMs custom. | | 5 | Redmagic | com.riotgames.league.wildrift | Usado por fabricantes para ativar modos de alta performance e alta taxa de quadros. | | 6 | MiHoYo | com.mihoyo.yuanshen | Usado como “teste real” de SoC e gatilho de perfil gamer. | | 7 | PUBG | com.tencent.ig | Tradicionalmente incluído em listas de otimização para reduzir lag e melhorar estabilidade de FPS. | | 8 | GameHub Brasil | com.gamehub.brasil | App genérico/launcher para cenário “normal”, útil para manter um perfil padrão sem overclock ou boost ativado. | ---
**Desenvolvido com ❤️ para a comunidade gaming brasileira** *Jogue mais, jogue melhor!* **V2.0: Mais liberdade, mais jogos!**

releases.name: GameHub Brasil v1.0
releases.body:
# 🎮 GameHub Brasil v1.0 🇧🇷

--- ## 🌟 Destaques desta Versão Esta versão representa um marco significativo em otimização e estabilidade, trazendo melhorias substanciais de performance para todos os chipsets suportados, além de uma experiência visual completamente renovada e novos componentes de emulação de última geração. --- ## 📦 Novos Componentes e Drivers ### **Box64** - Camada de Tradução x86_64 Atualizações importantes para melhor compatibilidade e performance: - ✨ **Box64 0.3.8** - Versão estável com correções críticas - 🚀 **Box64 0.3.9-d730610** - Build de desenvolvimento com otimizações avançadas - ⚡ **WowBox64 0.3.9-d730610** - Variante otimizada para gaming ### **DXVK** - Camada de Tradução DirectX para Vulkan Nova série com GPLAsync e Link-Lazy para máxima performance: - 🎯 **DXVK-GPLAsync-LL 2.6.3-1** - Base estável com async pipeline - 🔧 **DXVK-GPLAsync-LL 2.6.4-1** - Correções e melhorias incrementais - 💎 **DXVK-GPLAsync-LL 2.7.1-1** - Versão mais recente com otimizações de shader ### **FEX-Emu** - Emulador x86/x86_64 - 🆕 **FEXCore-2510** - Última geração do núcleo de emulação com melhorias significativas de velocidade ### **Turnip** - Driver Vulkan Mesa para Adreno Suporte completo ao Mesa 26.0.0: - 🔥 **Turnip v26.0.0 R1 Autotuner** - Ajuste automático de performance baseado em GPU - ⚙️ **Turnip v26.0.0 R1** - Versão padrão otimizada --- ## ⚡ Otimizações de Performance por Chipset Esta versão inclui ajustes específicos para extrair o máximo desempenho de cada arquitetura: ### 🔥 **Snapdragon (Qualcomm)** - Otimizações para GPUs Adreno - Perfis customizados para séries 6xx, 7xx e 8xx - Melhor aproveitamento de cache L2/L3 ### 🚀 **Dimensity / Helio (MediaTek)** - Ajustes para arquitetura ARM Mali - Balanceamento de carga entre clusters CPU - Otimização de thermal throttling ### 💫 **Exynos (Samsung)** - Perfis específicos para Mali e Xclipse - Gerenciamento inteligente de frequências - Compatibilidade aprimorada com drivers --- ## 🎨 Renovação Visual Completa ### **Interface Modernizada** - 🖼️ **Novo Wallpaper Principal** - Design moderno e imersivo - 🎬 **Intro Redesenhada** - Animação de inicialização atualizada - 🎨 **Paleta de Cores Renovada** - Esquema cromático mais harmônico e profissional - 🌈 **Wallpapers Adicionais** - Nova coleção de papéis de parede temáticos ### **Seção "Sobre" Aprimorada** - 📝 HTML customizado em "Informações Pessoais" - 💼 Layout mais profissional e organizado - ℹ️ Informações atualizadas e detalhadas --- ## 🌐 Novos Recursos ### **Feed de Notícias & Jogos Grátis** - 📰 Fique atualizado com as últimas notícias do mundo dos games - 🎁 Descubra jogos gratuitos disponíveis - 🔔 Sistema de notificações para novos conteúdos ### **Tradução PT-BR Automática** - 🇧🇷 Interface completamente em Português do Brasil - 🔤 Tradução inteligente de conteúdos dinâmicos --- ## 🔧 Melhorias Técnicas e Correções ### **Otimização de Conectividade** - ❌ **Removida integração direta com GitHub** - Solução definitiva para erro "429: Too Many Requests" - Eliminação de problemas de carregamento do menu ### **Estabilidade Geral** - 🛡️ Correções de bugs críticos - ⚙️ Gerenciamento de recursos otimizado --- ## 📥 Informações de Download **Nome do Arquivo:** `GameHub-Brasil-v1.0.apk` **Requisitos Mínimos:** - Android 8.0 (Oreo) ou superior - 2GB de RAM (4GB recomendado) - 500MB de espaço livre - GPU com suporte a Vulkan 1.1+ --- ## 🙏 Agradecimentos Agradecemos a toda comunidade GameHub Brasil pelo feedback contínuo e suporte. Esta versão é resultado direto das sugestões e relatórios de vocês! E ao GameHub Lite 🤜🤛. --- ## 📞 Suporte e Feedback Encontrou algum problema ou tem sugestões? - 🐛 Reporte bugs na aba [Issues](../../issues) - 💡 Compartilhe ideias em [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@winlatorbrasil) - ⭐ Se gostou, deixe uma estrela no repositório! ---
**Desenvolvido com ❤️ para a comunidade gaming brasileira** *Jogue mais, jogue melhor!*

releases.name: Winlator 11.1 hotfix 2 mod Ajay (old version)
releases.body:
## Changelog (Based on Official v11.1 Hotfix 2)

(Go to Official Winlator GitHub to get latest winlator 11.1 final)
---
### **Ajay_Custom_Components**
You can install various components—such as d7vk, dxwrapper_ddraw, dxwrapper_d3d8, d3d8to9, and custom—directly from the `D:/winlator/Ajay_Custom_Components` directory. If a newer version of these components becomes available, simply replace the existing DLLs in that folder to update them.

These components will be installed upon container launch, not shortcut launch.

### **Drive Path Update**
* **Path Migration:** Changed `drive E` to `drive K` for `installed_components`.
* **Manual Installation:** Supported manual copying of components directly to `drive K\installed_components\`.

### **System & Environment**
* **Automated Symlink:** Mapped `C:\users` to `Z:\home\Ajay_drive\users` to prevent save data loss when switching containers.
* **Environment Variables:** Added some env variables.
* **Box64rc Optimization:** Updated config for trainer compatibility and added "trainer" keyword logic for auto-application.

### **Quick Access (Start Menu)**
* **Components Downloader:** Added GUI app for one-click downloads of **Box64**, **Turnip**, **DXVK** etc.
* **Latest box64rc Downloader:** Added option to download the latest **Ajay.box64rc** instantly.
---
#### Note : Don't Change drive K path.
---

## 📁 Necessary Components and Tools

### ✅ [D3D Local tzst Files Collection](https://github.com/ajay9634/PcEmuFiles-Hub/releases/tag/D3D_tzst)  
### ⚙️ [Ajay Prefix Pro](https://github.com/ajay9634/Ajay-prefix) 

---

Release Date - 15 June 2026

* **Automated Setup:** Implemented automatic configuration for SymLink folders and required dependencies.
* **Environment Variables:** Added new environment variables for improved configuration.
* **Start Menu:** Added an automatic update check feature to the Start Menu.
* **Box64rc:** Updated `box64rc` specifically for trainer compatibility.

---

### Final Update
* **SymLink Fix:** Resolved an issue causing the SymLink process to repeat unnecessarily.
* **Autorun.exe:** The application now runs without a console window.
* **Bug Fixes:** General stability improvements and minor bug resolutions.

### How to run ajau3 Script for downloading latest dxvk and turnip etc ?
Just install Ajay Prefix Pro then double click on it.
Requirements : Drive K should be mounted of this path -  `/data/data/com.winlator/files`

### How to run the trainer with game performance presets?
Simply include the word **"trainer"** in the filename of your game trainer or Cheat Engine application.

### Winlator.Ajay.Components.Downloader.ajau3 -
this program can be run after installing Ajay Prefix Pro. It can download latest installable components (box64 , turnip , wined3d , dxvk , vkd3d etc).

---
*Note: This release focuses exclusively on streamlining and automating the setup process. Do not close the container if any of the following processes are active in Task Manager: autorun.exe, cmd.exe, wget.exe, xcopy.exe, or 7z.exe.*

releases.name: Winlator 9 Proot Ajay v3
releases.body:
### Changelog -

- Updated Installable Components path (Box64, Turnip, etc.)
- Bugs fixed

#### Note  -
This is a clone app. It can be installed alongside the official latest Winlator.

### What's special about Winlator PRoot build -
It uses the latest Wine from Kron4ek, but without the XInput patch.This is the final PRoot-based build.It can be useful for running older PC games.The latest Box64 version is not included in this build.

### Note about Upcoming Winlator Updates  -
If a major improvement is released in the official Winlator or if I need to create a backup. Currently, there is no need to modify the latest official Winlator as it is already well-optimized — simply install Ajay Prefix Pro.

releases.name: dev7
releases.body:
IMPORTANT NOTICE
preinstalled FEXCore 2505 might fail to load on some devices use the 2508.1 wcp instead till I hotfix it tommrow.


### Release Notes

* Merged branch 'winlator_bionic' from pipetto-crypto into 'winlator_bionic_dev5'.
* Refactored 'ContainerDetailFragment' to partially fix setupDXWrapper logic.
* Updated v762 and v805 to v819.
* Added required variables to 'GuestProgramLauncherComponent' to disable the proton mediaconverter plugin.
* 'ContainerDetailFragment': Recreated config if wrapper version is empty.
* Defaulted to 'turnip25.1.0' on supported devices.
* 'Vulkan': Minor refactoring.
* 'GraphicsDriverConfigDialog': Blacklisted unsupported drivers.
* 'DXVKConfigDialog': Blacklisted 'arm64ec dxvk' on non 'arm64ec' containers.
* Removed non-necessary assets.
* 'GLRenderer': Added 'force fullscreen' option.
* Fixed background selection in container settings.
* 'StorageInfoDialog': Refactored.
* Removed unused 'RestoreActivity' class.
* Removed all code related to the 'SaveManager'.
* Removed the option to export containers.
* Removed the option to import containers.
* 'SettingsFragment': Removed backup and restore data options.
* Assets: Fixed wrong 'aarch64 dlls'.
* Removed all references to 'Winlator 7.1.2' legacy input mode.
* 'VKD3DVersionItem': Does not force version on assets files.
* Removed 'TerminalActivity' and all related code.
* 'Vulkan': Minor refactoring.
* Deleted saves, the magnifier, and screen effects.
* Changed shortcut text color to white.
* Defaulted background key press to shortcut list like the start page.
* Brought back container icons.

releases.name: Winlator bionic ref4ik mod v10 Hotfix
releases.body:
## Winlator Mod bionic — ref4ik v10 Hotfix 

**What's New in This Version:**


- Fixed VKD3D selection in settings.

- Fixed the issue in shortcut settings where it was impossible to select FEX on third-party Wine (arm64ec)

- Tightened the search for game cover art



<details>
<summary>← Click here to view full previous changelog</summary>

### Previous Major Updates

🟣 Fixed FPS counter  
🟣 Fixed error in driver loading menu  
🟣 Removed limitation — now all Turnip drivers are shown in every repository (not just the first 10)  
🟣 **AdrenoTools**: added option to export downloaded driver to device storage  
🟣 Added option to hide FEX/Box config files when one is selected  
🟣 Game shortcut icons now load from **Steam**  
🟣 **Adreno Settings**: added initial parameters (work in progress)  
🟣 Integrated **AdrenoTools Store** for extended driver functionality  
🟣 Introduced **Wrapper v2** — improved driver selection UI  
🟣 Added fast **WFM** implementation from de0ver  
🟣 Added full **Russian** language support  
🟣 Reworked input controls settings:  
  → Now you can add custom icons to controls  
  → Go to control profile editor → select icons → apply  
  → Long-press icon to remove  
🟣 Added modular **FPS counter** in xservermenu (select parameters & save config)  
🟣 Updated Task Manager: added GPU and battery temperature indicators  
🟣 Changed application color scheme  
🟣 FPS counter: fixed bugs + added dimming option  
🟣 Input controls: added slider for custom icon size  
🟣 Fixed crash when adding Wine Proton  
🟣 **Active Windows**: now you can open/close running programs (UI/functionality to be improved later)  
🟣 Added built-in **File Manager**  
🟣 New screen effects  
🟣 Some FEX-related changes  
🟣 Ported components from 0.3.7.1 (Fex2508–2509)  
🟣 Partially updated app theme  
🟣 Fixed multiple bugs  
🟣 Changes in graphics driver handling  
🟣 Added **ALSA reflector**  
🟣 Fixed frame rate issues  
🟣 Updated image installer  
🟣 Added gamepad detection  
🟣 Added URL content support  
🟣 Big **"Putre"** button for quick game settings  
🟣 Moved preset frame parameters into container  
🟣 Added more options in graphics driver settings  
🟣 Added hotkey-based manual export  
🟣 Fixed wallpaper adding  
🟣 Fixed fullscreen mode  
🟣 Fixed hotkey settings  
🟣 Increased custom icon limit: 27 → 1000  
🟣 Fixed conflict with simultaneous Termux installation  
🟣 Control settings: added option to disable button outline + transparency slider  
🟣 Various design improvements  
🟣 Significantly improved Active Windows behavior  
🟣 Greatly improved manual shortcut import  
🟣 Added **FEX** preset  
🟣 Added ability to install Windows components  
🟣 Added DXVK & Turnip download into container  
🟣 Added audio driver settings  
🟣 Improved FPS counter: new design, draggable, more size options  
🟣 Added FPS limiter  
🟣 Added app language selector in settings  
🟣 Added Box/FEX/etc. buttons for hotkey preset creation  
🟣 Added import/export for Box (.boxx) and FEX (.fexx) presets
- Added my custom modified **WFM**  
- Added ability to download **Wine** directly into the container  
- Updated **Content Manager**  
- Updated **Credits & Acknowledgements** section  
- Fixed multiple issues in translations  
- Added **Voltage** parameter to the FPS counter 
  - Icon Manager: Added support for ZIP packs and Input Bridge IPK icon packs.  (experimental)

- UI Update: The application has been fully migrated to Compose UI.

- Theme Manager: Added a new theme manager.

- Added SurfaceFlinger renderer and a choice between Vulkan/SurfaceFlinger in container settings.

- Removed wrappers v2–v6.

- Added Vulkan version selection to graphics settings.

- Added Adreno Turbo Mode (may slightly boost FPS when enabled).

- FPS Counter: Added customizable styles and color options for the FPS counter.

- Shortcut Settings: Updated the shortcut menu; navigating to the edit menu now opens a Steam game info page featuring screenshots, videos, ratings, etc.

- Updated the Steam interface and fixed various download bugs. Fixed Steam online status. Accelerated game downloads and increased the download queue limit. Added Steam Friends List with chat support. Added Steam Achievements viewer. Added library view modes: Grid, List, and Compact. Improved cloud saves. Fixed the "last played game" display in Steam.

- Sped up resource extraction on the first app launch.

- Removed several unused components, reducing the overall app size.

- Updated various system libraries.

- Integrated the MMKV library.

- Fixed CPU available extensions display.

- Improved Box/Fex component downloading inside container settings.

- Fixed a bug where enabling any screen effect caused the screen to split into two windows.

- Added an option to download drivers to the Adreno Tools store from StevenMXZ/Adreno-Tools-Drivers.

- Added GPU name selection + CustomName in CPU settings.

- Added Leegao wrapper.

- Added on-screen controls import from Input Bridge.  (experimental)

- Added selection and export of community configurations (experimental)

- Localization: Added Portuguese translation.
- Fixed various bugs in the FPS counter  
- Interface improvements and polishing   
- Added Chinese language  
- Added a new HDR effect to screen effects  
- Improved active windows  
- Fixed control settings  
- Fixed some bugs in themes  
- Fixed some minor bugs 
- - Added the ability to add your own custom repository with drivers in Adrenotools

- Added gyroscope control

- Added update check

- Fixed some bugs

- Added download buttons for Box and FEX in the container and in the shortcut settings

- Added import and export of container settings configuration

- Updated DXVK settings

- Added a file manager for the container

- Added animation selection

- Added GPU load parameter and frame time graph to the FPS counter

- Added pause functionality when minimizing the app (the container is no longer destroyed, but paused instead)

**Removed Features:**  
- Magnifier  
- Touch helper function  

**Minor Optimizations:** Various small performance and smoothness improvements.

- Viewing and removing shared installed components

- Fixed touch control disappearing after 5 seconds #9 

- Fixed downloading and caching of game covers

- Fixed UI bugs

- Improved on-screen controls editor

- Added frame generation from If the frame generator does not work on the first container launch, try restarting the container.

- Updated FPS counter

- Added experimental Steam games launch
- Added support for animated covers for games

- Added Relative Mouse option from the container to the control settings

- Added the ability to set a custom icon for a game

- Added BCn settings from implementation Winlator Bionic 

- Improved File Explorer — now you can create a game shortcut directly from it

- Interface changes: moved menus, "Installed Components" section, and Gamepad Test

- Removed Big Picture menu from the project and cleaned up other unused code

- Created a new SystemSensorPaths class - that contains all paths to the device's system sensors and centralized all sensor queries 

- Replaced the GL renderer with a Vulkan renderer. Old GL effects were removed, all effects were ported to custom Vulkan fragment shaders; added a Vulkan post-processing pipeline.
The Vulkan renderer implementation is based on Winlator Ludashi 

- Added new sensor paths: hwmon/MTK

- Added content provider selection in Contents (ref4ik, the412banner, and the ability to add your own custom provider)

- Added "Box/FEX Extreme" preset

- When enabling Toggle Fullscreen , the sharpness effect is now automatically enabled to improve image qualit

- Fixed translations

- Added a slider in container settings to change text DPI


- Fixed a bug when downloading Wine where other versions stopped working #4 

- Rebuilt some Wine ref4ik versions with additional patches

- Fixed API output in the FPS counter and added GPU temperature indicator.

- Fixed black screen on first container boot.

- Improved shortcuts.

- Improved frame generation.

- Improved game import menu

- Added FSR effect.

- Added profiling for the selected game.

- Added control profile preview.

- Fixed a bug when importing Wine with x86_64 architecture where nothing would 
launch inside Wine.

- Improved XServer.

- Added Quick Panel.

- Improved Task Manager.

</details>


**Join  community and get the latest news, builds, and discussions:**  
👉 **Telegram Channel:** https://t.me/winlatorruu  

**If you encounter any problems, please report them here: [GitHub lssues](https://github.com/REF4IK/winlator-ref4ik-/issues)**

Please star the project if you like it! ⭐
Your support helps a lot and motivates me to continue development.


**This version is experimental. It may contain bugs and errors.**

releases.name: Winlator bionic ref4ik mod v9
releases.body:
## Winlator Mod bionic — ref4ik v9

**What's New in This Version:**

🟣 Partially updated app theme  
🟣 Fixed multiple bugs  
🟣 Changes in graphics driver handling

🟣 Fixed frame rate issues  
🟣 Updated image installer

🟣 Fixed conflict with simultaneous Termux installation

🟣 Various design improvements

🟣 Greatly improved manual shortcut import  
🟣 Added **FEX** preset  
🟣 Added ability to install Windows components  
🟣 Added DXVK & Turnip download into container  
🟣 Added audio driver settings

- Added my custom modified **WFM**  
- Added ability to download **Wine** directly into the container  
- Updated **Content Manager**  
- Updated **Credits & Acknowledgements** section  
- Fixed multiple issues in translations  
- Added **Voltage** parameter to the FPS counter 
  - Icon Manager: Added support for ZIP packs and Input Bridge IPK icon packs.  (experimental)

- UI Update: The application has been fully migrated to Compose UI.

- Theme Manager: Added a new theme manager.

- Added SurfaceFlinger renderer and a choice between Vulkan/SurfaceFlinger in container settings.

- Removed wrappers v2–v6.

- Added Vulkan version selection to graphics settings.

- Added Adreno Turbo Mode (may slightly boost FPS when enabled).

- FPS Counter: Added customizable styles and color options for the FPS counter.

- Shortcut Settings: Updated the shortcut menu; navigating to the edit menu now opens a Steam game info page featuring screenshots, videos, ratings, etc.

- Updated the Steam interface and fixed various download bugs. Fixed Steam online status. Accelerated game downloads and increased the download queue limit. Added Steam Friends List with chat support. Added Steam Achievements viewer. Added library view modes: Grid, List, and Compact. Improved cloud saves. Fixed the "last played game" display in Steam.

- Sped up resource extraction on the first app launch.

- Removed several unused components, reducing the overall app size.

- Updated various system libraries.

- Integrated the MMKV library.

- Fixed CPU available extensions display.

- Improved Box/Fex component downloading inside container settings.

- Fixed a bug where enabling any screen effect caused the screen to split into two windows.

- Added an option to download drivers to the Adreno Tools store from StevenMXZ/Adreno-Tools-Drivers.

- Added GPU name selection + CustomName in CPU settings.

- Added Leegao wrapper.

- Added on-screen controls import from Input Bridge.  (experimental)

- Added selection and export of community configurations (experimental)

- Localization: Added Portuguese translation.
- Fixed various bugs in the FPS counter  
- Interface improvements and polishing   
- Added Chinese language  
- Added a new HDR effect to screen effects  
- Improved active windows  
- Fixed control settings  
- Fixed some bugs in themes  
- Fixed some minor bugs 
- - Added the ability to add your own custom repository with drivers in Adrenotools

- Added gyroscope control

- Added update check

- Fixed some bugs

- Added download buttons for Box and FEX in the container and in the shortcut settings

- Added import and export of container settings configuration

- Updated DXVK settings

- Added a file manager for the container

- Added animation selection

- Added GPU load parameter and frame time graph to the FPS counter

- Added pause functionality when minimizing the app (the container is no longer destroyed, but paused instead)

**Removed Features:**  
- Magnifier  
- Touch helper function  

**Minor Optimizations:** Various small performance and smoothness improvements.

- Viewing and removing shared installed components

- Fixed touch control disappearing after 5 seconds #9 

- Fixed downloading and caching of game covers

- Fixed UI bugs

- Improved on-screen controls editor

- Added frame generation from If the frame generator does not work on the first container launch, try restarting the container.

- Updated FPS counter

- Added experimental Steam games launch
- Added support for animated covers for games

- Added Relative Mouse option from the container to the control settings

- Added the ability to set a custom icon for a game

- Added BCn settings from implementation Winlator Bionic 

- Improved File Explorer — now you can create a game shortcut directly from it

- Interface changes: moved menus, "Installed Components" section, and Gamepad Test

- Removed Big Picture menu from the project and cleaned up other unused code

- Created a new SystemSensorPaths class - that contains all paths to the device's system sensors and centralized all sensor queries 

- Replaced the GL renderer with a Vulkan renderer. Old GL effects were removed, all effects were ported to custom Vulkan fragment shaders; added a Vulkan post-processing pipeline.
The Vulkan renderer implementation is based on Winlator Ludashi 

- Added new sensor paths: hwmon/MTK

- Added content provider selection in Contents (ref4ik, the412banner, and the ability to add your own custom provider)

- Added "Box/FEX Extreme" preset

- When enabling Toggle Fullscreen , the sharpness effect is now automatically enabled to improve image qualit

- Fixed translations

- Added a slider in container settings to change text DPI


- Fixed a bug when downloading Wine where other versions stopped working #4 

- Rebuilt some Wine ref4ik versions with additional patches

- Fixed API output in the FPS counter and added GPU temperature indicator.

- Fixed black screen on first container boot.

- Improved shortcuts.

- Improved frame generation.

- Improved game import menu

- Added FSR effect.

- Added profiling for the selected game.

- Added control profile preview.

- Fixed a bug when importing Wine with x86_64 architecture where nothing would 
launch inside Wine.

- Improved XServer.

- Added Quick Panel.

- Improved Task Manager.

</details>


**Join  community and get the latest news, builds, and discussions:**  
👉 **Telegram Channel:** https://t.me/winlatorruu  

**If you encounter any problems, please report them here: [GitHub lssues](https://github.com/REF4IK/winlator-ref4ik-/issues)**

Please star the project if you like it! ⭐
Your support helps a lot and motivates me to continue development.


**This version is experimental. It may contain bugs and errors.**

releases.name: v0.3.1-beta
releases.body:
### (Hotfix):

**Bug Fixes**

* Container Installation: Resolved issues that prevented container install components from working correctly which was for Gecko/Components Installer.
* Mouse Input: Fixed a tracking bug tied to 60Hz refresh rates.
* Steam Glitches: Fixed an issue causing Steam download errors and resolved glitches within the Steam Library interface.
* Save Imports: Fixed a bug where importing save files via `.zip` archives would fail.
* Background Visuals: Resolved an issue where the background blur effect was not rendering properly.
* UI Resizing: Fixed dynamic resizing behaviors for the Xserver menu and the Container UI.
* Setup Wizard: Corrected display sizing issues encountered during the initial setup wizard.
* Performance Logging: Stopped the system from writing a CSV log file on every single boot; this is now correctly gated and only runs when performance logging is enabled.
* CPU Issue was due to Blur image was re-rendered for every frame up to 120 FPS while sitting idle in Library.

**System Tweaks & Adjustments**

* Engine & Wrapper Updates: Pushed automatic updates for Mono and Gecko, updated the GameNative wrapper, and bumped the Ajay Prefix to the 1.8 hotfix.
* Hardware Accuracy: Improved CPU accuracy and reporting metrics.
* Steam Sync & Chat: Adjusted Steam Cloud Save syncing and added an optional toggle for Steam Chat.
* Library Stability: Hardened the library components list and added a manual refresh button for better reliability.
* Environment Variables: Added **Shader Model 6.9** and **Wine Fast Yield** as easily selectable options in the variables list.
* Application Logs: Enabled support for multiple application log saves.
* Locales & Language: Expanded localization with new locales and added support for store game language selection, 8 more Locales!. ( Shout-out to @TWCM for PR 580! )

### Contributors

 * @Xnick417x 
 * @maxjivi05 
 * @TWCM 

### New Contributors
 * @TWCM 

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/WinNative-Emu/WinNative/compare/v0.3.0-beta...v0.3.1-beta

releases.name: v0.3.0-beta
releases.body:
### Main Changes:

**FEX-Emu / UnixLibs support**
 - WinNative now supports FEX-Emu UnixLibs (native `.so` thunked libraries). A new toggle next to the FEXCore version lets you enable the native library backend per container, with name-based compatibility handling. This can noticeably improve performance for supported titles.

**Proton & component updates**
 - New/updated **Proton 11.0-1** layers — an updated custom ARM64EC build plus an x86-64 (Steam) build — alongside the existing Proton 10.x, 11.0-5, and 11.1-GE options.
 - New **Unix Protons**: Proton layers compiled with UnixLibs for the FEXCore backend (9.0, 10, 10.0-4, 11-B5, and 11.0-1 ARM64EC-Steam), pairing with the new FEX-Emu UnixLibs support.
 - New Stable FEXCore-with-UnixLibs build.
 - The in-app component hub was refreshed so all of the above show up directly in the downloader.

**Handheld & full gamepad control**
 - You can now control the entire app with a controller — no touch input needed. Navigate the library, set up containers, and even open and drive the in-game XServer menu with a gamepad (hold the Xbox/guide button to bring it up).
 - New library shortcuts for handhelds: R3 to add a game, L3 to search, X to enter the hero view, and more.
 - Touchscreen controls now auto-hide when a physical controller is connected.

**Steam**
 - The custom Steam client keeps growing: Steam Friends, messaging, chat notifications, chat heads, and in-game chat are now available, along with achievements, launch options, and profile images.
 - Steam downloads have been fixed and hardened for reliability.
 - The Steam library now refreshes correctly after a game exits — sessions self-heal on app resume, so library changes appear immediately.

**External displays & Viture glasses**
 - Initial support for external monitors, TVs, casting, and Viture XR glasses. Run your game on the big screen while the device handles input.
 - Automatic output switching is gated behind a new toggle (off by default) so nothing changes unless you opt in.

**Library overhaul & built-in file manager**
 - The library UI has been restyled with a refreshed top bar, accent colors, and cleaner add-game flow.
 - A new in-app file manager can be opened right from the library top bar — browse drive roots, copy/move files with progress, all without leaving the app.
 - File pickers now accept `.bat` and `.cmd` files, and tapping a file highlights it instead of instantly confirming.

**Frontend support**
 - New frontend export: WinNative can write standalone `.desktop` entries plus icons into a folder of your choice so external frontends (Daijishō, ES-DE, etc.) can scan and launch your games. Export per-game from the game detail screen, or everything at once with the Export All chip.

**Touch controls refinement**
 - New Touch card replaces the old double-mouse card, with a touchscreen mode and a "map right stick like GameHub" option that lets the right stick drive the touch screen like a mouse (when a gamepad touch profile is active).
 - RTS-style gestures, expanded up to 4 fingers, with new gesture-specific profiles.
 - A right-stick sensitivity slider has been added to Controls.
 - Touch control profiles are now remembered per shortcut instead of globally.

**Containers & components**
 - Install components per container from a list — install Visual C++, DirectX, and more without ever booting the container.
 - New hero buttons: Boot to Desktop and Graphics Test are now available directly from the container view.
 - The setup wizard has been refined, and component downloads can now be queued.
 - A dinput8 Native/Builtin toggle has been added to container settings.

**Performance & graphics**
 - The FPS cap now aligns frame pacing to the display's vsync grid, so caps become exact vsync dividers. This removes microstutter at low caps on high-refresh panels.
 - New Wrapper-Leegao graphics driver option, plus an updated wrapper build.
 - New Wrapper-Gamenative graphics driver option — a third graphics wrapper that enables DX12 on Mali GPUs with r50+ kernel drivers, with its own BCn transcoder (CPU/GPU) and BCn quality (low/high) settings.
 - Three new Qualcomm GPU system drivers built by @Xnick417x: 800.72, 842.38, and 842.41.
 - BCn (texture compression) emulation now defaults to auto.
 - FX effects can now be set per shortcut, and the FX tab has been extended with more effects.
 - Fixed red/blue channel swap on devices where BGRA8 was expected but the buffer was RGBA8 (thanks @formiga).
 - Fixed the black-box flash on newly mapped windows.
 - D7VK can now be imported as a ddraw wrapper, and d3d8/d3d10 builtins are preserved from the DXVK pre-extract wipe.

**Audio**
 - PulseAudio has been overhauled by adopting the GameNative PulseAudio stack, fixing games that had broken or missing audio with PulseAudio (credit to the GameNative project).
 - Fixed audio crackling via larger output buffers.

**Cloud saves**
 - Cloud saves have been hardened against data loss: restores now roll back on failure, Steam saves resolve the correct container on launch, and Epic/GOG keep-local choices are honored.
 - A new Backup To Google option has been added.

### HUD
 - New C.TMP element shows CPU temperature; battery temperature is now labeled B.TMP.
 - HUD backdrop transparency is now adjustable.

### Minor Changes:
 - Background UI customization has been added to Settings.
 - Logs: the application log now works correctly, a download button has been added to the log UI, and the Logs drawer card has moved after Tasks.
 - Fixed container boot crash on Android 12 and below (API < 33).
 - Fixed Z: drive boot and shortcut creation, and drives are no longer force-recreated every boot.
 - Custom games no longer create an incorrect C: drive symlink, and symlinks are excluded from container storage size.
 - Stopped forcing VKD3D_SHADER_MODEL and per-launch xinput variables, and updated Box64 environment variables.
 - Fixed native extraction IO for more reliable ImageFS/component installs.
 - Fixed HTTP 403 errors on GOG chunk downloads (the chunk path was being appended after the signed query string); GOG downloads now work reliably.
 - Bundled ffmpeg 8 libraries for Wine's winedmo media path, improving in-game video/cutscene (FMV) playback.
 - Chat head overlay is now gated behind the background toggle, and redundant Wine log channels were removed.
 - Background-session reattach hardened: mouse and on-screen/gamepad controls are restored on reattach, and the input ring no longer overflows or randomly drops gamepad input (held inputs are released when the in-session menu opens, and the XServer menu reattaches correctly).
 - Resized the XServer menu drawer and refined several dialogs, strings, and icons.
 - Concurrency, crash, and protocol fixes from a source audit.
 - More missing translations have been filled in across languages.

### Ajay Prefix Pro v1.8
 - The in-container downloader has been updated to Ajay Prefix Pro v1.8. Read more: https://github.com/ajay9634/Ajay-prefix

### Contributors
Huge thanks to everyone who contributed, this release wouldn't exist without you:
 - @Xnick417x — 64 commits (handheld/gamepad control, library overhaul + file manager, touch controls, per-container components, FPS cap pacing, FX, HUD, Wrapper-Gamenative, 3 new Qualcomm GPU drivers (800.72/842.38/842.41), 2 Proton layers, background-session reattach fixes, many fixes)
 - @maxjivi05 — 17 commits (FEX-Emu UnixLibs, all Proton layers incl. the new Unix Protons, Steam features / download fixes / library refresh, external display/Viture support, PulseAudio, cloud saves hardening)
 - @Ajay9634 — 2 commits (Ajay Prefix Pro v1.8 downloader)
 - @muazkadan — 1 commit (GOG chunk-download 403 fix, #604)
 - @formiga — 1 commit (AHB GPUImage red/blue channel swizzle fix, #533)

## New Contributors
* @formiga made their first contribution in https://github.com/WinNative-Emu/WinNative/pull/533
* @muazkadan made their first contribution in https://github.com/WinNative-Emu/WinNative/pull/604

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/WinNative-Emu/WinNative/compare/v0.2.0-beta...v0.3.0-beta

releases.name: v0.2.0-beta
releases.body:
### Main Changes:
 - Replaced OpenGL renderer with our own Vulkan Compositor
 - This offers better 1% lows, frame-pacing, and higher FPS in a majority of games tested. Confirmed using Shadow of the Tomb Raider and other in-game benchmarks.
 - Effects are improved and more noticeable.
 - Snapdragon Game Super Resolution 1 has been added to in-game FX menu. This sharpens and upscales your image using shaders. It works better in some games than others.
 - The HUD FPS calculation have been reworked and made more accurate/conservative. It aligns closer to DXVK HUD and games own FPS monitors.
 - The in-game HUD can now show frametime as a number, and the charge icon when connected to an output source.
 - HUD labels (CPU/RAM/BAT/TMP) have been recolored for better visibility, with a slightly larger default scale and darker backdrop, and the HUD now starts snapped to the top-center on first launch.
 - The in-game FPS limiter has now supports any target FPS from 30 - Display Refresh Rate. You can reduce power consumption and save battery by using it.

### Steam
 - WinNative now uses a custom Steam client; replacing JavaSteam and the old Steam client. You must have an internet connection for it to sign into your Steam account on game launch. Only certain Proton/Wine versions are supported at the moment with the new client. You can see which ones are via the in-app component downloader. They will be labeled with the "Steam" tag.
 - The new client now handles downloads, online play, DRM, and other Steam services. This makes more Steam games playable and does not lower in-game performance.
 - Downloads are x2 faster on average with less overhead.
 - You can connect to online services and multiplayer in Steam games.
 - DLC downloading is now supported fully.
 - Launching via the new Steam client is set as default. You can select the Legacy Launcher via Settings > Steam.

### Epic Games & GOG
 - Downloads are slightly faster and more reliable now.
 - DLC downloading has been added. You can view your DLC just by clicking on a game just like Steam.
 - Cloud saves for both stores are fully supported.

### All stores
 - You can now download your base game, then download DLC later without reinstalling the base game.
 - All downloaders support better pause, resume, retry and recovery.
 - You can view your cloud saves for a game by selecting it and clicking the cloud save icon.
 - The manual save method is now applied container-wide, so it carries across the whole container. Thanks to @Ajay9634 for the help.
 - Background session persistence
 - Wine sessions, component downloads, and ImageFS extractions now keep running when the app is backgrounded or the screen is locked, thanks to a new keep-alive foreground service and CPU wake lock. Long multi-minute installs will no longer be killed by the system.
 - Manual pause state now persists, and the old auto-pause-on-background behavior has been removed, so you stay in control of when a session pauses.

### Minor Changes:
### UI Updates
 - Refreshed several UI elements and pages for better look and feel with cleaner animations.
 - Immersive mode has been added to the home left swipe menu. This sets your game artwork as the UI background. An optional background blur setting has also been added.
 - You can now select new touch screen controller styles and button labels. For styles we have added GameHub, and for buttons Xbox and PlayStation have been added.
 - Library artwork is now cached for faster loading.
 - The in-game window now applies a fullscreen stretch on the first game window rather than at boot, for more reliable scaling.
 - Refactor Size: a new "Refactor Size" toggle has been added to the in-game drawer menu. It borderless-fullscreens the active guest window using a bundled Win32 helper, giving you an instant clean full-screen view of the running app or game.

This is based on a script kindly shared by @Ajay9634 — thanks for the help.

### Ajay Prefix Pro v1.1
 - A downloader for Ajay Prefix Pro has been added to each containers Start > Programs menu

This is a trusted and popular way to manage game saves. You can read more about Ajay Prefix Pro on the GitHub page: https://github.com/ajay9634/Ajay-prefix

### Audio
 - Pulse Audio has been made more stable and now produces correct sound for games that require it.
 - Background audio playback has been fixed so sound continues correctly during backgrounded sessions.

### Drivers
 - New containers now automatically apply the last installed driver from the setup wizard, so you don't have to set it manually each time.
 - Driver Manager has been updated to pull from the WinNative component repository with more reliable releases.

### Controls & Compatibility
 - Direct3D WinComponents are now allowed on ARM64EC, improving compatibility for more games.
 - Gyroscopes have been fixed (correctness fixes plus a new tilt-to-aim orientation mode that sustains stick deflection on a held tilt).
 - Gamepad vibration/rumble now works reliably — the in-game "Enable Vibration" toggle is authoritative and vibration defaults to On.
 - Press and hold on the touchpad for about a second to right-click (with jitter protection).

### Other/Bug Fixes:
 - L2 and R2 buttons now register in-game correctly on button based controllers.
 - Wine default variables for controllers have been adjusted to allow controller registration to work better in games.
 - Fake input now handles controller disconnections better and Bluetooth controllers are more stable.
 - Fixed on screen trackpad spinning and input drops during trackpad + button use, fixed the trackpad when bound to gamepad bindings.
 - Fixed mouse freezing after backgrounding.
 - HyperOS 3 devices can now load Turnip drivers correctly.
 - Russian and Hindi translations have been added (translated by GPT 5.5 High), and missing strings across some existing languages have been filled in.
 - Google drive save and container backup has been temporarily removed, these features will return again in the future.
 - Config import/export has been removed (superseded by the Best Configs flow).
 - Due the number of changes in this release we recommend a clean install to avoid any issues. However, if you want to try and update, you will need to delete your containers and reinstall ImageFS.

### Contributors
Huge thanks to everyone who contributed, this release wouldn't exist without you:
 - @ribbit384 — 54 commits (Vulkan compositor, SGSR1 upscaling, Steam client work, downloads hardening, HUD, translations, extensive UI refinement)
 - @Xnick417x — 34 commits (input/controller systems, FPS profiles, driver manager, component repository, trackpad & X-server fixes, RefactorSize, HUD colors)
 - @maxjivi05  — 16 commits (C++/Rust Steam client, gamepad themes, cloud save integration, gyro, vibrations, i18n)
 - @Ajay9634 — 2 commits (Ajay Prefix Pro Downloader, v1.0 and v1.1)
 - @s1mptom — 1 commit (vibration driver review, #361)

Additional contributors (via co-authored commits):

 - @PavelTurbin — co-authored the vibration driver work (#361)
 - @Juan-Antonio-Doe — co-authored background session persistence (PR #397, merged in #423)

releases.name: v0.1.0-beta
releases.body:
### We’re proud to announce the first public release of WinNative

WinNative is a modern, open source Winlator fork built for the experience we wanted ourselves. It started as something we wanted to use, and now we’re excited to share it with the community.

### Notable features:

- Modern Jetpack Compose UI replacing Winlator’s legacy XML interface.
- Built for long play sessions, with controls and audio designed to remain stable during 8+ hour sessions.
- Easy to follow setup wizard for users who are new to Winlator.
- Basic Steam, Epic Games, and GOG integrations for personal game library support.
- Google Play support for secure login token saving and restoration.
- Built in component and driver fetcher with GitHub integration.
- Noticeable performance improvements compared to GameHub and similar apps.

### Other notes:
- This is a 0.1.0 release, so bugs are expected and already being tracked. WinNative will continue to improve over the next several releases, with more polish, fixes, and expanded features coming over time.

WinNative wouldn't also be possible without Winlator itself. Consider supporting Bruno here in the meantime: https://buymeacoffee.com/brunosx

We would also like to thank all testers and contributors. Without their valuable input this wouldn't be possible.

Join or share our Discord here:
https://discord.gg/WUC4qVABJT

## New Contributors
* @BeZide93 made their first contribution in https://github.com/WinNative-Emu/WinNative/pull/26
* @ajay9634 made their first contribution in https://github.com/WinNative-Emu/WinNative/pull/120
* @Kashinathpat made their first contribution in https://github.com/WinNative-Emu/WinNative/pull/280
* @DevElderLost made their first contribution in https://github.com/WinNative-Emu/WinNative/pull/373

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/WinNative-Emu/WinNative/commits/v0.1.0-beta

***Esta versión sigue siendo básica pero trae algunas mejoras en general y otras más específicas para dispositivo mediatek,gpu mali y gpu xclipse.***

•Se cambió el directorio de donde se descarga el contenido,esto para agregar DXVK parcheado como stripped o sarek para mayor compatibilidad con vulkan 1.1 o 1.2 con pocas extenciones disponibles, también se agregaron varios wined3d para descargar.

•se agregaron complemento necesario para distintos títulos funcionen correctamente.
•se agregaron distintas variables para rendimiento, compatibilidad y estabilidad.

releases.name: Winlator~honkon v10.1
releases.body: ### vortek+DXVK ya funciona en gpu mali Esta versión sigue siendo básica pero trae algunas mejoras en general y otras más específicas para dispositivo mediatek,gpu mali y xclipse,más adelante subiré una versión completa :) AVISO:vortek no funciona en todo los dispositivos con mediatek,esto debido a varios factores lo cuales son driver, versión de vulkan ,extenciones etc... Bruno trabajo arduamente para mejorar la compatibilidad y rendimiento de winlator en dispositivos con gpu mali y xclipse. ### Registro de cambios: 1- se uso la versión de afie mod como inspiración,créditos y agradecimiento.. Aquí la versión por si la quieren probar [mod afei](https://github.com/afeimod/winlator-mod/releases/tag/10.0-Amod5fix) 1.1• se elimino la opción de comandos y traduje la opción para agregar contenido... Tenga en cuenta que algunas cajas y controladores deben instalarse con wine9.16.whp antes de poder usarse,está opción solo es para pruebas, por favor apoya al autor original. 2•Se cambió el directorio de donde se descarga el contenido,esto para agregar DXVK parcheado como stripped o sarek para mayor compatibilidad con vulkan 1.1 o 1.2 con pocas extenciones disponibles, también se agregaron varios wined3d para descargar. 3•Se agregaron parches para el rendimiento y compatibilidad. 4•se agregaron complemento necesario para distintos títulos funcionen correctamente. 5•se agregaron distintas variables para rendimiento, compatibilidad y estabilidad.

releases.name: Winlator_Brasil_10.1, Winlator_Brasil_10.1_AI e Winlator Brasil CLT
releases.body:
### 🆕 Winlator_Brasil_10.1, Winlator_Brasil_10.1_AI e Winlator Brasil CLT – Novas Versões

Esta atualização traz duas versões, **Winlator Brasil 10.1**, **Winlator_Brasil_10.1_AI** e **Winlator Brasil CLT**. 

**Permitindo instalar as 3 versões ao mesmo tempo, no seu celular**.

![Screenshot_2025-05-28-13-46-30-893_com miui home](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/11ae82c8-c174-425a-909d-0aa1b31db7f5)


---

O **Winlator Brasil 10.1** traz diversas melhorias e recursos adicionais para aprimorar sua experiência com jogos no Android. 

O **Winlator_Brasil_10.1_AI** traz diversas melhorias e um desempenho melhor de gameplay e áudio.

O **Winlator Brasil CLT** é focado apenas em programas de trabalho do dia a dia.

--- 

Confira abaixo todas as novidades e instruções detalhadas.

---

- **NOTA:** Para utilizar o **Winlator Brasil 10.1**, você precisa desinstalar a versão original do Winlator ou Winlator Bionic ou qualquer Winlator associado ao nome do Winlator, se você já o possuía para poder instalar este mod. Ou, caso contrário, você não pode instalar este mod porque este mod é usado glibc e glibc não são suportados o nome personalizado para clonar o apk como benchmark ou qualquer outro nome.

---

### ✅ Novidades da Versão **Winlator Brasil 10.1**

- **📦 Pacote AIO Visual C++**. Instalação automática de todas as versões do Visual C++ Redistributable.
- **🌐 Novo Navegador Web**: Inclusão de um navegador leve para facilitar downloads e navegação.
- **🗜️ WinRAR**. Ferramenta de compactação/descompactação adicionada.
- **🎮 Perfis de Controles de Jogos**: Agora com 92 perfis disponíveis para download automático.

Veja como baixar os perfis de controle automaticamente:

![Download de Perfis](https://github.com/winlatorbrasil/Winlator-Brasil/blob/main/android_alsa/controle.gif )

- **📦 Instalação Offline do Wine Gecko e Mono**: Facilita a execução de aplicativos .NET e páginas com conteúdo HTML.
- **⚙️ Novas Flags do Box64**: 14 flags adicionadas para otimização e compatibilidade.
- **🌐 Novas Variáveis de Ambiente**: 17 variáveis configuráveis para ajuste fino de desempenho.
- **🇧🇷 Tradução 90% em Português (Brasil)**: Interface mais amigável para usuários brasileiros.
- **🍷 Suporte ao Wine 9.15 e 9.16 (ESTÃO EM BETA AINDA)**: Adição de menu para instalação dessas versões (Wine 10 não suportado).

`PODE ALTERNAR ENTRE AS VERSÕES DA WINE EM UM MESMO CONTAINER, SEM PRECISAR CRIAR UM NOVO CONTAINER, ISSO ESTÁ EM BETA TAMBÉM, ERROS PODEM ACONTECER.`

Aprenda a instalar as versões 9.15 e 9.16 do Wine:

![Instalação do Wine](https://github.com/winlatorbrasil/Winlator-Brasil/blob/main/android_alsa/winebug.gif )

- **🧠 Aumento da Memória Virtual**: Agora é possível configurar até 16384MB.
- **🎨 Novos Ícones nos Controles**: Facilita a edição e personalização dos controles.
- **⚡ Aumento do Limite de Taxa de Quadros**: Suporte para até 240 FPS.

---

### ✅ Novidades da Versão **Winlator_Brasil_10.1_AI**

- **⚠️ ATENÇÃO AOS DRIVERS**. Ele reconhece até:
 
**Turnip:** 24.3.0
**DXVK:** 2.5.3.0
**BOX:** 0.3.3

- **⚠️ Feito com base no Fork do foxrain versão usada foi a Winlator-9.0-Amod3_LuAi.apk**.
- **📦 Pacote AIO Visual C++**. Instalação automática de todas as versões do Visual C++ Redistributable.
- **🌐 Novo Navegador Web**: Inclusão de um navegador leve para facilitar downloads e navegação.
- **🎮 Perfis de Controles de Jogos**: Agora com 92 perfis disponíveis para download automático.

Veja como baixar os perfis de controle automaticamente:

![Download de Perfis](https://github.com/winlatorbrasil/Winlator-Brasil/blob/main/android_alsa/controle.gif )

- **🗜️ WinRAR**. Ferramenta de compactação/descompactação adicionada.
- **🇧🇷 Tradução 90% em Português (Brasil)**: Interface mais amigável para usuários brasileiros.
- **📦 Instalação Offline do Wine Gecko e Mono**: Facilita a execução de aplicativos .NET e páginas com conteúdo HTML.
- **⚡ Aumento do Limite de Taxa de Quadros**: Suporte para até 240 FPS.
- **🧠 Aumento da Memória Virtual**: Agora é possível configurar até 16384MB.

---

### ✅ Novidades da Versão **Winlator Brasil CLT**

- **⚠️ Feito com base no Fork do WB64DEV versão usada foi a Winlator-9.1.1.apk**.
- **📦 Pacote AIO Visual C++**. Instalação automática de todas as versões do Visual C++ Redistributable.
- **🌐 Novo Navegador Web**: Inclusão de um navegador leve para facilitar downloads e navegação.
- **🗜️ WinRAR**. Ferramenta de compactação/descompactação adicionada.
- **🇧🇷 Tradução 90% em Português (Brasil)**: Interface mais amigável para usuários brasileiros.
- **📦 Instalação Offline do Wine Gecko e Mono**: Facilita a execução de aplicativos .NET e páginas com conteúdo HTML.
- **💻 Instalação LibreOffice**. Instalação do pacote Office Open Source, para edição de arquivos Excel, Word e PowerPoint.
- **🖌️ Instalação Blender**: Instalação do Blender para modelagens 3D.
- **⚡ Aumento do Limite de Taxa de Quadros**: Suporte para até 240 FPS.
- **🧠 Aumento da Memória Virtual**: Agora é possível configurar até 16384MB.

### ⚙️ Explicações Técnicas 

#### 🔧 Flags do Box64 

As flags do Box64 permitem ajustar o comportamento do emulador para melhor compatibilidade e desempenho:

- `BOX64_DYNAREC_SAFEFLAGS`: Ativa flags seguras no recompilador dinâmico para evitar instruções potencialmente problemáticas.
- `BOX64_DYNAREC_FASTNAN`: Otimiza operações com valores NaN (Not a Number) para maior velocidade.
- `BOX64_DYNAREC_FASTROUND`: Utiliza arredondamento rápido em operações de ponto flutuante.
- `BOX64_DYNAREC_X87DOUBLE`: Garante precisão dupla nas operações com o coprocessador x87.
- `BOX64_DYNAREC_BIGBLOCK`: Permite blocos maiores de código no recompilador dinâmico, melhorando o desempenho.
- `BOX64_DYNAREC_STRONGMEM`: Implementa verificações de memória mais rigorosas para evitar acessos inválidos.
- `BOX64_DYNAREC_FORWARD`: Habilita a execução antecipada de instruções para otimização.
- `BOX64_DYNAREC_CALLRET`: Otimiza chamadas e retornos de funções.
- `BOX64_DYNAREC_WAIT`: Garante sincronização adequada em instruções de espera.
- `BOX64_AVX`: Ativa suporte às instruções AVX para aplicações que as utilizam.
- `BOX64_DYNAREC_NATIVEFLAGS`: Utiliza flags nativas do sistema host para melhor desempenho.
- `BOX64_DYNAREC_WEAKBARRIER`: Reduz barreiras de memória para melhorar a velocidade, com possível impacto na precisão.
- `BOX64_MAXCPU`: Define o número máximo de CPUs virtuais disponíveis para o emulador.
- `BOX64_UNITYPLAYER`: Otimiza a execução de jogos desenvolvidos com o Unity Player.

#### 🌐 Variáveis de Ambiente 

As variáveis de ambiente permitem configurar aspectos específicos do sistema e do emulador:

- `LC_ALL`: Define a localidade padrão do sistema, afetando formatação de datas, números, etc.
- `ZINK_DESCRIPTORS`: Controla o número de descritores usados pelo driver Zink.
- `ZINK_DEBUG`: Ativa mensagens de depuração para o driver Zink.
- `MESA_SHADER_CACHE_DISABLE`: Desativa o cache de shaders no Mesa.
- `MESA_SHADER_CACHE_MAX_SIZE`: Define o tamanho máximo do cache de shaders.
- `MESA_GLTHREAD`: Ativa o threading no OpenGL para melhorar o desempenho.
- `WINEESYNC`: Habilita o esync no Wine para melhor gerenciamento de threads.
- `TU_DEBUG`: Ativa mensagens de depuração para o driver Turnip.
- `MESA_VK_WSI_DEBUG`: Ativa depuração para a interface de sistema de janelas no Vulkan.
- `MESA_GL_VERSION_OVERRIDE`: Força uma versão específica do OpenGL.
- `DXVK_HUD`: Exibe informações de desempenho na tela durante a execução.
- `GALLIUM_HUD`: Similar ao DXVK_HUD, mas para drivers Gallium.
- `PULSE_LATENCY_MSEC`: Define a latência do PulseAudio em milissegundos.
- `MESA_EXTENSION_MAX_YEAR`: Restringe as extensões do Mesa a um ano específico.
- `IR3_SHADER_DEBUG`: Ativa depuração para shaders no driver Freedreno.
- `WINE_DO_NOT_CREATE_DXGI_DEVICE_MANAGER`: Impede a criação do gerenciador de dispositivos DXGI no Wine.
- `MANGOHUD`: Ativa a sobreposição do MangoHud para monitoramento de desempenho.

---

### 📥 Instruções de Instalação

1. Instale o APK do **Winlator Brasil 10.1** normalmente no seu dispositivo Android.
2. Execute o aplicativo e aguarde a criação das pastas iniciais.
3. Acesse o menu de gerenciamento de pacotes para alternar ou baixar novas versões do Box64, Turnip ou DXVK.
4. Aplique os templates de controle nas configurações de mapeamento conforme o jogo desejado.

---

### 🛠️ Possíveis Bugs e Melhorias

⚠️ **Instabilidade com Wine 10**: Atualmente, o Wine 10 não é suportado devido a incompatibilidades conhecidas.  
📉 **Limitações de Desempenho**: Alguns dispositivos podem não atingir os 240 FPS devido a restrições de hardware.  
🌐 **Tradução Incompleta**: Apesar de 90% da interface estar traduzida para o português, algumas partes ainda podem aparecer em inglês.

`Obrigado: [afeimod](https://github.com/afeimod/) pelo seu belo trabalho em relação ao menu de drivers.`

releases.name: Winlator_Brasil_10.0
releases.body:
Esta versão do **Winlator Brasil 10.0** (fork baseado no projeto de Bruno Dev) inclui uma ampla variedade de versões do **Box64**, **Turnip**, **DXVK** e dezenas de templates de controle otimizados para jogos populares.

---

**NOTA:** Você precisa desinstalar a versão original do Winlator ou Winlator Bionic ou qualquer Winlator associado ao nome do Winlator, se você já o possuía para poder instalar este mod. Ou, caso contrário, você não pode instalar este mod porque este mod é usado glibc e glibc não são suportados o nome personalizado para clonar o apk como benchmark ou qualquer outro nome.

---

## ✅ Componentes pré-instalados

**Box64**:  
0.3.0, 0.3.2, 0.3.3, 0.3.4, 0.3.5  

**Turnip**:  
24.1.0, 25.0.0  

**DXVK**:  
0.96, 1.7.2, 1.10.3, 2.4.1  

---

## 📥 Componentes adicionais disponíveis para instalação

**Box64**:  
0.2.7, 0.2.8, 0.2.9, 0.3.1, 0.3.5.1, 0.3.5.2, 0.3.5.3, 0.3.5.5  

**Turnip**:  
23.1.0, 23.1.6, 23.3.0, 24.0.9, 24.3.0.10, 24.3.0.5,  
25.0.0.1, 25.0.0.2, 25.0.0.3, 25.0.0.4, 25.0.0.5,  
25.1.0.2, 25.2.0.1  

**DXVK**:  
0.40.1, 0.7, 0.97, 1.4.2, 1.5.5, 1.7.1, 1.10.3.0,  
1.10.6.0, 1.10.8.0, 1.13.3, 2.2, 2.2.116, 2.3.1, 2.3.1.54,  
2.4, 2.4.24, 2.4.1, 2.4.1.1, 2.4.1.123, 2.4.1.293,  
2.5.1.2, 2.5.2, 2.5.3.0, 2.6, 2.6.1.1, 2.6.2,  
78.11, 78.9, 78to11, 78to9  

---

## 🎮 Templates de controle incluídos

RTS, Template (12 buttons), Hitman 2, Virtual Gamepad, Fallout 3, Far Cry 4,  
Risen 2, Skyrim, Deus Ex: Human Revolution, Final Fantasy Type-0, Psychonauts,  
Spider-Man: Shattered Dimensions, The Alliance Alive, Mass Effect 2, Alpha Protocol,  
Dark Souls 2, Sonic Generations, Sonic Mania, The Forest, The Saboteur, Ys Origin,  
Ultima Underworld, Bioshock, Driver Parallel Lines, Divinity 2 DC, FlatOut 2,  
Rayman 3, Turok 2, Front Mission Evolved, Gravity Circuit, Metro 2033, NFSMW,  
Marvel Ultimate Alliance, Quake 4, Turok Evolution, Unepic, Untitled Goose Game,  
Infernal, Slime Rancher, SteamWorld Dig 2, IGI 2, RAGE, Oblivion, Drakensang,  
GTA 5, La Mulana, Stalker CS, Sunset Overdrive, Xanadu Next, Cyber Shadow,  
Singularity, Wolfenstein, Prey, Shovel Knight, Second Sight,  
Call of Juarez: Gunslinger, Final Fantasy 8, Star Wars Jedi Knight 2  

---

## 🆕 Changelog

- Inclusão de múltiplas versões do Box64, Turnip e DXVK (pré-instaladas e autônomas);  
- Mais de 50 templates de controle personalizados para jogos;  
- Melhor organização para facilitar atualizações e testes de compatibilidade.

---

## 📌 Instruções de instalação

1. Instale o APK do **Winlator Brasil** normalmente no seu dispositivo Android.  
2. Execute o app e aguarde a criação das pastas iniciais.  
3. Acesse a área de gerenciamento de pacotes para alternar ou baixar novas versões de Box64, Turnip ou DXVK.  
4. Aplique os templates de controle nas configurações de mapeamento conforme o jogo desejado.  

---

## 💾 Acesso ao cartão de memória

Para acessar jogos armazenados no cartão de memória, use o app **"Gerenciador de Arquivos"** (disponível gratuitamente na Play Store).  
Nele, vá até o cartão de memória, toque e mantenha pressionada uma pasta até ela ser selecionada.  
Toque em **"Mais"** (no rodapé), vá em **"Propriedades"** e veja o campo **"Pasta"**, que exibirá o caminho completo, por exemplo:  
`/storage/9BD3-F22E/`  
Copie esse caminho e cole na seção **"Drives"** do container no Winlator.

---

## 🎮 Correção de XInput

Para corrigir possíveis bugs no joystick XInput, acesse o menu:  
**Iniciar > Fixes > XInput Fixes > XInput Fix Controller**

---

⚠️ A estabilidade e o desempenho podem variar conforme o dispositivo e a GPU utilizada.
